Hello,
I am emailing to ask you to give $5 to my campaign against Lauren Boebert.
Here’s why: **I am officially the Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert, and a brand-new poll shows Boebert is still incredibly vulnerable!**
In 2022, Adam Frisch nearly defeated Lauren Boebert. He lost by just 546 votes.
That scared Lauren Boebert so much that she came running to my district. But the voters of eastern Colorado don’t want a carpetbagging extremist more concerned with getting on Fox News than the needs of her constituents.
Even Republicans are done with Boebert: 57% voted for someone else in the primary!
**We can finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress in November, but the only way I’ll be able to win is if we hit every fundraising goal and have the resources to fully fund my campaign.**
We’ve set a goal of raising another $50,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still incredibly short. So I have to ask:
**[Please, if you can afford to, will you make a donation to my campaign – every dollar you can spare – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91994278/495652872/-2103306697?refcode=em20240901pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=87fbf958-be68-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZiZjk1OC1iZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7Gw1QIga3_HkfJzj11xLPHif6gvp_wEsKP56TnsLWY=)**

| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Sep 2

Happy September 1, 2024. Sixty-Five Days to go until Election Day 2024.
Stay tuned for PHENOMENAL news announcements in the upcoming ten days. I can hardly wait to tell you - but I must get all of the details nailed down first.
The Harris/Walz campaign has exploded on the scene with joy, hope, and authenticity. Thank you, Joe Biden. Thank you, Kamala Harris, and Tim Walz.
For those of us in the down ballot race, it's pretty joyful, hopeful, and authentic as well.
If we haven't met, I'm Paula Collins, the Democratic Candidate for Congress in NY-21. My Republican opponent is Elise Stefanik.
Stefanik - who routinely takes credit for bringing money into the district for appropriations that she voted against.
Stefanik - who claims to "Back the Blue", even though she supports the January 6th Insurrectionists who beat and killed members of the law enforcement community.
Stefanik - who claims to support veterans, though her party chopped away at a proposed 19.5% pay increase for enlisted men and women, while also giving them new childcare benefits and housing stipends.
Stefanik - who points the finger at just about anybody to call them "Antisemitic" even though she supported the "great replacement theory" only months before the hearings she conducted regarding student protestors on the Gaza crisis.
Stefanik - who claims to support women, and yet has aligned herself with the antiabortion movement that will endanger the lives of women and trans people by depriving them of vital contraceptives and hormonal therapies.
Stefanik - who joined CA Representative Issa to introduce the so-called "Modern Firearm Safety Act", designed to bring us back to an era in which there were no safeguards to indicate a loaded gun chamber, or microstamping the make, model, and serial number of a handgun when the minutions are fired.
And finally - Stefanik - who would do anything and everything to support the felon, Donald Trump.
We're doing a ["pass the hat"](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa9287b-ebab-46c7-9bcd-87b27242b79b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to cover some expenses. You can [visit the campaign website](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa9287b-ebab-46c7-9bcd-87b27242b79b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or else mail a check to Paula Collins for Congress, 441 Old State Road; DeKalb Junction, NY 13630.
Here's the reason for the sudden urgency in fundraising: since the DNC Convention, we have had an absolute run on postcards, signs, bumper magnets, and the like. I place orders, and before the order can even come in, I have committed the campaign bling to groups of volunteers. At this point, I'm 2+ orders behind, with everything that is coming in in the next 10 days already committed.
**These are good problems to have. But I need financial support. **
Just today, I spent $2,617 on more campaign signs and postcards. Yesterday, I spent a similar amount. Can you chip in and help me cover those costs?
I'm not asking for much, in a world in which some candidates have raised half a billion dollars since late July. But every dime counts in a down-ballot, not-targeted-by-the-party race like mine.
My team and I were originally waiting until after Labor Day to plant yard signs. But I think someone from the Stefanik campaign must have signalled that her supporters should put out yard signs to offset the popularity of the DNC Convention. A LOT of Stefanik signs are out. I need to get mine in the ground, and fast. So far, we have distributed 245 signs. I've got about 23 left in inventory, but they are already promised to people.
The postcards. Oh wow. Where do I start? This has taken on a life of its own, akin to beanie babies and pokemon cards. It's great - but I'm needing funding just to keep up with volunteer enthusiasm. Some of my Substack readers have asked for more cards (perhaps you are among them!). Unfortunately, for the past three weeks, each time I get a shipment and make a few stops to deliver, they get gone - fast!
The buzz from the volunteers is amazing.
Could we do this by Direct Mail? Yes, we could. But it would cut out the very important person-to-person touch of one voter adding a "get out the vote" message to a campaign card to another voter. A single volunteer is empowered to reach 160 voters within about an hour. The volunteers are energized. They are having parties. They are feeling connected. They like the idea that they are doing something to help the campaign.
My phone, text, email, and Facebook messenger channels are constantly filled with requests for more. I'm telling you. There is some kind of magic in these cards. People like to feel like they are participating in the effort to change the course of the election.
So please, can you help us handle the costs?
**What have we done so far?**
Our campaign, which spans 15 counties and over 15,000 square miles in rural upstate New York has sent out 108,500 post cards, distributed 245 yard signs and 250 bumper magnets, handed out around 1,650 campaign pins, put 6500 door knocker/palm cards in the hands of volunteers, marched in 7 parades, and we have a growing mass of 82 volunteers (quite possibly more), in addition to the the various county committee volunteers.
We have knocked on doors in 4 towns/cities so far. More volunteers are gearing up for neighbor-to-neighbor conversations through door knocking and phone calling.
We have had media coverage in the Adirondack Daily Enterprise, the NY Post, the Watertown Daily Times, the Rome Sentinal North Country Now/NNY360, the Malone Telegram, Talk Radio WATN Glen Curry Live at Five Talk Radio, WATN Noon Show with Former Mayor Jeffrey Graham, FOX News, WNYC's Brian Lehrer Show, WVMT Radio Kurth Wright Show, WAMC Plattsburgh television, North Country Public Radio.
We have visited 22 Town, Hamlet, or County Committee meetings.
Mileage on car around 45,000 and running.
Upcoming events - and this list is growing. Stay tuned for a BIG announcement in the next ten days or so.
Meanwhile:
**Mon., Sept 2** \-- IBEW Parade in Massena.
**Tuesday., Sept 3** \-- Town Hall with Joe Seeman at the VFW Hall in Broadalbin at 7pm. 19 Pine Street, Broadalbin NY.
**Wed., Sept 4** \--two events: 1) Zoom Fundraiser by St. Lawrence County Democrats at 6pm; 2) 7pm -- in person Fundraiser, organized by Jay Democrats, with Assembly Member Billy Jones in Wilmington. 7-9pm. Amos and Julia Ward Theatre, 15 Parkside Drive, Jay NY.
**Friday., Sept 6** \-- Fulton's Folly playing at AuSable Forks Free Library, 9 Church Lane, 6:30-8:30pm, 518-569-1303. Come out, listen to great music, and talk politics!
**Saturday, Sept 7** \-- Rome Honor Americas Parade. There is an Ice Cream Social afterward from 4-6. Mmmmm!
**Sunday., Sept 8** \-- Private Fundraiser in Ticonderoga.
**Monday., Sept 9** \-- Warren County Dem Committee Meeting at Ft. William Henry Hotel in Lake George. 48 Canada Street, Lake George, NY. 7pm. Email for details.
**Tuesday, Sept 10** \-- Presidential Watch Party in Saranac Lake. Our contact is David Lynch, of the Saranack Lake Democrats. The Garagery (53 Main St, Saranac Lake) from 8-11 PM
**Thurs. Sept 12** \-- Fulton County Senior Picnic, same place as above at the Johnstown Senior Center. 9am til around 11.
**Fri., Sept 13** \-- Press "sit down" at 11 in Plattsburgh at 1 Sesame Street.
**Mon., Sept 16** \-- Hang on for final confirmation. We are in the process of arranging for an event at Moe's Pub and Gill, 3357 SR 11 in Malone, NY.
**Tuesday Sept 17** \-- we have reserved the community room in Potsdam, 38 Main Street, 6:30pm.
**Wed., Sept 18** \--Video message to a Labor Council Meeting in Plattsburgh. Also that night: Public Town Hall at 7pm at Tannery Pond, located at at 228 Main St, North Creek, NY 12853
**Fri., Sept 20** \-- Town of Moreau -- Desserts and Dems
**Sat., Sept 21** \-- 1106 Lowville Cream Cheese Festival
**Sun., Sept 22** \-- 2pm Washington County Project 2025 Rally on Zoom.
More events will be posted soon. Keep in touch!
**Keep the following in mind:**
We have one way to lose and three ways to win this campaign.
We can lose if we believe the nay-sayers, decide the race is unwinnable, and cave in to the pressure to throw our resources to the five targeted NY races plus the top of the ticket. I'm not saying people should not support these other races; I'm just saying that the race in NY-21 is vitally important because we really have the votes needed to beat the 3rd-ranked House Republican.
We have three ways to win: First, we win the old-fashioned way, by getting more votes than our opponent. Second, we win by getting more votes than other Democratic candidates have gotten since 2014, when Stefanik sprang onto the scene. Even if we don't turn NY-21 blue, we could at least make it a little more purple. Third, we win by getting our fundraising, organization, and volunteer support in order. Regardless of how things turn out on November 5, the race for the midterms starts on November 6, 2024.
My team and I are dedicated to winning in at least one of the three ways stated above. It is my great honor to be a candidate in the race for Congress in NY-21.
Not only that, it's joyful down here in the trenches in this down-ballot race.
We're not going back.
And what's that Kamala Harris always says? "When we fight, we win."
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..SuHcFnutNKSa5B6S1EPp5LsPBoYURMUqulGcq5wH6dA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=148387796)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 9/01/2024
body:
This is the Sunday news digest for September 1st, 2024.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**September 1, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | This is the Sunday news digest for September 1st, 2024.
Warm regards,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **STATE**
---
**[SORENSEN: From barn to ballot, Young Republicans stoke the fire at ‘Teddy Roastavelt’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) On Saturday, August 17th, one of the newest grassroots organizations, the El
Paso County Young Republicans, revived an old GOP tradition called the “Teddy
Roastavelt,” as a call back to the more successful days of the party and a promise to write a new energetic chapter in local Republican politics.
**[Colorado voters to decide on ranked-choice voting system, all-candidate primaries](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Secretary of State also approves Peace Officer Training and Support Fund for November ballot.
**[Colorado Gov. Jared Polis dismisses migrant gang takeover of apartments as ‘imagination’ — despite video, mayor confirming truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [NEW YORK POST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Gov. Jared Polis dismissed anger over Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua taking over apartment buildings in the Denver suburb of Aurora, calling it “imagination” — despite video footage, police reports and the city’s mayor confirming it’s happening.
**[Evans tours southern border near El Paso, criticizes that Caraveo has not](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Gabe Evans, the Republican nominee for the 8th District seat in the U.S. House, visited the southern border near El Paso on Thursday.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Walz says he lied about going to war because he struggles with grammar](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE FEDERALIST ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Kamala Harris and her running mate sat down with CNN’s Dana Bash for their first semi-substantive interview since Joe Biden’s political wake.
**[Harris Backtracks on 2020 Commitments in First Interview as Dem Candidate — but Can’t Explain Why](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [NATIONAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Vice President Kamala Harris addressed several high-profile flip-flops Thursday night in her first sit-down interview since ascending to the top of the Democratic ticket — but failed to explain exactly why she’s backed away from the progressive positions she staked out during her primary run four years ago.
**[Liberal NBC reporter calls out Kamala Harris for saying her ‘values haven’t changed’: ‘Her positions have changed’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In the first 48 hours following Kamala Harris’ launch of her Presidential campaign, she reportedly raised more than $100 million dollars, a record for any Presidential campaign in history.
**[RNC scores election law victories in these swing states. Here’s what that could mean in November](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Republican National Committee this week filed election-related lawsuits in Michigan and North Carolina, coming off a Supreme Court victory last week over election procedures in Arizona.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Mesa County is filing a lawsuit against the State of Colorado regarding House Bill 24-1413](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [MESA COUNTY NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Through the County Attorney’s Office and in alliance with several other counties, Mesa County is filing a lawsuit against the State of Colorado and Jared S. Polis, in his official capacity as Governor of Colorado, seeking:
**[‘It’s challenging’: Why some Denver restaurant owners are looking to expand business elsewhere](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) While many Denver restaurants have closed their doors over the past year, some restaurant owners are taking their businesses elsewhere or expanding outside the city limits.
**[End of an era marked at Colorado Springs’ Martin Drake Power Plant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [KXRM-TV](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) After less than two years of demolition work, the former Martin Drake Power Plant (Drake) has been taken to ground level, marking a dramatic change in the city’s skyline for the first time in 100 years.
**[Speeding? In Fort Collins, it may not be a police officer who issues you a citation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The City of Fort Collins will soon begin issuing citations for people caught speeding through intersections with traffic cameras.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Smrz: Venezuelan Gang Expands In Denver](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Denver is facing an unprecedented threat as the Venezuelan criminal gang Tren de Aragua (TDA) expands its operations into the city. Notorious for its involvement in extortion, kidnapping, and murder, TDA has given its members a “green light” to attack and open fire on Denver police officers, sparking serious concerns about the safety of the city._
**[Sloan: RFK Jr.’s Trump endorsement redefines the Kennedy legacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _We have discovered, over these last few months, that even the surname “Kennedy” is no longer adequate insulation against the ire of the current Democratic Party. Stalwart party loyalists and an unsympathetic media never much cared for Robert F. Kennedy Jr’s quixotic attempt to unseat President Biden anyway, but his withdrawal from the race and subsequent endorsement of Donald Trump proved almost too much for some of the more hysteria-prone out there._
**[Justice: How the left’s neglect of personal health pushed RFK Jr. to leave the Democratic Party](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The left’s politicization of health and fitness drove would-be leftist voters into a dissident ecosystem receptive to Kennedy’s message._
**[Olohan: Harris plays coy on child gender transitions, but far-left groups endorsing child sex changes have her back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Democratic presidential nominee Kamala Harris has avoided addressing whether she supports transgender surgeries for minors—a far-left position that most Americans do not support. Yet a number of LGBTQ groups that endorse attempted gender transition procedures for children are eagerly backing Harris and her running mate Tim Walz._
_**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** Warren G. Harding **lost the White House china in a poker game.**
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Freedom is a gift bestowed on us by our forefathers."
\- Charlie Kirk
|
---

[SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|

No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: [https://rmv.nucleuspages.com/landing/subscribe](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat! | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? name: Sherrod (personal)
subject: our deadline was extended – but only until midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I know I already reached out, but I needed to personally ask for your help before midnight tonight. **We just fell short of our end-of-month fundraising goal, and we need to get back on track ASAP******.** **
Here's why: Now that it's September, we've truly entered the homestretch of this election. The GOP is spending record-breaking amounts to flood the airwaves with attack ads against me – and our team is working around the clock to set the record straight and get our pro-worker message out to millions of voters.

**It might be hard to believe, but the resources we raise _now_ – not in November – will have the biggest impact on our ability to win this race. That's why hitting our fundraising goals is so important and why falling short would be so costly.**
This is going to be, without a doubt, my toughest election yet. I'm up against a Trump-backed, self-funding millionaire, Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs, and the full weight of the GOP. **So I'm asking: Are you with me? **

**[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in now to help us get back on track so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91994912/495672517/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2695-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWIwOGIzYy1jMzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A830jsO2CNAMhAq66ewGmUhDaWh7HiNqft9O0gQiI9w=)**

name: Diane Sare
subject: Sare-Vega Monday Night with Norm Finkelstein
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240902_zoom&n=1)
---
Friend -- Monday night, we'll be joined again by author and activist Norm Finkelstein, as well as other experts on the current military/strategic situation. Since the NATO-backed Ukrainian invasion of Kursk, Russia is moving more rapidly to achieve its objectives militarily, since Ukraine has made it clear there is no interest in a negotiated end to that conflict. The Ukrainian Defense Minister traveled to Washington, DC to meet with American Defense Secretary, Raytheon's Lloyd Austin, probably to plan which targets to strike deep within Russia in an escalating nuclear chicken game. Meanwhile, Israel has expanded its ethnic cleansing program, killing over 20 Palestians in the West Bank, while continuing to starve and bomb desperate civilians in Gaza. In Friday's International Peace Coalition call, Helga Zepp-LaRouche reminded everyone about the principles of the Treaty of Westphalia -- that warring factions decided for the sake of future generations that they had to let go of revenge, and work instead for the benefit of the other. She asserted that mankind is capable of acting according to reason and justice, especially if we can unite for a positive solution based on universal principles . This is what we must mobilize to do, before it's too late! RSVP for Monday and please download, print, and circulate my Labor Day statement at events in your area tomorrow. | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/sare_vega_and_friends?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240902_zoom&n=2 "RSVP for Zoom Link for Mon. 8:30 pm") [RSVP for Zoom Link for Mon. 8:30 pm](https://www.sareforsenate.com/sare_vega_and_friends?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240902_zoom&n=2)

---
| | [SIGN HERE TO DEMAND JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS AND SAMUEL ALITO BE IMPEACHED »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/Impeach_Thomas_Alito?source=FFR_20240901_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21976%2E4449941%2EHxTHQe)
---
_The Supreme Court is the highest court in the land. If we can’t trust their impartiality, our democracy won’t survive._
**HERE’S THE BAD NEWS:** Despite Justices Alito and Thomas being too biased to rule impartially on Trump’s case, they refused to recuse themselves **and gave him full immunity for official acts.**

**THE GOOD NEWS:** We can still hold them accountable – by impeaching them from the Court!
**[__**Don’t just stand by idly, folks: Sign our petition NOW to demand that Justice Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito be impeached for their numerous scandals and allegations of impartiality »**__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/Impeach_Thomas_Alito?source=FFR_20240901_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21976%2E4449941%2EHxTHQe)**

Our next fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and we’re still very short of our $35,000 goal and what we need to send Boebert packing in November. We know $1 might not seem like a lot – and that’s because it’s not. But combined with thousands of other grassroots donors chipping in, your $1 has enormous impact. $1 lets Trisha fill up the tank as she drives across the district, meeting with Democratic, Independent, and even Republican voters who are fed up with Lauren Boebert. $1 lets us invest in staff and the critical resources it takes to build a winning campaign. $1 lets us fight back against the Super PAC lies and hold Boebert accountable. And $1 lets us take the lead in this race that could decide whether Democrats or Republicans control the House for the next 2 years. **If everyone reading this chips in just $1, we will hit our fundraising goal and send Lauren Boebert packing once and for all in November. But Trisha is counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if she’s going to win and flip this seat blue:** **[Please, will you chip in $1 right now to Trisha Calvarese’s campaign – more if you can afford it! – to help defeat Lauren Boebert, turn this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats in 2024?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyw4za-nqQiG3Di8GpzPWRINJrw7oJvqVZ0n-xwjfozep8LAg0BmtGn0vryTqmOSKeE7U0iziC2QW4Qk0Axv1w8yyD8X8Svu5BlKsXBxc6FI_NxTUVlGT-voRKoD2wjYB_Oni_yxJ2NfRLH5MVNpTIMPQ5PC71yTx88vFnKvoop1WGmxraDpcABbas8id8Plf7f3UIcxZbIVgC_sbmd0NDJsbNz53Is3eLlKciE4ewsBmus1Q65WKclcYdrkTspqGgVfobk_7U_wn5zHqFRqEfEYOgbx94T7z3Mli6-iy1vakk18pUlO2YOABr7FuAh0cYZwGVP_cEVv4aDuYJLJ14Hla6MD0i_fv5evnl5H2kQFZCHvXMph7wsTR_Rxa69b5s/49f/fK7rXPlfSpuQF_LGlN5I3g/h2/h001.YCBG3vDNjTRtW2SQshGuFc_Pfa9vKqI053N6pZ3G_28)** _Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue:_ | | | **[DONATE $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyw4za-nqQiG3Di8GpzPWRINJrw7oJvqVZ0n-xwjfozep8LAg0BmtGn0vryTqmOSKeE7U0iziC2QW4Qk0Axv1w8yyD8X8Svu5BlKsXBxc6FI_NxTUVlGT-voRKoD2wjYB_Oni_yxJ2NfRLH5MVNpTIMcvTrsJao8KhzFcGnCU-PDeGifDqAjwFBIvcr6L6f5YCG4d9rkt1qTEI9T8ArGnC9ICisH3fj-1lrJWTDr-144_mLw4ju4quHKUCXM6g3Wt1J6TsxC4qdOKuc1mtSEuV2C-QpvASUrQEcLGS7Q0pS1GQmhzVoweU1XFzdhudzDQZ20axnIJFS3dybjKtL1aUR4YXGbgQGsFpiZnhZe9VPqlksacpLRlpQaQvl-qeD_c4/49f/fK7rXPlfSpuQF_LGlN5I3g/h3/h001.s-ipiq8WrAV3jFTBoTTJE7E1c4S7CsiUsah9EXhmRHY)**

body:
We need to step up for Kamala Harris and Tim Walz
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/endorse-harris?source=VPP_20240901_EMPET_E7_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=16570%2E878179%2EYHFjGf) | [ENDORSE THE HARRIS-WALZ TICKET: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/endorse-harris?source=VPP_20240901_EMPET_E7_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=16570%2E878179%2EYHFjGf)
---
**FIRST:** Kamala Harris announced her run for President, immediately DESTROYING Donald Trump’s months-long polling lead! _YES!_

**THEN:** She picked INCREDIBLE Democrat Tim Walz to be her running mate!

**BUT NOW:** Trump is launching attacks to bring our progress to a _screeching halt_ ... so we need to demonstrate MASSIVE support for the Harris-Walz ticket!
[**Team, help us send the GOP a message that our momentum is here for the long run: Join 199 local Democrats in endorsing the Harris-Walz ticket now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/endorse-harris?source=VPP_20240901_EMPET_E7_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=16570%2E878179%2EYHFjGf)

---
***THIS PETITION CLOSES AT 12AM***
Don't delay,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16570%2E878179%2EYHFjGf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16570%2E878179%2EYHFjGf).**

You know what's going to happen next? | | |

Peter, the Democratic National Convention is now over. _You know what's going to happen next?_ Trump will try to suck up all of the oxygen, reset the narrative, and crush our momentum. He will spin wild conspiracy theories, and his billionaire backers will embolden him. _That's why we can't slow down._ As Kamala says, we're a people-powered campaign. And when we fight, we win. **It's critical that we have enough resources on hand at this very moment to keep our message front and center.** [Please don't ignore this request, Peter: Will you pitch in $25 or even more to support the Harris-Walz campaign by midnight and help us hit our end-of-month goal? ](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAl8LNohi49U_cXelCpDCLkmQiJaNmvfThMHhPM-mUkyjWepsYVZuhPN5yFOteXPwr3p2ha4a8t7mj6qRozEV6dX7ZYVaqB3wMhnnbdkN0EGKwAKZ7ypqln8J03x7vNWIG21c03KJd55Ji56RsDO9eT-jzA-OB0FnxIyHloUmff67N0UpuTNF0aQnRRAigyUe7SuerSXh6OT-p278cDTS8PYbrPMOnUrpnLpQKSrbmIqJQ4nxFkwnfq5pAxBVXg4UTpjAGs7_0PgKh8wl_7q6wTjFhYpf87bDAVzIGIfG4Qgx1NWTYX6eA3gerZCiadIEcBqH1i0iPwTml0OkOIyfp8beSZ2Fj8Wt1mKLWcbr9H18-vgpXIga4ieeiAZDD2fn4tPXkRb8Y-hUYOU7czXATirBFkJndKVTJ1fit6XZUTqk_UdEMLD_Ivu20uUggZExNUIE9CTDwCPHifA1ATXKopyjdW3NmAZqVaGa8YQFWUnG83nI0ovI2ATwKXLGVTDS25mX1095jPnzYFyW8xFu5PrH3RiRr7rnknzz2aZz9KO05dEPupcUPZG-JQZ0aiL_jKk-rrQnxxAXeBE7DgYqDmssx4hKnLz4KuR3ezYROTf-PurA4qjYvU36jrvbIcIWPyqFiisgaTnqG7mn-nMOY6w/49f/U_FOWV4sSBOvGLX22HeNaQ/h0/h001.FINzgfVMNG9HMQoWy9Z9DltY8ey6gA-vSTTglPGCubE) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: You’re clearly a thoughtful conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s why I need to know: Are you still with us?

Friend,

After personally reviewing it, I want you to know that I was truly impressed by your original submission to the GOP's Voter Verification Questionnaire.

You are clearly a thoughtful conservative who understands exactly what's at stake in this election. _**[Your answer to question #18 could not have been more on point!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvvt0v1q7t4cgsfk9ogef9eh3s6b0anr318j6e68_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)**_
** **

[18\. Which issue concerns you the most before the 2024 election?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zosqqm3p2d694kpc0i7va237f19dvmcot8dcm988_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)
---

But here's the thing - since you first completed our questionnaire, the world has no doubt changed...

Kamala and the Radical Democrats like my opponent in Texas are outraising and outspending us left and right. They're drowning us out with lying attacks. They've **[TIED](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4ej86ndfbklvinbbi8vp94a5eafl42j7v4h0g2o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)** this election. _And we can 't simply sit on our hands and play defense._

[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlvmhadfvepngskemphm1indlb34pp7vda98ab30_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)

---

**[Now is the time to go on the __offensive.__ Now is the time to ensure we OUT-REGISTER the Democrats with just DAYS to go before early voting begins!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zirtd188cd6tnq6vtj6r79b8ci9ejl57veg73jk8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)**

So, in this final stretch, I have to reach out one last time to confirm:

**_[Are _YOU_ still with us?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7bo15kkscdpoo9rqov3rau35vh28u6lfspl43m8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)_**

********************************************************[NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8c4r9ad9ik15bmk749018g9tdak0jtd88iuns50_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)********************************************************

**[Please follow your *personalized* link below to submit your responses by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT and CONFIRM your 2024 Voter Verification Questionnaire:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlqn67h477vuuqvbof21co7vohie7ddnlme82vo8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)**

**[VoterVerification/pending/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmerskd1che5b361hn4os1u0k0hjrlbl46hvjv6g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm2o32c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Harris delivers mind-numbing response after being caught in this White House scandal
body:
DAILY NEWS | September 02, 2024

Harris delivers
mind-numbing response after being caught in this White House
scandal
Kamala Harris
is in every way a radical Leftist. But she doesn't even seem to
care that her ideologies are extreme.

And Harris delivers a
mind-numbing response after being caught in this White House
scandal.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Tim Walz falls flat on his
face during abysmal CNN interview

Gov. Walz is supposed
to do all he can to make the Harris ticket look good. But
unsurprisingly, he isn't able to accomplish that.
➞ Continue Reading

New video reveals Nancy
Pelosi's unhinged threat against Donald Trump

Trump derangement
syndrome is alive and well. The Left wants nothing more than for
Trump to disappear.
➞ Continue Reading

Early election victory for
the GOP has the Harris campaign at their wits' end

Republicans are
grinning ear to ear after hearing this news. They have positive
momentum heading into election day.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

personal information we may collect about you, including across

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8lebsj6bnl506suo3jujqitcf75439e2tiq7sqo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5htsgbcar2u1b0aqftqito6krmuhbtqmkeiub3o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0cjh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs82i7i2g4t4hqu61lu88gvdpe0r42bku3cvdci8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0cjh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zujdtdki8q1rqnhg7kjnhbgm0skgeqvhrnm3bnvo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0cjh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs0nvjbhbiquq6cg8ul8j1hi4ipi97nnra2l9m88_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj2cthm0pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbfjnta6rm2ml8ba4a8qq0j00ed3fv4u7rctcmpg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0cjh2bs)_

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: One of my favorite quotes from the Lord of the Rings
body:
There's a lot to be worried about with education.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za5a6s81haees7ecjosh79n3i3soek2ssjitamig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs) Friend,

There's a lot to be worried about with education.
* Schools are putting more emphasis on social justice than education
* More young people than ever prefer socialism over capitalism
* Students aren’t learning important lessons about economics in schools

But I'm reminded of this exchange in The Lord of the Rings, in which Frodo expresses his burden and despair regarding the responsibility of carrying the One Ring.
_"I wish it need not have happened in my time,"_ said Frodo. _"So do I,"_ said Gandalf, _"and so do all who live to see such times. But that is not for them to decide. All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us."_
**It’s our burden to figure out how we can defeat socialism in education and liberate children from indoctrination.**

If you’re wondering how we can change our country's future and prevent further economic disasters from getting worse, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has a solution.

Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, goes into classrooms across the country to teach the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society to the next generation.

[Please join us in equipping the rising generation with the foundational principles of free markets and liberty by clicking any button below.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4buggdc678sioia7bogku7tudb79ecst4588gr0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhgmc5v8r1a48u9p2r756uemb080p1c7vrlc0ph8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

[Donate $25](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0o8fogl3ob407frlqs43grg39sfmvpr8j7glsh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgqbafapr43mit9v9adlet7k2kpe92aqlk0dtmo8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf3la2sg6eq45bugbea6mtpqtr2gc51nu9v2duu0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3th3jrnb584mq0n98fugfg6nfug8da1f3tgu9fg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd3f5j34isa76mhr55bhrcg1lugtmmjieraes5vg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk37le4f2pa4beo08vsiagve3f939krt0aunoj7o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)
FEE in the Classroom works with high schools, colleges, youth groups, home school pods, and other educational institutions to provide students with top-quality instruction from our experienced and engaging experts.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk2fphhmjkd426o43ea47l88m2d250bfs7qufj78_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)
This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

FEE in the Classroom challenges socialism in education by making the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the next generation.

[Plus, when you donate $10 or more today, we’ll send you a digital copy of Fredrick Bastiat’s timeless classic, _The Law_.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc0vku2g8bovcgk01apudri0odghq7ul5j94vmu0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)

You can help me teach the next generation about these important principles and get a digital copy of The Law for yourself by clicking below!
[Donate and Get Your Digital Copy of _The Law_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf2obvvg34ggjdgi8qnfikciairca7njjbc9r9vo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hmeor0c3h2bs)
Thank you,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus, Humphreys Family Senior Fellow, and Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I never thought it would come to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You haven’t completed your Every Voter Canvass yet.

|
---
| | |
I'm worried about you.

**The team at House GOP HQ just told me you haven 't completed your Every Voter Canvass.** I knew I had to reach out and see what's going on.

Will you take a minute and complete your Every Voter Canvass for me? It'll only take a minute.

---

---
| |
**CANVASS ID: [Q26YR7](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr4ncd30jub3cka35ehlqs1vdtsuj1ijsli6v390_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm9ob1c1h2bs "%%=v\(@sZipCode\)=%%-Q26YR7")

---

The Harris-Walz Socialist Dream ticket is doing everything it can to defeat House Republicans - _**we NEED to make sure we have ALL of our ducks in a row heading into Election Day.**_

---
| | | [COMPLETE EVERY VOTER CANVASS](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrv0aljargh8eab477dhj78qv6fn37gln7b6ifm0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9hm9ob1c1h2bs "Generic Button")

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdrk1gfkr10n02vdc2k62onou1gktne8j0i3hc70_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm0pj2c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqco58sbfatpuh136gioh2hnacdtfvdnnbbnf2a8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm0pj2c9h2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb0konp6gb57mohl21kagbofinns86jujctop2qo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm0pj2c9h2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsvr7pgud2qtocfkengo9fdutfof491gs5guspdg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm0pj2c9h2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

American Defense News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgfsj2tv5cnjcto0sr7gnlb7e5ug5olvqtteeba0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj2cthm8p3246h22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm0pj2c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zemfoqvksbk0d38rhg60n6u39abmu320nfg3gri0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm0pj2c9h2bs)_

name: CRITICAL 2024 UPDATE [From House Republicans]
subject: we want to let you in on this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If we can do every single one of these things before and on Election Day, we’ll have the resources to help usher in a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE VICTORY!

| |

---
| | | __FIRST:__ House Republicans passed the SAVE Act to require proof of citizenship.

__THEN:__ The Republican National Committee announced its strong plan to help protect the vote

__NOW:____ Texas and Ohio are removing THOUSANDS of non-citizens from state voter rolls ahead of the 2024 General Election!

**_[On top of that, House Republicans are laying the groundwork RIGHT NOW to protect your vote. Here's our plan to make this the most secure election in American history:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8pv6lteksqfim987921e6bj8ndgpdfqbhvm2to_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm8oj6cjh2bs "On top of that, House Republicans are laying the groundwork RIGHT NOW to protect your vote. Here’s our plan to make this the most secure election in American history:")_**
**1.** We _must_ prevent non-citizens from voting in our elections **2.** We _must_ enforce voter ID and signature verification laws **3.** We _must_ recruit a poll-watching army of our own **4.** We _must_ rally early voters to return their ballots on time **5.** We _must_ make it easier to vote but harder to cheat
If we can do every single one of these things before and on Election Day, we'll have what it takes to help usher in a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE VICTORY! But it will take a strong House Majority to make sure we can do this in the 2024 election and beyond.

_We 're less than 10 weeks from Election Day so we're left with no choice but to ask you to pitch in 10 or 15 bucks to help us put our plan into full swing:_

---
| | | [PITCH IN $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdsd03dmcec9hjso6gauegbuco7on25a6qno9l0o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm8oj6cjh2bs "PITCH IN $10")

---

We know Conservatives are WINNING on the issues.

We know Conservatives have the STRONGEST candidates on the ballot.

And we know Conservatives have what it takes to SAVE the House, RETAKE the Senate, and SEND President Trump back to the White House.

**_[Your contribution right here and now will help us make sure we can save and expand our Conservative House Majority on 11/05/2024.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsngl8nkqstv7jitn3pnesvvoqjdflfvuoi6h42g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm8oj6cjh2bs "Your contribution right here and now will help us make sure we can save and expand our Conservative House Majority on 11/05/2024.")_**

House Republicans

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: "I wish it need not have happened in my time," said Frodo
body:
There's a lot to be worried about with education.

|
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc1un4m4at8mg28jn69dva56g7tq2h59hj4391ig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jmcp70cth2bs) Friend,

There's a lot to be worried about with education.
* Schools are putting more emphasis on social justice than education
* More young people than ever prefer socialism over capitalism
* Students aren’t learning important lessons about economics in schools

But I'm reminded of this exchange in The Lord of the Rings, in which Frodo expresses his burden and despair regarding the responsibility of carrying the One Ring.
_"I wish it need not have happened in my time,"_ said Frodo. _"So do I,"_ said Gandalf, _"and so do all who live to see such times. But that is not for them to decide. All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us."_
**It’s our burden to figure out how we can defeat socialism in education and liberate children from indoctrination.**

If you’re wondering how we can change our country's future and prevent further economic disasters from getting worse, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has a solution.

Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, goes into classrooms across the country to teach the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society to the next generation.

[Please join us in equipping the rising generation with the foundational principles of free markets and liberty by clicking any button below.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6f2v8lfb3t4uimrsvaua448laflmj0o8ufptgog_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jmcp70cth2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeq2bffrv2027d78thsrgf7j8il1c67e0g79ho70_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jmcp70cth2bs)
FEE in the Classroom works with high schools, colleges, youth groups, home school pods, and other educational institutions to provide students with top-quality instruction from our experienced and engaging experts.
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0j2qb7a7emeb4pcvg4iqmehbcukgf4rsqvaktfg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jmcp70cth2bs)
This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

FEE in the Classroom challenges socialism in education by making the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the next generation.

[Plus, when you donate $10 or more today, we’ll send you a digital copy of Fredrick Bastiat’s timeless classic, _The Law_.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztp2q155ht53bgq60inonbj73toha29u3s8ac330_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jmcp70cth2bs)

clean_body: There's a lot to be worried about with education. | | | Friend, There's a lot to be worried about with education. Schools are putting more emphasis on social justice than education More young people than ever prefer socialism over capitalism Students aren’t learning important lessons about economics in schools But I'm reminded of this exchange in The Lord of the Rings, in which Frodo expresses his burden and despair regarding the responsibility of carrying the One Ring. "I wish it need not have happened in my time," said Frodo. "So do I," said Gandalf, "and so do all who live to see such times. But that is not for them to decide. All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us." It’s our burden to figure out how we can defeat socialism in education and liberate children from indoctrination.** If you’re wondering how we can change our country's future and prevent further economic disasters from getting worse, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has a solution. Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, goes into classrooms across the country to teach the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society to the next generation. FEE in the Classroom works with high schools, colleges, youth groups, home school pods, and other educational institutions to provide students with top-quality instruction from our experienced and engaging experts. This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government. name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zknkgdlrb0tbel240vd046r7t1v7qngu1bd7g5ko_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o76cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziur79dbtv7db9i2lqmvouc0uace4buoj1033mdo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o76cph2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrunu9an2f1aa6j9oj79i44mgrjiqnu9d0c0khh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o76cph2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv7r0fd7noohtrvuj4epodovdshid3ie47onqppo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o76cph2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Will Hild
subject: Survey: Do Americans Know Woke Agendas Are Overtaking Corporations?
body:
Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas

Dear Fellow Conservative, As someone who values our Constitution, your voice matters.That's why I'm inviting you to take part in our SCOTUS Approval Poll. This
| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhcpcq2ojekm3vm5khi97spe4d0m50gmrph1o2so_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o72cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Concerned American,

Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas when they are defeated at the ballot box. They can pressure businesses to go woke!

We exist to shine a light on the crazy excesses of the woke ideology invading businesses across America and then to fight back for you.

Did you know ... Gatorade is pushing men in women's sports by providing "Equity in Sports" resources?

These resources include reports and guidelines for schools, coaches. and sports leagues on how to get more biological males competing against young girls in sports.

We can't sit idly by. We invite you to participate in our Survey on Woke Companies, where you can share your views on what businesses should prioritize and who they should serve.

Your input will help us shout louder and land more rhetorical haymakers that embarrass woke companies and CEOs into retreat.

[Take the Survey Now](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z50kp2h45re6o5scl65vm52u7ilp1thuk5smbako_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o72cth2bs)

Let's tell corporate America:
* Woke agendas won't work!
* Put customers over progressive politicians!
* Make good products and good profits instead of progressive social change!

Let voters make policy through the voting booth and consumers make decisions with their pocket books instead of elites dictating woke ideology from BlackRock's boardrooms in NYC.

[https://consumersresearch.org/woke-companies-survey/](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zs56osdslvn6eg4udlllk73661e20m0b0hb02fko_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm2o72cth2bs)

Thank you for joining us in this fight for business to be business, consumers to get good products & service, and progressive elites' agendas to stay in their drum circle.

Sincerely,

Will Hild
Consumers' Research

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Your survey impressed me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are YOU still with us?

Friend,

After personally reviewing it, I want you to know that I was truly impressed by your original submission to the GOP's Voter Verification Questionnaire.

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Labor Day 2024
body:
Celebrating the spirit of Labor Day in the United States.
| | | | | |
---
| | | .
---
| | | |
# **Celebrating the Spirit of Labor Day**
---
| | | | folks, we are wishing you a happy Labor Day. Labor Day stands as a profound tribute to the contributions of American workers, honoring the labor movement that has shaped our nation's growth and prosperity. This federal holiday, celebrated on the first Monday of September, marks a significant chapter in our history, where the efforts of countless laborers laid the foundation for the achievements that define the United States today.
---
|
---
Emerging from the late 19th century, Labor Day was championed by trade unionists and labor movements, who envisioned a day dedicated to celebrating the dignity of work. The Central Labor Union and the Knights of Labor organized the first Labor Day parade in New York City, setting a precedent for future celebrations. In 1887, Oregon became the first state to recognize this day as a public holiday. By 1894, Labor Day had become a federal holiday, with thirty states officially recognizing its importance. As Labor Day approaches, it's a reminder of the enduring value of hard work and the significant strides made by those who came before. This day is not just a break from routine but a moment to reflect on the progress achieved through collective effort and determination. Thank you for joining us in this important celebration. Warmest regards, -The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

Here's our plan to make this the most secure election in American history:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yM-thQfF7EjUYWfw04pfrQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRouBoQP0TSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvbGV0LXlvdS1pbi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwOTAyX1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNTM4NDIwLTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwOTAyX1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNTM4NDIwLTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwOTAyJnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQwOTAyVwNzcGNCCmbPCHHVZljoIUdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "On top of that, House Republicans are laying the groundwork RIGHT NOW to protect your vote. If we can do every single one of these things before and on Election Day, we'll have what it takes to help usher in a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE VICTORY! But it will take a strong House Majority to make sure we can do this in the 2024 election and beyond.

body:
Friend, my team has emailed you about the fundraising deadline I'm facing on September 15th.

**[I'm not alone. Every single Republican Senator and Senate candidate is facing this deadline.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv1r2umf2e557ivdavorfaic9m880m1s8paudjhg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**

**[And for our nominees in battleground states, it could be a make or break moment.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaha24ela8cmt45tek9gih1upog7dtemtb09utvg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**

**[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between these candidates and my campaign ASAP.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgao2517cl5gughn6g72566sg2lk1emp1jeidbf8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**

_**[Tim Sheehy, who served as a Navy Seal,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb5a3bu8b31vihjff9ti3irelbornbjaich3lfto_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**_ is running in Montana against Jon Tester.

_**[Dave McCormick, a fellow Army veteran,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcd0do6pll2ae2hioqugqh70f6mlf71qjf7j0fe0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**_ is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey.

_**[Sam Brown, another fellow Army veteran,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0st8vbjn49v6kdhv7slc5sdhddkenn2t5ho6cj0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**_ is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen.

_**[Bernie Moreno, a proven business leader,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl0pnscsar6afajnn6cobr4udfe8c6clgvqrv4ig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**_ is running in Ohio against Sherrod Brown.

_**[And Kari Lake, a tough conservative who will put America first,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrgtno9d3n80mgm6376u62m0pjap817jm939ml9g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**_ is running in Arizona.

********************************************************[SPLIT A DONATION HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9tscqob50gr6ra25shn05man9uj86hmdgp72fmg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)************************************************** ******

If these tough conservatives win, it guarantees Republicans win the U.S. Senate.

And I need each of them there with me to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks, and to make America strong again.

**[A donation of any amount will go directly to their campaigns, and *any amount* will make a difference ahead of this critical marker.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb0gdbk44qnj9lt6oi6fqsndnrea9ctffm4jlic8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**

As I've also said before, if we don't win in November, we're done. So, if you can give at this time, don't wait. **[Help each of these tough conservatives before this deadline, and let's win in November.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrttteq9okqthlb6ul7gfkkfb6pkra33t5qkcjig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)**

In service,

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh1eua51vn495hksn1jnmdoqi09jl8cic8i6u5fo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1fq73019e4c068mgoti8mfj9204g8l6c8gu04t8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg77v4bagigpra4g5tb7igrg8ebll6mp7flc7n0o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm1ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

clean_body: King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others? Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King” examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel. | | This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The Democrats’ dirty tricks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The Left thinks they’ll get away with it...

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb7cv5ihdlilnpcekfk7ltglr0aqu1tmov1fmq6o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm9pj2cth2bs)

Friend - we can't kid ourselves; the Democrats have an endless bag of dirty tricks.

_Election Interference, witch hunts, smear campaigns, a propaganda machine in the mainstream media, and hundreds of millions of dollars from liberal mega donors like Soros to BUY the election ..._

As someone who's consistently been the target of the Left's schemes and attacks, believe me, we can't continue to simply play __defense.__

We need a Republican __offensive__ in 2024 to usher in the largest red wave in history!

**[And that all starts with ensuring we have the most up-to-date voter records humanly possible.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5sqpgov3tb8668jg7c5n0bji672gdt2qb8otea8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm9pj2cth2bs)**

Which is why I'm teaming up with my Republican friends in the Senate to ensure this vital task is seen through.

But I won't lie - it's headlines like __these__ that have me worried.
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpdag4c00csd59peh0bb5pvjs3kaaqv4ui86c35o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm9pj2cth2bs)**
Friend, as of our latest review, YOUR voter profile was still marked **["UNVERIFIED."](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrnc9dfhkb8olg4p903ku765r43pftrgppta6798_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm9pj2cth2bs)**

But I figured this had to be a mistake with a loyal conservative such as yourself...

**[So please, spare just a moment to submit your responses to the *personalized* link below by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT and complete the 2024 Voter Verification Questionnaire:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkcae8im049adr8edblookfsqu35lmjvnh8fu4po_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9jm9pj2cth2bs)**

Thank you,

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

subject: Kamala Harris's new agenda for first day as president will leave you scared beyond belief
body:
DAILY NEWS | September 02, 2024

Kamala Harris's new
agenda for first day as president will leave you scared beyond
belief
The vice
president is scheming. Her goal is to completely turn the country
on it's head.

And Kamala Harris's new agenda
for her first day as president will leave you scared beyond
belief.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Harris delivers
mind-numbing response after being caught in this White House
scandal

Kamala Harris is in
every way a radical Leftist. But she doesn't even seem to care
that her ideologies are extreme.
➞ Continue Reading

Tim Walz falls flat on his
face during abysmal CNN interview

Gov. Walz is supposed
to do all he can to make the Harris ticket look good. But
unsurprisingly, he isn't able to accomplish that.
➞ Continue Reading

New video reveals Nancy
Pelosi's unhinged threat against Donald Trump

Trump derangement
syndrome is alive and well. The Left wants nothing more than for
Trump to disappear.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

personal information we may collect about you, including across

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RiMwz-AViXo3i02KAPf0qg~~/AARclAA~/RgRouBl6P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RhdmlkLXN0b3J5LWR2ZD91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZGF2aWRfZHZkJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ3NE4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPAn_VZmfCZidSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RiMwz-AViXo3i02KAPf0qg~~/AARclAA~/RgRouBl6P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RhdmlkLXN0b3J5LWR2ZD91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZGF2aWRfZHZkJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ3NE4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPAn_VZmfCZidSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RiMwz-AViXo3i02KAPf0qg~~/AARclAA~/RgRouBl6P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RhdmlkLXN0b3J5LWR2ZD91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZGF2aWRfZHZkJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ3NE4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPAn_VZmfCZidSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

subject: The world has changed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s why I need to know: Are you still with us?

Friend,

After personally reviewing it, I want you to know that I was truly impressed by your original submission to the GOP's Voter Verification Questionnaire.

You are clearly a thoughtful conservative who understands exactly what's at stake in this election. _**[Your answer to question #18 could not have been more on point!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6efvrr50ovblbe7c6hljeb61bhntod416sses5g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)**_
** **

[18\. Which issue concerns you the most before the 2024 election?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl24gq9fqjsp1r78l2kcu4bgp866gttrh7qvnl1g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)
---

But here's the thing - since you first completed our questionnaire, the world has no doubt changed...

Kamala and the Radical Democrats like my opponent in Texas are outraising and outspending us left and right. They're drowning us out with lying attacks. They've **[TIED](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrh397ui2c5mrjlctthhcgvtaovv8pe7givtlgm8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)** this election. _And we can 't simply sit on our hands and play defense._

[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z21b7abkjpr0se1rti4p04at43kd6smf1o1bcej0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)

---

**[Now is the time to go on the __offensive.__ Now is the time to ensure we OUT-REGISTER the Democrats with just DAYS to go before early voting begins!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaaoude5296bn13qjpur9g6uagk196teeola60u8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)**

So, in this final stretch, I have to reach out one last time to confirm:

**_[Are _YOU_ still with us?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvjrn3hlb541sjgict5bvrjve89g1jt8ubtpv078_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)_**

********************************************************[NO](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeapi8t4gj6ett608jgrfsmh8s4nnj3e291o56r8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)********************************************************

**[Please follow your *personalized* link below to submit your responses by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT and CONFIRM your 2024 Voter Verification Questionnaire:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdr77eep8akb366qlqv8rum3ig8nqglhotvq22g0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)**

**[VoterVerification/pending/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo913ps8dkqgk3cguub7kbvnpt472boc3n8vitb8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4o30c3h2bs)**

Thank you,
