name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23af6f4285c74cf596a4d5ac1b5a4d57&_e=aFTxUmvreOYI_OMbQJ-zLmucBX1BFjvNee-QyrF9Bs7ldNHmg0PLS-RqCalJBdrTwT2S9bPUo1aHpLX-pQVUEVNwFHb8h6Du-Cu4eTUPA0hyYvTquEzCzd0kU3_ljWGWvb5k-dpM-DQO6yZDzdeC-BPFd36CRsds_Eh6Wk6khDqXlWIlsW89s7tgiBLdoq_bLiXUGhrsVvzo2YJD2FRu-JwnyBFbHxEt268lURc4lLgCBzns2urkLuCo16ZENP3befNuKgYAGZVL4uGfBh7TtMXVSIYhqD2l9LgajOx42CIOc2XLYxWoxA_RxiAyz8pW39PT93CifHL6saBxF1D1oYjeUBhhBYTUDJqCumkivDqsTk19CtDt1iYmhMt7Gq5uyFEnAO4b4dwBN9chJ-9I-8oGQmV4nWO5aymaZ8qVt14%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23af6f4285c74cf596a4d5ac1b5a4d57&_e=aFTxUmvreOYI_OMbQJ-zLmucBX1BFjvNee-QyrF9Bs7ldNHmg0PLS-RqCalJBdrTwT2S9bPUo1aHpLX-pQVUEVNwFHb8h6Du-Cu4eTUPA0hyYvTquEzCzd0kU3_ljWGWvb5k-dpM-DQO6yZDzdeC-BPFd36CRsds_Eh6Wk6khDqXlWIlsW89s7tgiBLdoq_bLiXUGhrsVvzo2YJD2FRu-JwnyBFbHxEt268lURc4lLgCBzns2urkLuCo16ZENP3bWuqFtYiGFshaSXPf0orVMTFbOORi7cIbryug4CNhheacBvfj7CKlPNjAJ91ESqzcm1TdSnatjYNNk5iD0yPce7ejpJpm7XtI7XsJTwiLKTvpAOVvitHeJpYd_Iwjd93DJbEnWKV3wR6j4GX3nvVWa7tJloB4u53Gfm4r7AhrJ3Y%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23af6f4285c74cf596a4d5ac1b5a4d57&_e=aFTxUmvreOYI_OMbQJ-zLmucBX1BFjvNee-QyrF9Bs7ldNHmg0PLS-RqCalJBdrTwT2S9bPUo1aHpLX-pQVUEVNwFHb8h6Du-Cu4eTUPA0hyYvTquEzCzd0kU3_ljWGWvb5k-dpM-DQO6yZDzdeC-BPFd36CRsds_Eh6Wk6khDqXlWIlsW89s7tgiBLdoq_bLiXUGhrsVvzo2YJD2FRu-JwnyBFbHxEt268lURc4lLgCBzns2urkLuCo16ZENP3bUQ0hRx1wRqsTwqr6OJqmvNbQWJI_CYvyUFXOGo3AGtqWZ8EUiJ1czr1Q-EY2Yg_shoFA2n0G9ajnj5uWyrFCtest-NxXx6ELsH8QhAnQXV1mvTswjZjaOqL9OjUwl2P7nzlDNvsSe9PhwYEj_IvSL5JaoIyKD26QzO8cnXwtsuY%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23af6f4285c74cf596a4d5ac1b5a4d57&_e=aFTxUmvreOYI_OMbQJ-zLmucBX1BFjvNee-QyrF9Bs7ldNHmg0PLS-RqCalJBdrTwT2S9bPUo1aHpLX-pQVUEVNwFHb8h6Du-Cu4eTUPA0hyYvTquEzCzd0kU3_ljWGWvb5k-dpM-DQO6yZDzdeC-BPFd36CRsds_Eh6Wk6khDqXlWIlsW89s7tgiBLdoq_bLiXUGhrsVvzo2YJD2FRu-JwnyBFbHxEt268lURc4lLgCBzns2urkLuCo16ZENP3b4Brgh6HrmFTKpk7FXiyLgzcGDQ1G4_UIACMdpxuI9zkIi6QViQP2V_Laa20AwuQaKbu3cCly177MkpSgcXeyhQtxyuvPAXj07Wez06olKfMtvPUYYEYjAbZ00_ozlZ9dSrMNXq-35C3oeCxCIMU8OySeeoZZBaMvU_PR0EgGxqg%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. | | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.” when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. | | | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,” along with the companion map today: Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Change the World in 47 Minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://dwhdqsbbb
body:
In just 60 seconds per day, you can help us spread our message. Big changes start with lots of people taking small, meaningful actions.
| | | |
---
# Change the World in 47 Minutes
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
Dear Peter,
Happy Labor Day! I'm happy to express my gratitude to the men and women working daily to support themselves and their families. As they labor away, they are building strong families, strong communities, and a strong nation. Here's a simple way for you to support our campaign. Each day, we add at least one post to our Facebook page. With over 10,000 friends and followers, if each of you, with an average of 50 friends, hits the "share" button below our post, we could reach a staggering 500,000 people every day. Your share could be the one that makes a difference! Think about it! Half a million people would receive our message every day. That would be huge! There are only 47 days remaining until early voting begins on October 19th. If you share a post each day, it will take just 47 minutes of your time. I promise this will be time well spent. It is easy to share a post. Here are the steps: 1. Go to our Facebook page at: [https://www.facebook.com/RobertsonforNV/](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014jxt8kWUFe7l9o2VzScsWp3rLRFrcICNj1U3WfoxY7plqe8947_XjMFL4riShR5ZO4sRLiSvRjb9UxIGXy_HMs1ORV8HAYojKaSVKPoYn27VEC0zE_ANaHYAeSg0wwzqzEZSFccJ0LvC2b9altBG_8VrNo653KoYrR1gJZ0rv85RaeV684rq7w==&c=aP9RMO5ntzzVglQrlYyWiLcjN67vSWk0dQg7Av8LtGgdWFLDUTJYMw==&ch=Gk9ExHwUf0OcDQQS8Hohsm99AsB3D8PtXbec-RuFmqwve1vF-2w3sQ==) 2. Choose one or two of the posts we've made 3. Hit the "share" arrow below the post. 4. Write a quick comment. (For example, I'm supporting Mark Robertson for Congress) 5. Bookmark our Facebook page so you can quickly return the next day. That's it. With your help, many people will learn who I am and hopefully vote for me. Before I go, there is one more easy thing you can do to help get my name in front of people. We have magnetic bumper stickers that you can put on your car. They do not hurt the paint and are easy to put on and remove. If you want a bumper sticker, respond to this email with your address, and someone will deliver one to your door. Thanks for your support! Enjoy Labor Day! Mark *******
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: When you consider your views on a wide range of issues from economic and social matters to foreign policy and religious liberty, how would you describe yourself?
A: Very conservative, but not extreme. Our nation's founders created a system of checks and balances that require compromise. Indeed, our very nation was born from compromise. That being said, I will fight for conservative causes such as smaller government, securing the border, balancing the budget, parental rights, protecting children and seniors, 2nd Amendment, religious freedom, and a strong military.
Q: Do you support school choice, including voucher programs, tax credits, charter schools, private schools, and home schools.
A: Yes. Nevada public schools are failing our children. We consistently rank near the bottom in math, science, and reading. I have taught in public, private, and chartered schools. Competition among and between these schools will raise the performance of all. Education dollars should follow the child, and parents should have the option to choose the best school for their child.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81t94eti1mb3o69vs51m1qs4mogjhpgihts79ho_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4p74cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6uaqjoknib4f5gc9u9mu7jumhvidv9gni58mtb0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4p74cdh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3vipu1bpm380qobeqq2o889r5r3sb2gefeogh38_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4p74cdh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1cmqrc2tps9tu7a7m2h6opfkfknf6drei1e4h0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5c9ge4p74cdh2bs)**
---

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Explore these great works at home
body:
Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q65y8v355dQYEMKQGNU52Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRouCg-P0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY2xhc3NpYy1jaGlsZHJlbnMtbGl0ZXJhdHVyZS1kdmQtdG9kYXk_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNsYXNzaWNfY2hpbGRyZW5zX2xpdF9kdmQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ2Mk4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPLY3VZl4KSvBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **“Classic Children’s Literature.”** Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**“Classic Children’s Literature”**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q65y8v355dQYEMKQGNU52Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRouCg-P0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY2xhc3NpYy1jaGlsZHJlbnMtbGl0ZXJhdHVyZS1kdmQtdG9kYXk_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNsYXNzaWNfY2hpbGRyZW5zX2xpdF9kdmQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ2Mk4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPLY3VZl4KSvBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q65y8v355dQYEMKQGNU52Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRouCg-P0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY2xhc3NpYy1jaGlsZHJlbnMtbGl0ZXJhdHVyZS1kdmQtdG9kYXk_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNsYXNzaWNfY2hpbGRyZW5zX2xpdF9kdmQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ2Mk4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPLY3VZl4KSvBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q65y8v355dQYEMKQGNU52Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRouCg-P0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY2xhc3NpYy1jaGlsZHJlbnMtbGl0ZXJhdHVyZS1kdmQtdG9kYXk_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNsYXNzaWNfY2hpbGRyZW5zX2xpdF9kdmQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ2Mk4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPLY3VZl4KSvBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. **Get your DVD box-set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q65y8v355dQYEMKQGNU52Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRouCg-P0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY2xhc3NpYy1jaGlsZHJlbnMtbGl0ZXJhdHVyZS1kdmQtdG9kYXk_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNsYXNzaWNfY2hpbGRyZW5zX2xpdF9kdmQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDkwMiZzYz0wMDQ2Mk4wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTVwNzcGNCCmbPLY3VZl4KSvBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Beloved classics like The Wind in the Willows , Treasure Island , and The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live. | | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled “Classic Children’s Literature.” Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now! explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to Treasure Island and Winnie-the-Pooh , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike. | | | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link: And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as: Increasing the number of students taking free online courses. Growing the readership of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty. Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum. Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio. Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. Get your DVD box-set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link: Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The American Dream is alive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is a picture of my mom and my three sisters watching me speak at the DNC. My immigrant mother raised the four of us on a secretary’s salary.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34638562-9215-4672-bea1-4e4e0990464a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| The American Dream is alive, Peter. Just look: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88bae969-4993-4911-a35e-86eb222aba8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is a picture of my mom and my three sisters watching me speak at the DNC. My immigrant mother raised the four of us on a secretary’s salary. I worked any job I could get to support the family. I slept on the floor, on the couch, on a roll-out mattress. I got into Harvard with no money, no connections. I fought in Iraq. And now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Arizona. I believed it when I was a kid, and I believe it now: Anything is possible in the United States of America. But there is no denying that the American Dream feels out of reach for far too many. Kari Lake won’t fix that, and Trump won’t either. They’ll divide us further, cut taxes for their billionaire friends, and leave an economy that works for them — not working families, not the middle class. It is up to us to keep the American Dream alive — to defend it, to strengthen it. And the best way we can do that right now is by defeating Trump and Kari Lake. [So, I’m asking you to make a split donation to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today. Whatever you can afford. No donation is too small in a campaign as close as this one, and these add up fast when everyone is chipping in.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e0e339f-f55e-4f14-8499-0b595079a503/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td69e8497-ff42-4970-b6b6-6cae46423822/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Means the world to me that you’ve got my back. Semper Fi, Ruben

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2528cf18-c9da-471b-a076-2bbf47a0127b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Their rise and fall
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=975fc5d4c6004ed2b0eec18c4cd8eaed&_e=jzgD_sNf9XB1bDJ46oiVqeNcMoQHteTV0icpI12ojcmVyGC2nqW9C0-L4YPQ8tM45ckBKwY9deMQ7lXG3wNRlmYgrNDoVhNtE7kW7PVvi4xWOAabZ9NBKq92IdjihAri40uNu3b7cfQIN38PaXIWjcZb_ay51HsMr4IxUclpzAUz2V_cfM1jliyCa1DjUgLvbshG63BZFQCfuV8XdFRfiZ39z1gOVTXhamNDi-zF2bQeobeNSgM_ioDjBjh56bdM50V14swRdG0LiQckwjtQh0sqa6HDP1P4QEqUedHes2-SmYhguyz3ZhVxVE5T00jjsPMsNhDD6nuJovupggCUqRqyT8UEM2frNZCvxM36_sUOFXXWvH7bsu18LELIR4_XSfUc1hSSOS6EHWSNNPNs3F6FbG1vStahYdDNGhzjuGc%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=975fc5d4c6004ed2b0eec18c4cd8eaed&_e=jzgD_sNf9XB1bDJ46oiVqeNcMoQHteTV0icpI12ojcmVyGC2nqW9C0-L4YPQ8tM45ckBKwY9deMQ7lXG3wNRlmYgrNDoVhNtE7kW7PVvi4xWOAabZ9NBKq92IdjihAri40uNu3b7cfQIN38PaXIWjcZb_ay51HsMr4IxUclpzAUz2V_cfM1jliyCa1DjUgLvbshG63BZFQCfuV8XdFRfiZ39z1gOVTXhamNDi-zF2bQeobeNSgM_ioDjBjh56bdMWchlAhBAH8Y3se38Fl4RMTJFtJ_GdIU8_bHAA-juXTCxADV0KJH7wx44sQpCMJOTdffPfWhOU8ocSaMhXmTmoW0ZrDldy3wFsGx3uMbhi8mIMgQ-olWS77m9u0njXvWAhAY4ukVTXj_3_rA37uzflBgVKo6BAJd6A0xt2WfAYxY%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=975fc5d4c6004ed2b0eec18c4cd8eaed&_e=jzgD_sNf9XB1bDJ46oiVqeNcMoQHteTV0icpI12ojcmVyGC2nqW9C0-L4YPQ8tM45ckBKwY9deMQ7lXG3wNRlmYgrNDoVhNtE7kW7PVvi4xWOAabZ9NBKq92IdjihAri40uNu3b7cfQIN38PaXIWjcZb_ay51HsMr4IxUclpzAUz2V_cfM1jliyCa1DjUgLvbshG63BZFQCfuV8XdFRfiZ39z1gOVTXhamNDi-zF2bQeobeNSgM_ioDjBjh56bdMDNajFeabrAqNLgFFgpzzyVfDqNnnsVNIxXbacUnAuVI6ZmvrnCIeDIqmu22oNRRgZ1uw78S-EG6HT7OKOWVtL2u4vsKZMpoiwyLC8ZfRYZukwd1E-D9ntBeDuwdN3sfbAVR_hgnvo__Idtkg3er_xpooXg9aTR_lYU0iRi7xcmg%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=975fc5d4c6004ed2b0eec18c4cd8eaed&_e=jzgD_sNf9XB1bDJ46oiVqeNcMoQHteTV0icpI12ojcmVyGC2nqW9C0-L4YPQ8tM45ckBKwY9deMQ7lXG3wNRlmYgrNDoVhNtE7kW7PVvi4xWOAabZ9NBKq92IdjihAri40uNu3b7cfQIN38PaXIWjcZb_ay51HsMr4IxUclpzAUz2V_cfM1jliyCa1DjUgLvbshG63BZFQCfuV8XdFRfiZ39z1gOVTXhamNDi-zF2bQeobeNSgM_ioDjBjh56bdM0DATIDKSh1WblCDUHZDOCvCu0I5jjzgFjzGENpfHI2ersWSWOGjWde97RcB0HnhTd3s4t9VuONfCHK0TaEMJDEov5Z1mztKT93FdM77m88LF9rl4ivq90MtYRBDeABIr-gugbBQoH4jUMzt_8mFDPnhofJi64L-amk1YSsNXnz4%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

subject: Israeli Hostages Killed, Scheffler Wins $25 Million, and a French Fry Pileup
body:
Israel's military recovered the bodies of six Hamas-held hostages from a tunnel under the city of Rafah on Saturday. Among the victims was Israeli-American Hersh Goldberg-Polin.

| | |

# MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 2, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1901, Vice President Teddy Roosevelt gave a speech at the Minnesota State Fair that became famous for one line: ["Speak softly and carry a big stick; you will go far."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOhCAQgOGnwQ7DjihrQXGN3V57pUEYVm7RMTDR7Ntf7urr_-RPvq_H_HApp_356Ta0HGl2ntOJ8yhBgp51E2xEBOwatDcDPdx7MNCstjMGbyOGZYzDgnenggHdDahMF53vVJMsKNBqVHBTyoBqI8bl7vvQD0MfAEahFYbEVNpvSjuvGPObTiytp63JdmU-qug-BEwCpuu62g13djlmqvW3ETAdVLkKmHhFClRQFqKKJ2aW9UD3kpUi57d0e5DelfKWTi7pKSsn_2qKDceVck51MEKr5-ZS_pvzvxKnhZ8AAAD___HiYys) Today is Labor Day, traditionally marking the end of summer vacation. Let us know how you feel about your summer in our poll below, and we hope you enjoy the holiday!We're sponsored today by [OneSkin.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFPhTAQAOBf026PHEevwNDBQSafJg4aJ0Lp9XFa6As0GP-9ibM_4Bu-9-t4nSTJdnueVnYl5nGai5w89he8oBmNDi4yIzeaXd0iYUfYol4ckG1s0_loiUxtPUDPxAjkwXuwVotDQAM9YA3QIlSRo-9mCmQtBcReGeAgJe_VZ5atLBzTTz55r-a86uSWUu6Hah4UDgqHvPHxJVs1Z4XD8PTx8vb4qncX7t-Skhy2VQZu6yTpT5d_K6fD3wAAAP__5rhJaw) Check them out in today's edition.
|

## Israeli Protests Erupt Over Deaths of 6 Hostages
Israel's military recovered the bodies of six Hamas-held hostages from a tunnel under the city of Rafah on Saturday. Among the victims was [Israeli-American Hersh Goldberg-Polin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFzhCAUhH8Ndjr4ENGCIg3dpU3pvIOHkkG5AXLO5ddnTJMmzRa7X_HNftyWG4YYjvUdd9LVpwVtDU9a5hZaGJahcdoTAYmGdK9AwiRBQbPp8T4JNau5l9J6r_w0EYIAK4QXo7eqCRo4DHzm0HOugHee_H2y0slxlA5gZgMnF2rK3WcKR93Ix1d6Uu5s2puot1ofhYk3BoaBOc-z-ypYk8PXBTAwpab8YmAOOstFpBwdAxNKRorthjte9SXBwPD5iv5vx51ysHi0WyoVV2pdINeu-I0MjJJcTGrmnCsGpsnaPc4QYyijYgNfdwzx17L-e9lTw08AAAD__4jiazs).Thousands of devastated Israelis [took to the streets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71ugzAcB5_G3oLMD3_gwUMXtnTtiMD-O7gyOAIL2j59lc7dTjrppPu4j_cp5bQ93qeVXI1lnHxNJ432hhvkKHlwkQjUcXKtgUKvYMAXZ2eNGLTpJGxvg-0t-mi9UdJo0WrDk4OAFFagFcJANJHi3HsVlNYqAJZJQSHVsjefJW11oZi_y0l748vKs1tqfR6se2MYGIbrupp59i_HMGx0HQzDtNfkM73Q_5D6MrZT2ha-u_C8Us7p0IZJ8VinlP-q9d_F0-E3AAD__yjNUUQ), calling for Prime Minister Netanyahu to negotiate a hostage release deal with Hamas.Israel's largest labor union also [called for a general strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOGyEQgOGngQ4Lj2FhC4o02zltytUYBu8kGCwgPvntT3f11X_xS9-f635FLlzvv_FBYea2Y5z8on1VoMDsRqaQiYAuksLZgQVvwYE8QvKOVszxhs76DOg80hIB_WVZVmtAcgANRq8azlo70KdM-eajTXZZbAJYhdGUeLZ--tu4zoNyebcX9VNsD1nCMedziMsvAZuAbR50cClfTcD2bIXjW8DGdVKvOLlVLAI2463z3ikeHakMVfDWuvpfuVU1Zud_pI42Jt5JJcKiIuEglbmTgE32kJ4fXAqPxQmj7w_k76OcP9K8AnwGAAD__xjRZ2I) until a deal is reached. In response, Netanyahu stated he is committed to bringing the killers to justice and achieving a deal to release the remaining hostages. Officials said they reached the hostages [shortly after they were killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v8yAURn8N3ojItfnwwPAu3vKuHS0MF_tWGCKgafPvq1QdOz96jo7O2229OUqU9__uRNtjWZ3v9MB15sBhWqch2IgIOA5orxokGAkahsMqhdJsgFpPKIw2zmgzX413Ko6jkdtAFgRMYhZwFUKDuESMm_EySKVkAJjZJDBQL_XyXij3A2N6lgfWiy_nkOzR-72x8R-DhcHSDzwopdfGYLmXRP7JYKHcsWbXqWSXGCyTkVoZwalVh4lX9C9i41sJhI2XyBt98aO07nZsnLJPH4Hy_nsg7k6s5F1msAzVhvsnpURNaTaJ_XT0IzD0P0s9LHwHAAD__9ZPbLk) by Hamas. In response, Hamas blamed the deaths on Israel for refusing to sign a ceasefire deal.
## Lawsuit Claims Feds Hid Fluoride Study
A lawsuit claims federal officials [blocked the release of a 2022 government study](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskb2OnTAQhZ_GdL4yY34Likgs3a7SpUSOPYZJjI3McAlvH-1V0m37nfM15_x4n98NBYrLh9lwYJ9mY5meOPcSJFRzVbjBIwLqAoeyhRq6Gloo1gFL50FV2ncayrapO9eAV2VZ90p7qNuCBlBQqV5BqVQL6uHR_-xs7eqmqR1ALyqFjjjlx69EkVf04U5PzA-btiIMK_N-CP1NwCRguq7r4c3BNm27ifdnR8DUl2XbVX0lYPLhTJkcyoBPDIekKM94GI-SU-J1NwejZLPLyzBmGSj-Ric5yZAuzJIiYwi0YLQo7UrBZYzy4NPdMhqmFE2QnP6QTSEtt9xzWrLZhJ5O3uYNHZ2b0ONHYvJkX4KA5jM70pktCj1-P4813P-oTZExstDj9PY2_odm2w0tUeix1tD2fS-gseSEHveXXOTB7ReFQEfTikotm6Hw2ou_PO85wN8AAAD__4aSoRA) linking childhood fluoride exposure to lower intelligence for two years.The National Toxicology Program's analysis, [based on studies from](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuAjEQAL_mrjOy169z4SINHWlTnvxYw0bmTIzhxN9HpE45mmY0X6f1FKjSdv4MV_SjtDWkQU9cHQMGalVz9gURUM7ohQUNiwYL88VbzWOK0SYRFseLkDm7YIyyWmpehJvJAwfFHQfBuQV-KFjiknTWxugM4CbFMdNo_fDdaBsXLPXVntgPqV3n6i9j3O6T_JjgOMEx3Dbc72_1hj4oVZzgWOqjdcrI9jCws9gDbWzDR2-1nV-MfhgPxooMGWWUi3HKIsSsgzGiKGmDnrvPt51qpbuxk-Lna6D6lzD-_fH08BsAAP__3cthIA) Canada, China, India, Iran, Pakistan, and Mexico, concludes with "moderate confidence" that water containing more than 1.5 milligrams of fluoride per liter is consistently associated with lower IQs in kids.This level is [significantly higher](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy6yAQheGnkTo0aA1CKihu4863TanBsEgbI3CAiPHbZ5w6zam-4sz_cVtvhgLF7b85UFefVmMrnbguDBiIVfROe0TAS496VCBhlqCg37WzVs7OTPdxFCC9sO81VnruUCm59KSBg-ALh5FzBXzw6O-zlU5Ok3QASyc4OqopD5-JYt3Rh1c6MQ82HX3Qe63P0l3-dXDt4NpaGyK20hAfb9DBdXvjeGCszGwY7YtlDGgKFpbxmXJlO2078-E7ZXLIAp4YCnuQK4y-2LgImOTcZ-2ejUKgMqlO8O0wFH4v1D97nBp-AgAA__9dXmSi) than the current federal recommendation of 0.7 milligrams per liter, established in 2015, and 1.2 milligrams per liter for five decades before that. Health officials deny blocking the report, saying it raised research questions. Critics say the findings challenge long-held assurances about fluoride's safety in drinking water.
## High School Deaths Spark Football Debate
Five high school and middle school [players have died](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2OtCAUxvGrwQ6DZ1C0oHgbu3nbLQ0fh4HNUQwQzdz9Zrbe7pc8zZP_13N7mkTpeP03O-oW8mZcSxduCwcOcpOd1wER8NGhHhSMMI-goIt6sQNYN6vFC_WwYpQyLEZZ6zxK5cPQJQ0CpFgEDEIoEH3AYGc3-nGaRg-wMCnQp5ZL_53T0SIGeucLS-_y3pGOrZ2VPf4xWBms9333h3UH3vWzM1g_ZLDWM5f2gUfTYuUVLyyGeEyvyKuLORMPOTdriPhJ5o2l8rPk_WzcGaLKC4Zcdl7cYYZpllJ2RfvzTkSpTopJ8dpNot9X7c9El4afAAAA__8XKGul) in football-related incidents at the start of this season, rekindling debates about the sport's safety for young athletes.Four players died during practice or pre-season workouts, and one in a game. Two of the deaths [occurred on the same day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8jAQAJ8m6YI2G_8WLr6Gjq-9Mlrbu8Qng1FigXj7E1dfOZpipPm6rBcqtdyv_-nGoUtbKfXy5NVPOKFa1ZiDMCMvI4fZokan0eK4hZnnhCaKRlyiGB-jYa3Fzigqc6axBARU4AFnAItwEpboks7aGJ0R_aCAc-ltP323cu8bS323J--n1G5jDVvvj2NY_g14HvBMjzu_jo_6wN5LqjzgWVrrkWqdMlPfjukg4f6eFmOUOJiJCBM5xTH7ZXEZ0HpxAOMe8uNVai2HsYOC641K_e32Pyc8A_4EAAD__xBmXY4).A [West Georgia player](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D9v4yAYgPFPgzcs_Nr4z8BwiuRclEsuQ6VWWSxsXhtabFIgQf32VTp3_w2PntfTcJLGmm05yxVFnN0gp2geOHQUKFRDlSkxIwKWGYqiAQ4thwYyLcqqkQgNn1uQLXSFGhUWJU68xQKassqMAAYV6xgUjDXA8hnnsZ244nXNFUBHKobKROfzd2e2qHG2X-6BPp_cmlmhY7wFUv4h0BPoU0p5CqOXyrgnINBvmAKB3rpJ2qfAEOkiqTaLpmHSzln6eZc-oh_l9EH9PWhUVLtwM1FaKueIni7ObAtVLm10NYouckUCPUBd7-H8f9__vfDd9Xr893bcXQ4vpwOBPvNC3ZKx1oS6IRVbVmnsT3T89eBDwHcAAAD__59Hc5M) was also hospitalized Friday night and underwent surgery Saturday morning.Debates center primarily on the risk of head and brain injuries and whether these risks outweigh the benefits youth football can bring to communities.

Lawsuit Claims Feds Hid Fluoride Study A lawsuit claims federal officials linking childhood fluoride exposure to lower intelligence for two years.The National Toxicology Program's analysis, Canada, China, India, Iran, Pakistan, and Mexico, concludes with "moderate confidence" that water containing more than 1.5 milligrams of fluoride per liter is consistently associated with lower IQs in kids.This level is than the current federal recommendation of 0.7 milligrams per liter, established in 2015, and 1.2 milligrams per liter for five decades before that. Health officials deny blocking the report, saying it raised research questions. Critics say the findings challenge long-held assurances about fluoride's safety in drinking water. High School Deaths Spark Football Debate Five high school and middle school in football-related incidents at the start of this season, rekindling debates about the sport's safety for young athletes.Four players died during practice or pre-season workouts, and one in a game. Two of the deaths was also hospitalized Friday night and underwent surgery Saturday morning.Debates center primarily on the risk of head and brain injuries and whether these risks outweigh the benefits youth football can bring to communities. | Hi Friend,
As we celebrate Labor Day, it's pretty natural to wonder which candidates running for office will stand with Texas workers and their families, and which won't. That question doesn't require a lot of time to answer for TX-31--fortunately, since this is a holiday after all.
Union endorsement is a good starting point--like my endorsement by AFL-CIO COPE. I'm particularly proud of their support.
---
| [](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lLa0aa5_cM16iec-MhcLi57Gkx4GtPSPZbQiWeWCWO8z664DjfxPaPZkuhzYtftjqQVJbOUEuocsjiOKB27qAGg-3G4EoCQ3CfA4mb9YqNlLFGnWvgK1kFELenOLKj6vl1vrD4ITNhKi-9WallaJ887YzwXJg2v8ZXKsZuytFEHZbJgWRcQO6JI9UmIXpkYGG8U0RSY9AbzaESGJpI6eyw==&c=c2UzPlNV_ljisMwe8Euk5ERg-2h7IF-LyUxmvuwzs5QsnyZnfZbPDg==&ch=0V6ETF9CNIakSrFnxMFCoGWKBElXy1OzFaQbdJo_Lx2THe145-erJA==)
---
| My opponent John Carter has the backing of the American Conservative Union, except it's not actually a "union." It's a MAGA-aligned lobbying group that supports the opposite policies vs. what actual labor unions support.
Then there are candidates' positions on issues that most affect workers and their families. You could spend the entire holiday listing examples where Carter has been on the wrong side; 21 years of voting against labor means Carter has a long and disbursing track record.
Because it's a holiday, I'll just mention a few low-lights.
John Carter's woeful track record vs. Texas workers:
* Voted to defund the National Labor Relations Board, which enforces U.S. labor law to stop unfair labor practices;

* Voted to limit employees' collective bargaining rights; and

* Voted to exempt companies from paying local market wages.

Needless to say, my votes would appear on the opposite side of the ledger each time.
I'd normally include a quick graphic with green checkmarks and red x's to help illustrate the difference between John Carter's and my positions. But I'm letting my team celebrate Labor Day with their families--and it's clear enough already that I'm the candidate supporting workers and John Carter isn't.
If you're in TX-31, I hope you'll support me, Stuart Whitlow, on Election Day so that I can support workers and their families in Congress.
[Wherever you live, please contribute today to help me reach as many voters as possible. clean_body: On the issues that matter the most for Texas working families | | | | == | == | Hi Friend, As we celebrate Labor Day, it's pretty natural to wonder which candidates running for office will stand with Texas workers and their families, and which won't. That question doesn't require a lot of time to answer for TX-31--fortunately, since this is a holiday after all. Union endorsement is a good starting point--like my endorsement by AFL-CIO COPE. I'm particularly proud of their support. | == | My opponent John Carter has the backing of the American Conservative Union, except it's not actually a "union." It's a MAGA-aligned lobbying group that supports the opposite policies vs. what actual labor unions support. Then there are candidates' positions on issues that most affect workers and their families. You could spend the entire holiday listing examples where Carter has been on the wrong side; 21 years of voting against labor means Carter has a long and disbursing track record. Because it's a holiday, I'll just mention a few low-lights. John Carter's woeful track record vs. Texas workers: Voted to defund the National Labor Relations Board, which enforces U.S. labor law to stop unfair labor practices; Voted to limit employees' collective bargaining rights; and * Voted to exempt companies from paying local market wages. Needless to say, my votes would appear on the opposite side of the ledger each time. I'd normally include a quick graphic with green checkmarks and red x's to help illustrate the difference between John Carter's and my positions. But I'm letting my team celebrate Labor Day with their families--and it's clear enough already that I'm the candidate supporting workers and John Carter isn't. If you're in TX-31, I hope you'll support me, Stuart Whitlow, on Election Day so that I can support workers and their families in Congress. == | | == | I hope that you and your family have a safe and relaxing Labor Day. | == | == | | | == Democrat Stuart Whitlow is running to unseat Trump's ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter. And it's one of the closest races in the country! == Our democracy is on the line, and we can't risk another two years of a MAGA majority in the U.S. House. | | == | | == | | | | == == == | | | PAID FOR BY WHITLOW FOR CONGRESS | | | | Whitlow for Congress | 910 Quest Parkway Suite 6113 | Cedar Park, TX 78613 US | |

body:
Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas

Dear Fellow Conservative, As someone who values our Constitution, your voice matters.That's why I'm inviting you to take part in our SCOTUS Approval Poll. This
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11fa3adaa7eb48ac9e95fe1153f8e97a&_e=_np8knggiD7aEYUKVxpP_gwrzBQLC-bvlYw-sfWp_fmYFPcGyOCdNGkfFrTOeIgNIois2aVNKI-kWv34b1jQfwwg9F2XCPIJX6IoCCOu6WdryZbw5GPcBKrn_opW2ok5OtsvyCWOu5EpslBoriCxlV5kydtga4lDgOcIAqlLfg6Y0pmAs619IURLFFU2JrJe9js1LexJ3Vxt8zBnGed13oAI6fZlSgc8TFNuJuf-i4h3vsqxSC66reKrPMcU3WCngqdAKyb5W-nncTTTLiGNG8mijei5ahAzyAbTDJMiSV-wKVC3m2tDvn3THsCnVeQ6ufeeTzDDMZ46am485K8LdDv71e5-OxvkjNXCwV5sytDJLE6MU3jfPdRbXWoq6HRA)

| | Dear Concerned American,

Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas when they are defeated at the ballot box. They can pressure businesses to go woke!

We exist to shine a light on the crazy excesses of the woke ideology invading businesses across America and then to fight back for you.

Did you know ... Gatorade is pushing men in women's sports by providing "Equity in Sports" resources?

These resources include reports and guidelines for schools, coaches. and sports leagues on how to get more biological males competing against young girls in sports.

We can't sit idly by. We invite you to participate in our Survey on Woke Companies, where you can share your views on what businesses should prioritize and who they should serve.

Your input will help us shout louder and land more rhetorical haymakers that embarrass woke companies and CEOs into retreat.

[Take the Survey Now](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11fa3adaa7eb48ac9e95fe1153f8e97a&_e=_np8knggiD7aEYUKVxpP_gwrzBQLC-bvlYw-sfWp_fmYFPcGyOCdNGkfFrTOeIgNIois2aVNKI-kWv34b1jQfwwg9F2XCPIJX6IoCCOu6WdryZbw5GPcBKrn_opW2ok5OtsvyCWOu5EpslBoriCxlV5kydtga4lDgOcIAqlLfg6Y0pmAs619IURLFFU2JrJe9js1LexJ3Vxt8zBnGed13rp5gE3UxO7dpx_pPNELCAxMg6XBTnGwGwDTY8aIRtnR2hxexZbXHvo5F77AS3IwitC0J8qH8aDmLpNY7tds7jdOM3bvagZZ0z8ZLe804rO2IJt0VShHrVOqkG3fN1WkD_dzG2rIJXv50y105A-s5ic2J2YE4i_OHxTEVobGLZ_E)

Let's tell corporate America:
* Woke agendas won't work!
* Put customers over progressive politicians!
* Make good products and good profits instead of progressive social change!

Let voters make policy through the voting booth and consumers make decisions with their pocket books instead of elites dictating woke ideology from BlackRock's boardrooms in NYC.

[https://consumersresearch.org/woke-companies-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11fa3adaa7eb48ac9e95fe1153f8e97a&_e=_np8knggiD7aEYUKVxpP_gwrzBQLC-bvlYw-sfWp_fmYFPcGyOCdNGkfFrTOeIgNIois2aVNKI-kWv34b1jQfwwg9F2XCPIJX6IoCCOu6WdryZbw5GPcBKrn_opW2ok5OtsvyCWOu5EpslBoriCxlV5kydtga4lDgOcIAqlLfg6Y0pmAs619IURLFFU2JrJe9js1LexJ3Vxt8zBnGed13qoNZaXeaFdlko9vky5Wnzjb-dd9d2DkzwNtJIzP3-wWPLfZxgTNJqlsPMB74hAuGjwiiMC3AjMxpxKeGD8-EnUA6sToHhmovP1dJg9LEaB5sLTWFesG74ABGq7zAPrlUH-ekKW8QnDPCmiZ5u92Zg-DCS2kB3xpKrR51UGI-GYq)

Thank you for joining us in this fight for business to be business, consumers to get good products & service, and progressive elites' agendas to stay in their drum circle.

Sincerely,

Will Hild
Consumers' Research

Sometimes, I truly can’t believe this is happening in America. The ruling party has given up on trying to win elections fair and square. Instead, they’re WEAPONIZING the legal system to try and imprison their leading opponent, silence dissent, and punish any and all who stand in their way. And I can tell you all about the Left’s legal warfare, because it’s personal for me... ... I’ve beenSUED by the Soros-backed prosecutor who wants President Trump in jail. name: Will Hild
subject: Help Us Uncover the Truth About Woke Companies
body:
Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas

Dear Fellow Conservative, As someone who values our Constitution, your voice matters.That's why I'm inviting you to take part in our SCOTUS Approval Poll. This
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyU0D1rwzAQBuBfI2820kn-GjQEjKFDSiFDR6PIZ0fU-kCSE_rviyHp0K3r3fMevPd5ns7KbMat78qiNClNMU1OTTqWD_-FpfY2KGcwlXc2AQVR0r6kMLFiljWwbukKlKyFGtquA1rcJPBeNR0oBX3dAsf22jJNr3OzCC2unBdGHndoT4FR0XBRIVUKlmWmHRO6rhkRdA-zylgZl8yMSXsfgt9MNjpVPq7FJm85h0T4icBIYNTepd1iTBETqqhvhyIw_qmQ9njH7yPCxz3bSSsblFkd4cMhf-HLNQdKfo8aCR9C9Cmgzsatz5XF2eyW8AGtMttzqL3L6DLhw8epfLtcylfbIso5PMy2mdS0RND1CFXa2yL_6_F3CT8BAAD__64ZkJg)
---
| | Dear Concerned American,

Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas when they are defeated at the ballot box. They can pressure businesses to go woke!

We exist to shine a light on the crazy excesses of the woke ideology invading businesses across America and then to fight back for you.

Did you know ... Gatorade is pushing men in women's sports by providing "Equity in Sports" resources?

These resources include reports and guidelines for schools, coaches. and sports leagues on how to get more biological males competing against young girls in sports.

We can't sit idly by. We invite you to participate in our Survey on Woke Companies, where you can share your views on what businesses should prioritize and who they should serve.

Your input will help us shout louder and land more rhetorical haymakers that embarrass woke companies and CEOs into retreat.

[Take the Survey Now](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyU0D1rwzAQBuBfI2820kn-GjQEjKFDSiFDR6PIZ0fU-kCSE_rviyHp0K3r3fMevPd5ns7KbMat78qiNClNMU1OTTqWD_-FpfY2KGcwlXc2AQVR0r6kMLFiljWwbukKlKyFGtquA1rcJPBeNR0oBX3dAsf22jJNr3OzCC2unBdGHndoT4FR0XBRIVUKlmWmHRO6rhkRdA-zylgZl8yMSXsfgt9MNjpVPq7FJm85h0T4icBIYNTepd1iTBETqqhvhyIw_qmQ9njH7yPCxz3bSSsblFkd4cMhf-HLNQdKfo8aCR9C9Cmgzsatz5XF2eyW8AGtMttzqL3L6DLhw8epfLtcylfbIso5PMy2mdS0RND1CFXa2yL_6_F3CT8BAAD__64ZkJg)

Let's tell corporate America:
* Woke agendas won't work!
* Put customers over progressive politicians!
* Make good products and good profits instead of progressive social change!

Let voters make policy through the voting booth and consumers make decisions with their pocket books instead of elites dictating woke ideology from BlackRock's boardrooms in NYC.

[https://consumersresearch.org/woke-companies-survey/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyU0D1rwzAQBuBfI2820kn-GjQEjKFDSiFDR6PIZ0fU-kCSE_rviyHp0K3r3fMevPd5ns7KbMat78qiNClNMU1OTTqWD_-FpfY2KGcwlXc2AQVR0r6kMLFiljWwbukKlKyFGtquA1rcJPBeNR0oBX3dAsf22jJNr3OzCC2unBdGHndoT4FR0XBRIVUKlmWmHRO6rhkRdA-zylgZl8yMSXsfgt9MNjpVPq7FJm85h0T4icBIYNTepd1iTBETqqhvhyIw_qmQ9njH7yPCxz3bSSsblFkd4cMhf-HLNQdKfo8aCR9C9Cmgzsatz5XF2eyW8AGtMttzqL3L6DLhw8epfLtcylfbIso5PMy2mdS0RND1CFXa2yL_6_F3CT8BAAD__64ZkJg)

Thank you for joining us in this fight for business to be business, consumers to get good products & service, and progressive elites' agendas to stay in their drum circle.

Sincerely,

Will Hild
Consumers' Research

This | | | | | Dear Concerned American, Our progressive elites have found a backdoor for their radical agendas when they are defeated at the ballot box. They can pressure businesses to go woke! We exist to shine a light on the crazy excesses of the woke ideology invading businesses across America and then to fight back for you. Did you know ... Gatorade is pushing men in women's sports by providing "Equity in Sports" resources? These resources include reports and guidelines for schools, coaches. and sports leagues on how to get more biological males competing against young girls in sports. We can't sit idly by. We invite you to participate in our Survey on Woke Companies, where you can share your views on what businesses should prioritize and who they should serve. Your input will help us shout louder and land more rhetorical haymakers that embarrass woke companies and CEOs into retreat. Let's tell corporate America: Woke agendas won't work! Put customers over progressive politicians! * Make good products and good profits instead of progressive social change! Let voters make policy through the voting booth and consumers make decisions with their pocket books instead of elites dictating woke ideology from BlackRock's boardrooms in NYC. Thank you for joining us in this fight for business to be business, consumers to get good products & service, and progressive elites' agendas to stay in their drum circle. Sincerely, Will Hild Consumers' Research Inside Scoop Politics PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

## State Rep Proposes Starting School in September
A North Texas state representative plans to introduce a bill next session to [delay the start of the school year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxskbFu4zAQRL-G6tZYrUjRKlhcoy7XXmlQ5NJagBYFirHivz8kd0WKdIM3wAMG8-ft9uYly3b_7R_s2kcqNx-aPPk2AQHpm-6iWzBOfceut2TITvaqu9VR4N728ZqwZz0NPuCScLFDHId-GiN24ghJ44TUoxkHugRjEloaU9DGGzZKI0dppV7ayo0__JHyqzy5XkJ5dNmtre2HGn4pmhXN53lezuT9Z6lo9rVJyKxo3vg8FM17ydIkfEbZDokM38iX_TvYSm0r_MOV9_clS_AbRM7-BUdYS8nwvjXJcPDe-LFwheyXUiH6F6ycd2gr_xfcq0RFM10tDJSuUxoZ4mgs6IERllFrMGwt9jggWttVF_dTcpZjtErj_eElf21uPz_wdPQ3AAD__4IqiUY) in Texas until September, aiming to reduce the strain on the state's power grid. Jared Patterson (R-Frisco) argues that cooling schools during the hottest month of the year is costly and [adds unnecessary pressure on the grid](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxskLvOozAQhZ_GdEZm8AUXLrah-7fdEo3NEKyYGGEHkrdfJdtue246-v78TD8YU3zcfuNGrr6WPGGo8aTJcuAgJ9nMzovZdg25zoACY80gm9X1HcAgBi-k134QC1mQnSWzdJ22oH0THQiQwgrohNI9tEGpRRjQS5AKFSkmBc2x5qOtK1V6YVnSO590tCFvTXJrrXth_S8GI4Pxuq72fj7pYzIY8agxJGIwPugqDEaanwFrzA8GYwlrzumjfmd5wmvDOx18P_KeCxXuY0p8poRv_i_MS8Wj8hkrfXqgLYeAxktlea8IuDSD5xgMcKtlHywCoe6bw837FVOKRRsmxW3DmL7_6_9png7-BgAA__9F33Xg). Furthermore, the extreme heat can be dangerous for students engaging in outdoor activities. Patterson said he's received support for the idea from parents in his district and expects lawmakers on both sides of the aisle to [back the proposal](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ_GdEZmY4e4cPE3dPnbK9GC18E6ByN7L5C3P5H6upFm9Glmvu7jHWOK6-M_PsnxEfKIM8cXjVaCBD3qxrtJeds15LoeDPS2v-lmccpYa4C8VnOwmoigm8JEOBEE7ACb6ECBVlZBp8z1Au1sTFA9XMOsDRoyQivykXNpeSGmA2tI7_yi0s752SS3MG9VXP4JGAQM-7633zsfpylgONkCBnU7tRUwrLnwIj8YueSfSrLQVqjSyngOklvJW65UpaeE77g-ZJ2XnJOsjIWlR6YqK57JvFMRMDTF-W2PKcV67YVWjyfG9CnHf1_1cvAbAAD__0njbhE) during next year's legislative session.
## Invasive Sheep Threaten Palo Duro Canyon
Invasive sheep with no natural predators are [threatening native wildlife](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OgzAQBp_GdEb2YvNTuLiGLtdeiTb2ElYyBmEHkrc_5errP-mbmZ_bdEOOnB7fuJIrr3mb0Bc-aRokSDCTqYK7qzDoipzuwEI3dL2pFoe26YPWre6p0YosDaptCe-zNvfQKl-xAwVGDQq0sm0Dtbd2Vh20szcWLVlhFAUu21GXhQq9MM_xvZ101H5bq-iWUvYsmi8Bo4Dxuq460ZX9gilR1OqzEjB-TgSMqhcwNkrAyOnEzCfJvBDtMu_kmbLkdf-YpYfcMW4yPI9NekzvLWWZsDwPjPLiGCLPJGCsDhf2i2Pk3HbCqMeKHP_Ayv-ZTge_AQAA__9Zu2rg) in Palo Duro Canyon State Park. Barbary sheep, originally brought from Africa in the 1950s for exotic hunting, have spread to the region since the 1990s. They reproduce quickly, carry diseases, and consume food resources needed by native big horn sheep, mule deer, and whitetail deer. Park officials are trying to reduce the sheep population through [private hunts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1v8yAcBPBPA1sQ_puXh4Eh0iOmpOrWEWFebCQSLEzs9NtXjapO3X463XC6j6u9ulzyfX5zt6j7M1XrfM97tOoEJ2CW4aAnGtSAox4kcJBK_mN40dGLMTAQbuJOJpgkqDSoMQ0pKZBM4KyBAqOKwkC5GIF4zhOVIJJn3PHIEaMx5F4b6Uvs8em2VD7rHhvx9YaLXnpfNzSeERgEpq9HIK8WmeuOwCyPez9yCT9EYNbHVLL_hf2ObWjuyPcZgZla9cujxQ2BOV8u7__JGhJuOqxHLiVvQiJG55vL5TWg_33HruErAAD__4SKY54) and relocation efforts.
## Progreso Police Chief Sues for Unpaid Dogsitting
Progreso's police chief has filed a federal lawsuit against the city, alleging they failed to pay him overtime for [caring for an aggressive police K-9](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOhCAYhJ8GOgz8giwFxTV2e-2VBuFXSVCMsLr79pfdXHndTDKZL_l-7sPdxRS3-dutaOtzyoPzNZ44GAYM5CBpsCMPRlC0QoMCbfRN0sU6wcV4m4IJQoMD0Qo5jlx5bYxuOylotMBBcsNBcNW10HilJq6hm7xUTqEikmOINR9NXbDi05UpvfKJR-PzSpNdat0Lab8I9AT667qa06WEL49bPVx6rwj0G16FQJ-yd4n9lT2n6JH5JeLEygML2488H1gye_-zx7a7GD65xhUJ9PSwYb9iSrF0mkg-ry5-CLT-b-W08BsAAP__B-NmgA) named Ozzy. Cesar Solis claims his personal life has been disrupted by the dog's need for constant monitoring after Ozzy bit two city employees, adding that he [was not compensated](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJxskEGrozAUhX9N3EXiNdFmkcVQcDUdCrN4S7nGmxpIjSSptv_-4Vu_1YHDgfPxfd3GG_rg18c_fJIpbxdHtMXvNGoOHOQoq9lMYtZNRabpQUGv-4usFuOsbjvltNTkWolSd9N0EYTgcGq7vqm8AQFSaAGNUF0LtVXKiR46Z6VCRYpJQbMvMdVloUJvzC584k6ptvFZBbOUsmXW_mEwMBiO46h3DIE-ltaSMJyrs9-4jWuhtTAYXluIOGcGQ_aFzmw1g-EEYTCIC4PhnuIjUY78HoO3xK-LJ8evlDHx_zH4zP_ikV--1NvsqmTm7fAh-Nz1TIrHE_3PcVV-l7Ub-A4AAP__V05soA) for his time or reimbursed for dog food between May 2022 and May 2024. The lawsuit does not specify the exact amount owed, but estimates suggest Solis could be entitled to over $32,000 in overtime based on his hourly rate.

clean_body: Progreso's police chief has filed a federal lawsuit against the city, alleging they failed to pay him overtime for caring for an aggressive police K-9 named Ozzy. | | | | | | MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 2, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1945, Fleet Admiral Chester Nimitz with Japan that ended World War II. Nimitz was born in Fredericksburg in 1885. Happy Labor Day! We hope your day is as great as that of the Texas A&M student who in College GameDay's field goal challenge--despite an initial miss. Let us know...just hit reply! We're sponsored today by , offering a rare unlimited cash back match on their credit cards. Abilene ⛈️ 74/67° | Amarillo ☁️ 80/59° | Austin 🌦️ 88/73° | Brownsville ⛅ 92/77° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 90/78° | DFW 🌦️ 85/72° | El Paso ⛅ 84/65° | Houston 🌦️ 88/78° | Lubbock 🌧️ 72/61° | San Antonio 🌦️ 89/75° | Texarkana ⛅ 93/71° | State Rep Proposes Starting School in September A North Texas state representative plans to introduce a bill next session to in Texas until September, aiming to reduce the strain on the state's power grid. Jared Patterson (R-Frisco) argues that cooling schools during the hottest month of the year is costly and . Furthermore, the extreme heat can be dangerous for students engaging in outdoor activities. Patterson said he's received support for the idea from parents in his district and expects lawmakers on both sides of the aisle to during next year's legislative session. Invasive Sheep Threaten Palo Duro Canyon Invasive sheep with no natural predators are in Palo Duro Canyon State Park. Barbary sheep, originally brought from Africa in the 1950s for exotic hunting, have spread to the region since the 1990s. They reproduce quickly, carry diseases, and consume food resources needed by native big horn sheep, mule deer, and whitetail deer. Park officials are trying to reduce the sheep population through and relocation efforts. Progreso Police Chief Sues for Unpaid Dogsitting Progreso's police chief has filed a federal lawsuit against the city, alleging they failed to pay him overtime for named Ozzy. Cesar Solis claims his personal life has been disrupted by the dog's need for constant monitoring after Ozzy bit two city employees, adding that he for his time or reimbursed for dog food between May 2022 and May 2024. The lawsuit does not specify the exact amount owed, but estimates suggest Solis could be entitled to over $32,000 in overtime based on his hourly rate. name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: "I wish it need not have happened in my time," said Frodo
body:
There's a lot to be worried about with education.

|
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=49a2dcf23b234c878b1039bd1ece7512&_e=VsAYR40d4lvJ1qoA8lAGpAXQVW2IcIBqrgWseYjRptMk5r-H6Fp4RFUP2PGXSIiw20_fgBCnEDq7EoxjWUWbhNyDFtEPZJ3bKTTPH5PzSMSFE2MsNfN5zUpgHDcIsnOBbodkt_PcJqU5F9ZPoeACdiOXDTkWUxatAQASj0oE_h1NN-re4ZnxXi7k_0M4lfGx5-WUKiaL7WtVivdKOESuwwIEgw6MvTraupI8DZo9uWTORyaWUyVHQXQbXwD08oQyNVrQDyF44qTwnkytXlcOexUlHU8OSm0kzd2RlxyZjDksegnKWBeX1g6aE47_tnJ2) Friend,

There's a lot to be worried about with education.
* Schools are putting more emphasis on social justice than education
* More young people than ever prefer socialism over capitalism
* Students aren't learning important lessons about economics in schools

But I'm reminded of this exchange in The Lord of the Rings, in which Frodo expresses his burden and despair regarding the responsibility of carrying the One Ring.
_"I wish it need not have happened in my time,"_ said Frodo. _"So do I,"_ said Gandalf, _"and so do all who live to see such times. But that is not for them to decide. All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us."_
**It 's our burden to figure out how we can defeat socialism in education and liberate children from indoctrination.**

If you're wondering how we can change our country's future and prevent further economic disasters from getting worse, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has a solution.

Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, goes into classrooms across the country to teach the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society to the next generation.

FEE in the Classroom works with high schools, colleges, youth groups, home school pods, and other educational institutions to provide students with top-quality instruction from our experienced and engaging experts.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=49a2dcf23b234c878b1039bd1ece7512&_e=VsAYR40d4lvJ1qoA8lAGpAXQVW2IcIBqrgWseYjRptMk5r-H6Fp4RFUP2PGXSIiw20_fgBCnEDq7EoxjWUWbhNyDFtEPZJ3bKTTPH5PzSMSFE2MsNfN5zUpgHDcIsnOBbodkt_PcJqU5F9ZPoeACdnuWJULMn7K3V-xL9gZcynIme3DNrdDBpgqfQc8XUbtNaocsj71qsRP70TcE2AfvcRIXMOB50DEUSDy-dq2FzhwYGVx4Mt3VC7ZvKaKAu-E8fx4URyc3DsjBjudqUEQIVazTHeyvNGQtoierbImLw53pyJsheKe3Z8Po39mkPeo9)
This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

FEE in the Classroom challenges socialism in education by making the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the next generation.

[Plus, when you donate $10 or more today, we'll send you a digital copy of Fredrick Bastiat's timeless classic, _The Law_.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=49a2dcf23b234c878b1039bd1ece7512&_e=VsAYR40d4lvJ1qoA8lAGpAXQVW2IcIBqrgWseYjRptMk5r-H6Fp4RFUP2PGXSIiw20_fgBCnEDq7EoxjWUWbhNyDFtEPZJ3bKTTPH5PzSMSFE2MsNfN5zUpgHDcIsnOBbodkt_PcJqU5F9ZPoeACdln2NRtY2sJP5Wx6hWWANqWFZpLb3_Ic8B2hStB_uTchgCz93c5mXolN0xk8XKP-zqhRzXOco5pmiEmbVyFXbjrTdSpw2npzlDvkXtOpaIQ1AwH7kgJQitDJ9MRlVjO1VyreZ5cwVkKuRoLM3uZuZEt4xFn3GfZMCIa6ggb7t3_W)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Reserve Your “Western Heritage” DVD Set
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW8Sv9dWN-

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW8Sv9dWN-

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

Every
Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the
Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year,
I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions
like "Does God exist? Can we know God?" with my students.

These
questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in
our relationship with each other and with God.

Today, I
want to offer you that same experience by sending you a
limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course,
"Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke," as a
token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of
Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite
you to study the history of the "big questions" with my
colleagues and me.

Reserve
your DVD set now using this secure link:
https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd

More than
2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get
your set before they are all gone.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: "I wish it need not have happened in my time," said Frodo
body:
There's a lot to be worried about with education.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bc1f7310b624de78f49a03da9b088f8&_e=x091xO_MWhpamtSfdUnnO_JWK861-doESDrBg1R6zWU9Djd3aSiUPf7SWjEOzGy72DhFvrI5aRZvByg1fpS1UjamjfVS8SdewiygfsRDKmJ5M60UBKbGp7EG2c3xdZs95SkH-_drlQsPj8Vr7T4uN20_5CNXuFr8vnNJp2OpifZe01qDgVUP_eKv5EXDicdujKPg6twH4Zq0ff-UmC10S4CqxZg1gLdjLJCl18yNOE93BnCDtqDgtWvZIG1M82U3jcp9yLariCDA9BZBeZ1NLVzqUVpV2sCNlsKXtL2SqOpw-UVHgpCTZL-kRKSglNmw) Friend,

There's a lot to be worried about with education.
* Schools are putting more emphasis on social justice than education
* More young people than ever prefer socialism over capitalism
* Students aren’t learning important lessons about economics in schools

But I'm reminded of this exchange in The Lord of the Rings, in which Frodo expresses his burden and despair regarding the responsibility of carrying the One Ring.
_"I wish it need not have happened in my time,"_ said Frodo. _"So do I,"_ said Gandalf, _"and so do all who live to see such times. But that is not for them to decide. All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us."_
**It’s our burden to figure out how we can defeat socialism in education and liberate children from indoctrination.**

If you’re wondering how we can change our country's future and prevent further economic disasters from getting worse, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has a solution.

Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, goes into classrooms across the country to teach the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society to the next generation.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bc1f7310b624de78f49a03da9b088f8&_e=x091xO_MWhpamtSfdUnnO_JWK861-doESDrBg1R6zWU9Djd3aSiUPf7SWjEOzGy72DhFvrI5aRZvByg1fpS1UjamjfVS8SdewiygfsRDKmJ5M60UBKbGp7EG2c3xdZs95SkH-_drlQsPj8Vr7T4uN-KO9I3-B0Vb5qr8zd-CjSuvbzeEh29uO7VLs9xGHeOi_o--NCMUQ4vyplJnqrhnW-TL-1jHNJxiPR12_cv0n4iSbWZsSYtSwC_aeF2YRGCX5KECW3hVUA_VniQIfj4YWc8fYRKhiyJc4dg75IXDmsI2ZR7bhuw2z4K9q7HWv7PV)
This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

FEE in the Classroom challenges socialism in education by making the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the next generation.

[Plus, when you donate $10 or more today, we’ll send you a digital copy of Fredrick Bastiat’s timeless classic, _The Law_.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bc1f7310b624de78f49a03da9b088f8&_e=x091xO_MWhpamtSfdUnnO_JWK861-doESDrBg1R6zWU9Djd3aSiUPf7SWjEOzGy72DhFvrI5aRZvByg1fpS1UjamjfVS8SdewiygfsRDKmJ5M60UBKbGp7EG2c3xdZs95SkH-_drlQsPj8Vr7T4uNwQQnoJk_Cmmrp7tC0YROqQncWfPvmkSbFMwMycFXFQCzPt5YgLx6_3GKZnjCol5_RDBVIxKyeOgkbRtM-HvFJrVFfpp0TdYJYNNzMkiOG6PUhugRusgI1FBhyMdTHhpV2aq78Sz1LBqPviMAik7e_k2j3pzQvTElB0FDDflcaCB)

You can help me teach the next generation about these important principles and get a digital copy of The Law for yourself by clicking below!
[Donate and Get Your Digital Copy of _The Law_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bc1f7310b624de78f49a03da9b088f8&_e=x091xO_MWhpamtSfdUnnO_JWK861-doESDrBg1R6zWU9Djd3aSiUPf7SWjEOzGy72DhFvrI5aRZvByg1fpS1UjamjfVS8SdewiygfsRDKmJ5M60UBKbGp7EG2c3xdZs95SkH-_drlQsPj8Vr7T4uNyeW8b0LSDPSL8iM_hWlKFNqmc76bz8wfmaoDK_VqQt1-UAYnrYIv0vnqx6SGnKLCobP54Z6sA1NUprw1IV0qAQ4Lk7MabkZu73ZPp1ch8QPPobLLrz2jEXMZCZM2ye30AimTV-jeAaOksQBveioGNHxgSP1xwcvjFRNe6Dx_tKr)
Thank you,

Lawrence W. Reed

clean_body: There's a lot to be worried about with education. | | | Friend, There's a lot to be worried about with education. Schools are putting more emphasis on social justice than education More young people than ever prefer socialism over capitalism Students aren’t learning important lessons about economics in schools But I'm reminded of this exchange in The Lord of the Rings, in which Frodo expresses his burden and despair regarding the responsibility of carrying the One Ring. "I wish it need not have happened in my time," said Frodo. "So do I," said Gandalf, "and so do all who live to see such times. But that is not for them to decide. All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us." It’s our burden to figure out how we can defeat socialism in education and liberate children from indoctrination.** If you’re wondering how we can change our country's future and prevent further economic disasters from getting worse, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has a solution. Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, goes into classrooms across the country to teach the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society to the next generation. FEE in the Classroom works with high schools, colleges, youth groups, home school pods, and other educational institutions to provide students with top-quality instruction from our experienced and engaging experts. This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government. FEE in the Classroom challenges socialism in education by making the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the next generation. You can help me teach the next generation about these important principles and get a digital copy of The Law for yourself by clicking below! Thank you, Lawrence W. Reed President Emeritus, Humphreys Family Senior Fellow, and Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Chaos erupts in the White House after incriminating emails from a Biden official were leaked
body:
DAILY NEWS | September 02, 2024

Chaos erupts in the
White House after incriminating emails from a Biden official were
leaked
The Biden
admin wants to expand the Swamp in Washington, D.C. But now
they're getting exposed for it.

And chaos erupts in the White
House after incriminating emails from a Biden official were
leaked.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Kamala Harris's new agenda
for first day as president will leave you scared beyond belief

The vice president is
scheming. Her goal is to completely turn the country on it's
head.
➞ Continue Reading

Harris delivers
mind-numbing response after being caught in this White House
scandal

Kamala Harris is in
every way a radical Leftist. But she doesn't even seem to care
that her ideologies are extreme.
➞ Continue Reading

Tim Walz falls flat on his
face during abysmal CNN interview

Gov. Walz is supposed
to do all he can to make the Harris ticket look good. But
unsurprisingly, he isn't able to accomplish that.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: September 15th

body:
Friend, my team has emailed you about the fundraising deadline I'm facing on September 15th.

**[I'm not alone. Every single Republican Senator and Senate candidate is facing this deadline.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkc2O4yoQRp8G7xzZBTbxwouWrOxyO-rb0ixRBVcSJAMWlNOvP8KZSLOdLfVz6nz8OpszusWF-3_oaeTEJmUTUraGbf2gZa1v7kl1onW7GmhA1c1QN2BkNY9Kwyz7isZWQwdHeRy66jGqTl-vjdZg4darVqGVVrZHss1gUfdz5caypxkaaFvVq-5w04MeOuqOAICEV6EaXChxPvCDdvLiLAYm9AcbfbWMD-Y1C_kh4CTglMluiQ4_LiSaS4eAU1HYSyu33V8iyHUMlmq29YplXJ429sbT7DYv5EQe3SKgL485bsmSkFME_8qkjOwli35Fdw9CTn9kWhPQvHCZC6_gkN-wZ2suH4ZtZI7BvK7bN7EVcvr--q7fobwJMTAFFnK6bWFO6LILdwF9Lv2fcL58ff5_EdCj5zVmxy6WY1SVxnn9ccvicq-Fau7FZ0-N_-l3nyP8DgAA__8aLrCk)**

**[And for our nominees in battleground states, it could be a make or break moment.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkc2O4yoQRp8G7xzZBTbxwouWrOxyO-rb0ixRBVcSJAMWlNOvP8KZSLOdLfVz6nz8OpszusWF-3_oaeTEJmUTUraGbf2gZa1v7kl1onW7GmhA1c1QN2BkNY9Kwyz7isZWQwdHeRy66jGqTl-vjdZg4darVqGVVrZHss1gUfdz5caypxkaaFvVq-5w04MeOuqOAICEV6EaXChxPvCDdvLiLAYm9AcbfbWMD-Y1C_kh4CTglMluiQ4_LiSaS4eAU1HYSyu33V8iyHUMlmq29YplXJ429sbT7DYv5EQe3SKgL485bsmSkFME_8qkjOwli35Fdw9CTn9kWhPQvHCZC6_gkN-wZ2suH4ZtZI7BvK7bN7EVcvr--q7fobwJMTAFFnK6bWFO6LILdwF9Lv2fcL58ff5_EdCj5zVmxy6WY1SVxnn9ccvicq-Fau7FZ0-N_-l3nyP8DgAA__8aLrCk)**

**[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between these candidates and my campaign ASAP.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkc2O4yoQRp8G7xzZBTbxwouWrOxyO-rb0ixRBVcSJAMWlNOvP8KZSLOdLfVz6nz8OpszusWF-3_oaeTEJmUTUraGbf2gZa1v7kl1onW7GmhA1c1QN2BkNY9Kwyz7isZWQwdHeRy66jGqTl-vjdZg4darVqGVVrZHss1gUfdz5caypxkaaFvVq-5w04MeOuqOAICEV6EaXChxPvCDdvLiLAYm9AcbfbWMD-Y1C_kh4CTglMluiQ4_LiSaS4eAU1HYSyu33V8iyHUMlmq29YplXJ429sbT7DYv5EQe3SKgL485bsmSkFME_8qkjOwli35Fdw9CTn9kWhPQvHCZC6_gkN-wZ2suH4ZtZI7BvK7bN7EVcvr--q7fobwJMTAFFnK6bWFO6LILdwF9Lv2fcL58ff5_EdCj5zVmxy6WY1SVxnn9ccvicq-Fau7FZ0-N_-l3nyP8DgAA__8aLrCk)**

_**[Tim Sheehy, who served as a Navy Seal,](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkc2O4yoQRp8G7xzZBTbxwouWrOxyO-rb0ixRBVcSJAMWlNOvP8KZSLOdLfVz6nz8OpszusWF-3_oaeTEJmUTUraGbf2gZa1v7kl1onW7GmhA1c1QN2BkNY9Kwyz7isZWQwdHeRy66jGqTl-vjdZg4darVqGVVrZHss1gUfdz5caypxkaaFvVq-5w04MeOuqOAICEV6EaXChxPvCDdvLiLAYm9AcbfbWMD-Y1C_kh4CTglMluiQ4_LiSaS4eAU1HYSyu33V8iyHUMlmq29YplXJ429sbT7DYv5EQe3SKgL485bsmSkFME_8qkjOwli35Fdw9CTn9kWhPQvHCZC6_gkN-wZ2suH4ZtZI7BvK7bN7EVcvr--q7fobwJMTAFFnK6bWFO6LILdwF9Lv2fcL58ff5_EdCj5zVmxy6WY1SVxnn9ccvicq-Fau7FZ0-N_-l3nyP8DgAA__8aLrCk)**_ is running in Montana against Jon Tester.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: We all know which side Rick Scott's on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Florida's working families are in crisis, and Rick Scott doesn't care.
| | |
---
Happy Labor Day, friend.
While many of us will spend the day off consoling our kids over the end of summer break, I want to take a moment to express my appreciation for the labor movement here in Florida and my solidarity in the fight ahead.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92003228/495699392/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1813-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZiYzQ4YjktMjU2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XM43seCACUah0MSoL1GrqJXeuyxnVY6aLFoNTmtdlUY=)
**Conditions that many of us take for granted** — like the 40-hour workweek; the minimum wage; safety, child labor, and anti-discrimination laws; and, for the most fortunate among us, paid leave, benefits, and pensions — **would not exist without the courage and sacrifice of organized workers years ago.**
But right now, even for two-income households, working Floridians are barely scraping by. From the rising costs of home insurance and housing to health care, prices are skyrocketing, while take-home pay just isn't keeping up.

Our state's affordability crisis has left it too difficult for too many Floridians just to "make it" —**_and our multimillionaire, fraudster former-CEO senator, whose wealth has only multiplied since taking office, is doing nothing about it._**
Now, I know that Rick Scott will try to point at my celebration of organized labor as just another reason why I'm a big bad "_socialista_."
**But no amount of petty name-calling could ever make me shy away from fighting alongside working families for the fair wages, safe workplaces, and access to high-quality health care that all of us deserve. **
Really, it only goes to show how out of touch he is with the hardworking families across our state struggling to make ends meet — ** and if we consider his record, it's crystal-clear that Rick Scott is nothing more than a scab. **
During his tenure as governor, he threatened port workers with the Taft-Hartley Act — the corporate elite's 1947 counterattack on unions that began the labor movement's decades-long decline — to ensure that our seaports kept raking in cash at the cost of those working themselves to the bone to generate that profit.
And his scabby streak continued in the Senate, where he helped Trump appoint a pro-business, anti-regulation Wall Street lawyer as the Secretary of Labor (yikes!) and even voted to **BLOCK** a deal granting a mere _seven days of paid sick leave_ for the 17,000 railroad workers working brutal hours and in brutal conditions to sustain the economy on a grueling, 24/7/365 on-call schedule. Here in Florida, it’s gotten even worse. Rick Scott’s allies have rolled back child labor laws, and banned heat protections for workers.
**In short, workers' rights here at home and nationwide have been under attack from greedy companies and their political cronies for too long. **
And as someone who had to work at a minimum wage job as a teenager just to help my family keep a roof over our heads, I know _firsthand_ that we need to do more to support hardworking Floridians who are struggling.
**That's why I say _ya no más_** — and so do Floridians in the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE), the Communication Workers of America (CWA), and the American Federation of State, County and Municipal Employees (AFSCME), **labor unions whose endorsements I'm so honored to have earned.**
This Labor Day, I'm more fired up than ever to fight alongside them — **from the picket line, to the negotiation tables, to the halls of Congress** — to ensure all working families have the same opportunities and freedoms as the ultrawealthy corporate CEOs and corrupt politicians in their back pockets.
**With their support, and with yours, I am more determined than ever to be a voice for Florida’s workers in the U.S. Senate.**
Debbie
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92003229/495699393/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1813-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZiYzQ4YjktMjU2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XM43seCACUah0MSoL1GrqJXeuyxnVY6aLFoNTmtdlUY=)
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92003230/495699394/-31196584?refcode=jtk1813-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZiYzQ4YjktMjU2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XM43seCACUah0MSoL1GrqJXeuyxnVY6aLFoNTmtdlUY=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=iKxyiNeqbuKHjGVXO8hFfeR0fBIA%2BG84qUO7%2B1Tv08GhBcLod8BQyTWh10WtFJYJ8c7P46eD%2FFVx3RSOQYYV1w2%2BTfnl%2FL5afWOAU4AaEHjSIbH87DkOieP3o7csMV7EANEAik5GsaSigCBFt%2F1xLcd%2Baa4Kv%2FPr0m7LXj9pO3%2FOD%2Fyv5zee1Gg8MrkRj%2FCvQB2bcSo66jmRrzGpIYZWuLHJ54ZbOcmET1jYkGO70qNNm0zHLzlYbJV9ixjaFS2G%2BFKQYl4FSWpqoNAB8JRijMKbQ%2FJKebQPweB6F6FvcsS5cVsuXBrqq3cvHE0aFvVuCiIc0vySAVnT1SPWSpqGuhGK2zMBmNvFdqdh1dlPYVeDZ%2BlEVxmZPFRDKUgyO7Ba6rWKmTrw5xc%2BkdOOyJnZVfevcWqztyqvlay7fI8Op4bDQpv3dFuPeiQkiQF%2BCvb0) from Debbie's email list.
Paid for by Debbie for Florida.
Debbie for Florida
PO Box 432250
South Miami, FL 33243
United States
