name: Democrats.org
subject: Early voting begins this month:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we need your help now.
---
Derek, We’ll get straight to the point: September is Democrats’ most critical month yet. With Kamala Harris set to debate Donald Trump, early voting kicking off in must-win states, and our final end-of-quarter deadline of this election cycle right around the corner, _the stakes couldn’t be higher_. name: Kamala Harris for President
subject: Do you really know what’s in Project 2025?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HARRIS FOR PRESIDENT
body:
By now, you've heard of Donald Trump's Project 2025
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/65?t=1&akid=41%2E2563979%2EDtB1uN)

By now, you've heard of Donald Trump's Project 2025. But do you know what's really in the plans for a second Trump term?
Please take a minute with this list. Read it. Share it. Remember it. This is what is at stake.
A national abortion ban. Cuts to Social Security. Privatization of Medicare. Abolishment of the Department of Education. And so much more.
[**Here's a link:**](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/244?t=2&akid=41%2E2563979%2EDtB1uN)
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/244?t=3&akid=41%2E2563979%2EDtB1uN)
And yes, Project 2025 is Trump’s agenda.
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/245?t=4&akid=41%2E2563979%2EDtB1uN)
But we are not going back.
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/246?t=5&akid=41%2E2563979%2EDtB1uN)
Kamala Harris for President
* * *

**Before you click away!**
This is the most important election of our lifetime, and it's critical we do everything we can to defeat Donald Trump and JD Vance this November.
If everyone reading this email donated just $20, we would reach our fundraising goals and have what it takes to win. But not everyone gives.
We are counting on supporters like you who know the stakes of this election to chip in today. [**If electing Kamala Harris and Tim Walz and defeating Donald Trump seems worth $20, donate to the campaign today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-hfp-september-2024?refcode=kh_em_fr_20240902_b10_kh_tier1&refcode2=41_2563979_DtB1uN&akid=41%2E2563979%2EDtB1uN)

name: RFID Wallet
subject: New Carbon-Fiber RFID Wallet Going Fast!
body:
This Little Device Protects My Money
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/25e77bba955c7c645dd6aee9f15933cd925f0014/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6?message_id=ImY4NjJhMTkwLTRiNzctMDEzZC1jMDczLTJhMzZkZDAwY2RhYUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/8c6406f8a01e003e52c4ccecc7fb34327d1242b9/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6)
---
---
I’m going to Amsterdam next month and I am so scared. I know I’ll look like a sitting duck just waiting to get pick-pocketed. So my girlfriend got me **[this RFID-blocking tech wallet.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/4b84f432770bca24c8c8086496560e7e0ce0ec5a/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6)** While I may look like an easy target, I’m one step ahead of the thieves. **This wallet** is not only the most superior protection I could have while on an international vacation, the look is super sleek and modern. People think I’m just stylish, but little do they know I’m fashionably _and_ financially in the know roaming new cities. I mean, just look at this modern, sleek, high-tech, carbon-fiber weave:

---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/8c6406f8a01e003e52c4ccecc7fb34327d1242b9/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6)
---
|
---
Would you believe me if I also said it’s weatherproof and rustproof too? (Believe me... it is!) I like it for the look, but I love it for the protection. Be one step ahead of the thieves and **[protect your assets wherever you go.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/4b84f432770bca24c8c8086496560e7e0ce0ec5a/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6)** Can’t wait to go bar-hopping in Amsterdam next month. I am so ready now. Are you?
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18536/6374453/8c6406f8a01e003e52c4ccecc7fb34327d1242b9/d62204a7d313fd6bad24e71ae09e989f16175fa6)

body:
| | | Friend,

My name is John James. I’m a black Christian conservative combat veteran on a mission to restore the American Dream. It’s no surprise that the Democrat Establishment has put a target on my back. Democrats have reserved millions to defeat me in this mission. They think their millions scare me, but I’m fighting back. **My team put together a new ad to show America that the best is yet to come for our nation. We are taking on the Democrat lies with a message of _truth_ , _optimism_ , and _faith_.** **_We need to spread our message across our district, but if we want to get our ad on the air, we need to raise $9,643 by midnight TONIGHT. _** **[**Watch our new ad and pitch in TODAY so we can meet our deadline at 11:59 PM TONIGHT and show America that THE BEST IS YET TO COME!**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=75a6e7c78a5f416baf93be7923a3f426&_e=_aot8hx9v_-MpJ2rQtQRfhLPecTQK6DR33VWiIQ1MkLeIV4z8gMLKYfkne2b0h0Vx0scxUcY12o71hN5_bHMUix6Z02H1vIcKQ_sOiWBMKWuFIOrCCBuNFNjHcjKlgj3BKTyk1w4fNl2NHxca_lmrTTgXkMr_g4pAqkUzdJYVFSVUWzf-j37HZ78BeZ1VvkCoh3-CgSHg28r8eJC1PIUvSvX1xlqFz2b4_WiOfHF53moa5m2IdzOXBIJgBSv50Ah0PaO_qhflZZsibG7yWxigBf_CAsix9IY8G_6WYmhHUwbnyNLHRYYrQnBp-q6e8inzLUZmUSAmH2GJpks3qFdHF-P6zfduTOuNcZJy2m6vf0%3D)******

---
It’s true that the past few years have been tough on law-abiding, hardworking Americans. It seems like criminals and illegal aliens are the only ones who get a hand up in our country. Though things seem dark now, I see an American future that is brighter. That’s the message I want to spread. We will once again live in a land where:
* A child’s outcome isn’t determined by their zip code.
* Hard work truly gets you ahead.
* You can go from poverty to prosperity in a single generation.

**_That’s what I fought for in Iraq, and that’s the future I want for my three boys. America is the greatest idea that’s ever been—it’s worth fighting for, it’s worth sacrificing for._** Will you join the fight?

clean_body: | | | Friend, My name is John James. I’m a black Christian conservative combat veteran on a mission to restore the American Dream. It’s no surprise that the Democrat Establishment has put a target on my back. Democrats have reserved millions to defeat me in this mission. They think their millions scare me, but I’m fighting back. My team put together a new ad to show America that the best is yet to come for our nation. We are taking on the Democrat lies with a message of truth , optimism , and faith. We need to spread our message across our district, but if we want to get our ad on the air, we need to raise $9,643 by midnight TONIGHT. ** It’s true that the past few years have been tough on law-abiding, hardworking Americans. It seems like criminals and illegal aliens are the only ones who get a hand up in our country. Though things seem dark now, I see an American future that is brighter. That’s the message I want to spread. We will once again live in a land where: A child’s outcome isn’t determined by their zip code. Hard work truly gets you ahead. You can go from poverty to prosperity in a single generation. That’s what I fought for in Iraq, and that’s the future I want for my three boys. America is the greatest idea that’s ever been—it’s worth fighting for, it’s worth sacrificing for. Will you join the fight? We have the vision to restore the AMERICAN DREAM, but we need your immediate support so we can spread the word. Fighting for you, John James | | Paid for by John James for Michigan Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for Michigan Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Jon’s team tells me they need to raise another $27,196 before midnight. They won’t get there without your help.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92008383/495709684/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTU1ZjgxZC0yZDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_FXD-iLpM-DXtfIWWq6u2hO-jzVlrstdMzn6p_7bVo=)
---
Happy Labor Day, folks! Today, we celebrate the hardworking men and women who built our country and honor everything we have achieved through the labor movement. 🇺🇸 Before I came to Congress, I dedicated my entire adult life to fighting for labor rights. Working as a labor activist, I saw firsthand how vital fair pay and safe working conditions are for our community. I'm proud to have stood alongside firefighters, first responders, meatpackers, and grocery store workers, ensuring they can collectively bargain for better wages, benefits, and safer workplaces. Union jobs are the backbone of the middle class and essential to building strong and thriving communities. That’s why I’m committed to championing workers' rights in Congress for people in Central and Southern Illinois and across our great nation. I was honored to co-sponsor the _Richard L. Trumka Protecting the Right to Organize Act_. This comprehensive bipartisan legislation is crucial for protecting workers' rights to unionize, ensuring higher wages, better benefits, and safer working conditions. **[In honor of Labor Day, I ask you to join me in standing up for organized labor and protecting hardworking families. Add your name to my petition and call on Congress to pass the Richard L. Trumka Protecting the Right to Organize Act today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92008387/495709689/-1371614718?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTU1ZjgxZC0yZDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_FXD-iLpM-DXtfIWWq6u2hO-jzVlrstdMzn6p_7bVo=&emci=9482eeda-cc67-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7155f81d-2d69-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13891387)** | [👉 ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92008391/495709693/-1371614718?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTU1ZjgxZC0yZDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_FXD-iLpM-DXtfIWWq6u2hO-jzVlrstdMzn6p_7bVo=&emci=9482eeda-cc67-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7155f81d-2d69-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13891387)

This Labor Day, let’s rally behind a true champion of the working class, Derek Marshall. With a robust pro-worker platform which seeks to raise wages and expand labor rights, Derek is endorsed by numerous unions representing vital sectors like healthcare and electrical workers. Rep. Jay Obernolte, one of the richest men in Congress, has shown a disregard for labor rights, earning a dismal [0% rating](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwof7d--94xVsdZt-3H-KDqnR3oKFEbKh9sxQWNiKu_Oog_cbsZNi5BZCHewIYeNFr8J8vGf5bKe_cFW187juzaJ27N-XF3tceRNYyGnekOCydBFGdW56Ljrdm6kyOlxweQINBi9uRvQdoN-OO6CdShFFsZrUhaL3PBKLeVtTPlZcGQKox_9k6DLbwckpCKlOdaWIgzKw8DztAyCfM3QlSHVZ_cI6KlC6Yu79sQ0grJhfT2zK3z0lcDJmTQExeaSL6AWYuVhYDBEpZNchEDT4lvhXd5Y7kmuiJ6cZ9MFoRDLPRuwHWAC8_cwadqbtZ3OocaQ/49f/pdDhikmnR-mHD7zWZAu13Q/h2/h001.FHWUaQLXd7YBQe7GNWZQE7ZjpQHQjUhAtgpDq6D2G6k) from the AFL-CIO for 2023. body:
Take a moment to thank the labor movement

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92009224/495712275/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTc4NzFkMi0yZDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p9zhNWDJc9aJQSYYc5kzJMOhB5zrLVhgIrJzsZb4J0g=&emci=6dd1dc83-e966-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=317871d2-2d69-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15759664)
---
Derek, All of us at the Democratic Party of Virginia hope you are enjoying the Labor Day weekend with friends and family. _It's been quite the summer for Democrats — so please take some time to relax before we hit the ground running for the home stretch leading up to Election Day!_ **We also hope you will take a moment or two today to honor the workers — past and present — in the labor movement for this holiday.** Their dedication to improving life for all of us over the decades means that in 2024 we enjoy higher wages, an eight-hour workday, safer working conditions, child labor laws, unemployment insurance, Social Security, and worker health and safety laws. **These accomplishments were hard won, Derek, and came at a high cost.** It's crucial that we defend what the labor movement has achieved. Today, there are those who are determined to dismantle unions and strip away the protections for workers that were hard-fought for by labor activists. We cannot let this happen. As we enjoy this Labor Day holiday, let's not forget the ongoing work by unions to defend workers. Let's make a commitment to stand with them in the days ahead and be a strong ally for the labor movement. Have a safe and relaxing Labor Day! — Team DPVA

clean_body: Take a moment to thank the labor movement | Derek, All of us at the Democratic Party of Virginia hope you are enjoying the Labor Day weekend with friends and family. It's been quite the summer for Democrats — so please take some time to relax before we hit the ground running for the home stretch leading up to Election Day! We also hope you will take a moment or two today to honor the workers — past and present — in the labor movement for this holiday. Their dedication to improving life for all of us over the decades means that in 2024 we enjoy higher wages, an eight-hour workday, safer working conditions, child labor laws, unemployment insurance, Social Security, and worker health and safety laws. These accomplishments were hard won, Derek, and came at a high cost. It's crucial that we defend what the labor movement has achieved. Today, there are those who are determined to dismantle unions and strip away the protections for workers that were hard-fought for by labor activists. We cannot let this happen. As we enjoy this Labor Day holiday, let's not forget the ongoing work by unions to defend workers. Let's make a commitment to stand with them in the days ahead and be a strong ally for the labor movement. Have a safe and relaxing Labor Day! — Team DPVA [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Texas MAGA Fest Returns!
body:
We are the Trump Card

| | | | **FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Our last Texas MAGA Fest was a massive success, and we heard your feedback loud and clear: **You want more!** That’s why we’re excited to announce **“Texas MAGA Fest: We Are The Trump Card”** on **Sunday, September 15, 2024.**
**Location:** 2920 Roadhouse, 21835 Farm to Market 2920, Hockley, TX 77447
**Time:** 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM
**Tickets:** $5
**What’s in store for you this time?** We’ve got an incredible lineup of activities that will ignite your patriotic spirit and connect you with fellow Texans who share your values.
[Get your $5 tickets by clicking here](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeJy1Y2ji_g~jvYxXnjL)
**Proceeds will be donated to Battle2BE** , a nonprofit who provides intervention, preparation, education and resources to support mental wellness, safety, and relationship in our Military, 1st Responder families and the communities they serve for effective response when seconds count.

### **Event Highlights:**
* **Open Mic:** Got something to say? Here’s your chance! Whether it's a grievance, a word of encouragement, or a solution to a pressing issue, the mic is yours for one minute. **We’re listening, and so is your community.**
* **Patriotic Car Contest:** Show off your patriotic pride! Decorate your car in red, white, and blue, and compete for prizes. Let’s see who can take home the trophy for the most creative and patriotic ride!
* **Food & Drinks:** Savor delicious food and refreshing drinks as we come together in celebration.
* **Live Music:** Feel the beat of freedom with live performances that will keep the energy high and spirits lifted.
* **Vendors:** Support local businesses and browse a variety of goods, from patriotic apparel to unique crafts.
* **Fellowship:** Connect with like-minded patriots, strengthen community bonds, and feel the power of unity.
* **And More:** Expect additional surprises and activities that will make this day unforgettable!

**Why should you attend?**
* **Take Action:** Now more than ever, your voice matters. Be part of the movement that’s making a real impact.
* **Feel the Unity:** Experience the powerful sense of community that made our last event so memorable. Meet new friends, catch up with old ones, and enjoy the camaraderie.
* **Celebrate Patriotism:** Come celebrate what makes our country great. Together, we can show that Texans are leading the way in standing up for our values.

****
**Mark your calendar for September 15 and bring your friends!** Let’s make this event bigger and better.
Remember, **we hold the power, the voice, and the determination to steer our country back on course. Together, we are the trump card that makes a difference.**
We can’t wait to see you there!
[Learn more here.](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeJy1Y2ji_g~jvYxXnjL)
---
_For Liberty,_
| | |
---
|
---
| [](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeJy1Y2ji_g~jvYxXnjH) | [](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeJy1Y2ji_g~jvYxXnjI) | [](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeJy1Y2ji_g~jvYxXnjJ) | [](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeJy1Y2ji_g~jvYxXnjK)
---|---|---|---

body:

Friend, I spoke last week with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: **We're officially being outspent on TV ads.**
I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me.
But here's the deal: **The GOP is zeroing in on our race because they know control of the Senate hinges on what happens here in Ohio.** That's why they've named me a top target for defeat and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me.
Let me make one thing clear, friend: The GOP might outspend us in this race, but they will not outwork us. If we can keep reaching voters with our pro-worker message, we'll win.
**To make sure we have what it takes to win this race, my team and I have set an ambitious $200,000 daily fundraising goal to hit before midnight tonight. And I'm counting on top supporters like you to help me reach it.**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92010308/495714596/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzdhZGI4MC0yZjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZfRJn7WNG1QgtAlpaLm07mllSBJ5HWoH8EkHhqESMo=&emci=4aeab0ca-f466-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=f37adb80-2f69-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13185894) Hey Derek, it’s Chris here. I wanted to take a moment to wish you a happy Labor Day—and to tell you a little bit more about what this day is all about.

Labor Day is full of parades and parties across America today to honor and celebrate workers and unions—none bigger than in Western PA.

Western Pennsylvania is union country. We are the people who made the steel that built America. We built our roads and bridges, we power our railways, we care for our young and our sick, we repair the power lines that light up our neighborhoods—and so much more.

Western PA is no stranger to hard work and the union way of life. And those unions—and the workers who ARE the union—have made our country a better place.

I’m proud today and every day to have fought alongside other workers to form a union. I’m proud to be the labor candidate who will always defend the rights and jobs of our workers.

On this Labor Day, and every day, I'm proud to stand with the American labor movement, and I’ll keep fighting every single day for the union way of life in Western PA.

Solidarity Forever,

Chris | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92010309/495714597/-2054167465?refcode=email_090224_laborday&amounts=5%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzdhZGI4MC0yZjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZfRJn7WNG1QgtAlpaLm07mllSBJ5HWoH8EkHhqESMo=)

name: Jill Stein for President
subject: A Labor Day Message from Team Stein/Ware
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Labor needs more than a holiday, we need power

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_email&n=1)
---
Peter, Happy Labor Day! Team Stein/Ware hopes you’re enjoying a fun celebration of the end of summer today. But we want to take a moment to remind you that labor deserves much more than a day off of work - labor deserves power through unions and living wages. Over 60% of working people are living paycheck to paycheck. Real wages have stagnated for over a generation as wealth keeps being funneled away from working people and into the hands of the 1%. Modest wage gains haven’t kept up with the cost of living. Americans are more vulnerable than ever because the duopoly politicians have prioritized the greed of their big donors of war and Wall Street over the needs of working people. A Stein-Ware administration will fight to put the power back in the hands of workers. Jill and Butch are committed to passing a $25 minimum wage, abolishing “right-to-work for less” laws, and expanding workers' right to unionize to include domestic, agricultural, and so-called “gig” workers. Jill and Butch will implement universal rent control, so that workers aren’t forced to spend as much as 50% of their wages just to keep a roof over their heads, and pass Medicare For All to slash healthcare costs and render medical bankruptcy obsolete. Check out our platform for more on how a Stein/Ware administration will transform our government and economy to work for working people. [_**Read Jill and Butch's Labor Platform here.**_](https://www.jillstein2024.com/platform?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_email&n=2)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_email&n=3)
---
While the Biden-Harris administration throws billions upon billions of dollars to aid Israel’s genocide of the Palestinian people, a Stein-Ware administration will end all aid to Israel until they stop the genocide and end the occupation. That money should be spent here at home, so that working people can do more than barely survive, we can thrive! Jill and Butch don’t take a penny from corporate Super PACs, they rely on super supporters like you to keep this fight going. [**_Can you donate today to help them make it all the way to the White House, where they’ll reverse the dirty duopoly’s agenda of greed and austerity and give real power back to workers?_**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_email&n=4)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_email&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_email&n=5)
---
As always, thank you for your support of Jill and Butch’s empowering vision for people, planet and peace. In solidarity and gratitude, Team Stein/Ware 2024
---
* * *
---
Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
---

name: Dan Ruby
subject: Enjoy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Ruby
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friend,
The energy at the 2024 Democratic National Convention in Chicago is ecstatic. From the passionate speeches to the sense of unity in the air, it’s clear that progressive Democrats across the country are ready to work for our future.
This convention is a powerful reminder that–even in challenging times–our belief in a better tomorrow will carry us forward. As the song they played last night goes, “Don’t stop thinking about tomorrow!”
But the work doesn’t stop there; It’s just beginning. Despite the good vibes at the convention, we know this election will be a majorly uphill battle down the ballot.
At the DNC we’ve seen vibrant energy and smart policies for: affordable housing, better healthcare, lowered taxes and cost of living for working families and seniors, and improved K-12 and CTE education opportunities. We also know we have a chance to restore abortion rights at a national level.
As we transform the excitement and hope from the DNC into our campaign here in rural Oregon, we must remember that our fight is how we make those plans come to life in a way that fits us. We can get these policies enacted if we win this election.
Your support is essential to keep that momentum going for the voters that need to hear it. Together, we can bring the vitality from Chicago to our small towns and rural communities in Oregon’s 2nd Congressional District. If you want to bring that passion on display at the DNC home, will you donate to our campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dan-ruby--friends-of-1?refcode=dnc]
Sincerely,
Dan Ruby
PS: Check out our website here! [https://ruby4or.com/]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dan-ruby--friends-of-1?refcode=dnc]
Paid for by Friends of Dan Ruby
Friends of Dan Ruby
PO Box 938
Ashland, OR 97520
United States

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Team,

Happy Labor Day!

I hope you’re taking the time to enjoy this holiday weekend, while also keeping in mind why we celebrate.

Today, we come together to celebrate the labor movement and recommit to fight for the ideals it promises. It is a celebration of the hardworking men and women who have built our state and country up. They represent Jersey Values, and I am proud to stand with them in Congress.

The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS and Science Act, and Fiscal Responsibility Act are just a few examples of times I have stood with labor. I have and will always support good-paying union jobs and strong labor standards.

I’m honored to represent the hard-working people of Jersey in Washington and continue to fight for them.

Yours,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. The philosophical principles of being a police officer are racist and anti-Black.” - Jenn Jackson, Assistant Professor of Political Science, Syracuse University | | Stephanie Baran, a sociology instructor at Nicholls State University, describes herself as a “** vulgar Marxist” because she desires “ to see the entire dismantling of the system versus the other, softer, kinder, brutal Marxists.” | | Robyn Henderson-Espinoza—aka Roberto Che Espinoza—is a faculty member at Duke Divinity School, offering a course about “ decolonizing ” Jesus and his “ myths and teachings that have been institutionalized. ” Columbia professor Joseph Massad called the 10/7 Hamas massacre of Israeli and American citizens "awesome." Meanwhile at Cornell, Professor of History Russell Rickford announced his “exhilaration” over the murder of innocent Israeli civilians. PragerU needs your help to make sure America's students hear the truth about our shared values and traditions that make America the greatest nation on Earth before it's too late. Many Americans allow their kids to spend hours online every day, seeing social media posts with anti-American, anti-West, anti-God messaging. We’re allowing our youth to be taught destructive ideas and lies that are ruining our country. We’re allowing them to be taught to hate America, the West, and its allies. And it shows. According to exit polls, 63% of voters ages 18 to 29 voted for leftist politicians in the 2022 midterm elections. That means a majority of Gen Z support anti-American, left-wing policies, such as socialism/Marxism, wide open borders, higher taxes, more handouts, and soft-on-crime policies. Education got us into this mess. Education is the only thing that will get us out. Millions of 14-year-olds who are in class and online today...are just a few short years away from being the decision-makers of tomorrow. Are we going to give up on our youth? Or leave it to chance that they grow up and change their mind after it is too late? Young Americans will make terrible decisions about our leaders, our national security, and our public policies if we don't invest in teaching them the truth! We must do everything in our power TODAY to save America. PragerU has identified roughly 68 million 18-29-year-olds who spend hours on social media every day. We have the content to reach them now, and with your help, we can market our pro-American ideas to a generation in desperate need of a better education. If we don’t change the minds of the next generation, our country will be unrecognizable. With your investment, we can do everything possible to save the most important asset of our time—our youth’s future. | | Copyright © 2024 PragerU All rights reserved. 15021 Ventura Blvd. #552 Sherman Oaks, CA 91403

name: Sarah Elfreth

body:
I will always fight for working people to tear down barriers that prevent people from fully participating in our economy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92012524/495720997/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2QwYWIyMy0zMjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMURq_dUFRp3dps_PMLYoo67UBm4AUdsAWdDe6ZT0Go=&emci=4405bf7e-e666-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7cd0ab23-3269-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=30237190)

| Happy Labor Day!

I’m not like most members of Congress. Growing up, my family didn’t have a lot. But I did have two parents who had something that too many people don’t: a union that fought for them and their family. My parents’ unions didn’t just fight to help them earn better wages and for our family to have stronger benefits. They also helped fund scholarships like the one that sent me to Towson University.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92012527/495720999/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2QwYWIyMy0zMjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMURq_dUFRp3dps_PMLYoo67UBm4AUdsAWdDe6ZT0Go=&emci=4405bf7e-e666-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7cd0ab23-3269-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=30237190)
That’s why I will always fight for working people to tear down barriers that prevent them from fully participating in our economy.

In Congress, I will work tirelessly to make progress on medical leave, parental leave, and caregiver leave. I will also work to reduce childcare costs, expand access to workforce housing, and reduce the burden of student loans.

Onward,
Sarah Elfreth

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92012530/495721002/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2QwYWIyMy0zMjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMURq_dUFRp3dps_PMLYoo67UBm4AUdsAWdDe6ZT0Go=&emci=4405bf7e-e666-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7cd0ab23-3269-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=30237190)

Hi, friend, I'm reaching out to say thank you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92012428/495720661/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2696-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjJhOTkzMy0zMDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjNa5qGNaxEe-ZuzK4KejcJfADUoDwu2-JCJp15OQ1c=)
**Thank you** for being a part of this extraordinary grassroots team.

We're being outspent by the GOP, and recent polls show me statistically tied with my MAGA opponent. And with our Senate majority on the line, you know as well as I do how high the stakes of this race really are.

**So now that it's September, we're in an all-out sprint toward Election Day. ****That's why I have to ask:**

clean_body: | | | One of my favorite parts about being on the campaign trail is meeting supporters just like you, Peter. I truly mean that, and I know Tim feels the same way. That is why I wanted you to know about our Click with the Candidates sweepstakes. You and a friend could meet me and Governor Walz at a special event ahead of Election Day! Our team will cover your hotel and airfare -- and we will even take a photo to capture the moment. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The support this team has shown us since I announced Tim as my running mate has been incredible. We are feeling the energy at every stop in every state we visit, and I am looking forward to meeting the lucky winners. | | With only 64 days until Election Day, every dollar counts. Thank you for being on our team, and best of luck! Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We owe everything from child labor laws to the weekend to the labor movement.
#
Happy Labor Day!
While a lot of folks are just happy for a three day weekend, I can’t think about Labor Day without thinking about all the hard work labor unions and working people across the country have put in to get us where we are.
**Just think — we owe everything from child labor laws to the weekend to the labor movement.** And research has shown over and over again that workers in union jobs are, on average, happier and paid better than those in non-union jobs. The middle class built this country and unions built the middle class.
I’ve worked hard to support working people and the labor movement in the State Senate, and I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of **all of Delaware’s local unions** in my campaign for Congress. Their support means so much to me in many ways.
I’ve pledged that as my first act as your next member of Congress, I’ll sign onto the PRO Act. In Washington, I’ll advance the fight for working families. Together, we can pass paid family and medical leave like we’ve already achieved in Delaware, raise the federal minimum wage, and a long list of worker-friendly policies to make government work better for everyday people.
I always joke that my office in Congress is going to feel like a union hall, but it’s actually a promise, not a joke.
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240902-1&t=1&refcode2=1105_21716_47DULQ&akid=1105%2E21716%2E47DULQ)**

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

body:

| Happy Labor Day, Peter!

Today, we celebrate the hardworking people who keep Northern and Upper Michigan strong and thriving – from farmers who cultivate our land to the teachers who shape our future, the healthcare workers who care for us, and the skilled tradespeople who build and maintain our infrastructure.

Growing up in this district, I saw firsthand the values that make our community unique: hard work, resilience, and a commitment to helping our neighbors. These are the same values that drive my campaign and inspire me every day.

I believe in fighting for fair wages, accessible healthcare, and the rights of workers to be heard. As we approach November, I’m committed to being a voice for our community in Congress.

Thank you for all you do, and I hope you have a restful Labor Day!

Callie Barr

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,
Labor Day is not just a long weekend or the unofficial end of summer. On this day, we celebrate the enduring achievements of workers in our country.

Labor Day is rooted in the Labor Movement of the late 19th Century. At that time, Americans worked unnecessarily long hours and faced the risk of bodily injury as they toiled in unsafe working conditions. Child labor was also at its peak. The advocacy efforts of the Labor Movement earned the protections we enjoy today including safe working conditions for all Americans as well as the abolition of child labor.

In June 1894, President Grover Cleveland signed a bill into law making Labor Day a federal holiday to recognize the tremendous efforts of American workers in building what is now the world’s greatest economy.

We owe a deep debt of gratitude to our workers who power our country forward each and every day. So, as you celebrate this year, please take a moment to remember those who sacrificed so much to earn us the way of life we enjoy, and to thank the workers in your life who keep our economy running today.

Thank you again for everything you do to keep America working for everyone.

Happy Labor Day!

Warm Regards,

Raja

Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: What Labor Day is all about:
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Nothing is a more powerful force for progress than workers linking arms in solidarity.
Happy Labor Day, team!

Today, we recognize the ongoing struggle for labor rights in our country and honor the countless union organizers and activists who have fought tirelessly to secure those rights.

Growing up poor and watching my mom and grandparents work around the clock just to scrape by, _the Labor Movement is personal to me._ I will always stand arm in arm with every worker, union, and labor organizer to advance higher wages, better working conditions, and an economy that benefits the many over the few.

That’s why I supported pro-labor legislation like the PRO Act and the Raise the Wage Act when I was in Congress. On the Education and Labor Committee, I fought for pro-worker policies that uplifted working people in the Lower Hudson Valley.

Unions and the Labor Movement are our frontline defense against low wages, unsafe working conditions, rising wealth inequality, and discrimination. **Nothing is a more powerful force for progress than workers linking arms in solidarity.** That’s why I’m honored to be endorsed by so many labor unions, including AFL-CIO, 1199SEIU, American Federation of Government Employees, Communications Workers of America, New York State Nurses Association, New York State Public Employees Federation, and New York State United Teachers.

I owe my campaign to the countless labor organizers and activists who came before me, and I vow to continue the fight for labor rights and worker dignity now and always.

In solidarity,

Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. name: Matt Diemer
subject: Celebrating Labor Day
body:
| |
---
Peter, Happy Labor Day. I wanted to take this day to appreciate the sacrifices that working men and women in Ohio and America make, and recognize their value to this country. I’ve lived paycheck to paycheck, and I’ve experienced firsthand the sacrifices hardworking Ohioans make every day. As your Congressman, I will do everything possible to protect the interests of working class Ohioans. Unions have done so much to shape the standards of working life in our country. The strides we have made in labor rights are primarily because of unions. Thanks to their efforts, we have the weekend off, enjoy a standard 40-hour work week, and benefit from fair labor practices. Historically, unions have been at the forefront of advocating for equal pay, even during challenging times such as the Jim Crow era and the Civil Rights Movement. They have also been instrumental in improving job safety and ending child labor. Our workers deserve better representation. I will work to increase the minimum wage, secure further protections for union rights, ensure big corporations meet basic working standards, and protect medicare and social security so hardworking Ohioans know they can retire securely. . I’m proud to say we’re running a campaign of the working class. We’re not fueled by donations from the ultra-wealthy and big corporations the way other politicians are. This campaign is about standing up for hardworking Americans and making sure you are heard in Washington. I’m thrilled with our work so far, and I’m so excited to continue on our quest to bring real leadership to Ohio.
---
Sincerely, Matt Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7
---

name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: We can't let Republicans win in Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
What would you do if you were me?
| | |
---
Friend – I don’t like reaching out like this, but what would _you_ do in my situation?
**Right now, I’m the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and experts predict that Nevada could deliver both the White House AND the Senate to Republicans this year.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92014760/495728674/1399008008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjNlNjk2MC0zNDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSiT6EiLhGaBk4KuIARVKYqzsMILJdpu06qzH2a1Mw0=)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Happy Labor Day, PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4049%2E552475%2EDFFBJE)
For over a century, folks across the country have come together on Labor Day to honor the generations of workers who organized and fought for workplace protections that made Americans safer on the job and helped build the middle class.
These were men like my grandfather who, even at age 11, knew that working in the coal mines was a dark and dangerous way to make a living, but he took on the work as a young boy anyway to help his family make ends meet.
These were women like Pennsylvania’s own Mae Krier, one of the original Rosie the Riveters, who served her country by joining the workforce to support our military during World War II.
While we have come a long way over the last century, the work isn’t over. Far too many of our neighbors and workers still lack basic benefits like paid sick leave and family leave. Here in Pennsylvania and across the country, workers are still fighting for a liveable wage, decent benefits, and safe working conditions.
As Senator, I am proud to continue this fight and build on the legacies of folks like my grandfather and Mae. I have fought for legislation that would invest millions of dollars into creating good-paying jobs in Pennsylvania, safeguard thousands of pensions, and protect the right to organize a union.
To the millions of men and women who get up every day and work to provide for their families and strengthen their communities: you are the people who make America the greatest country in the world.
Happy Labor Day, Pennsylvania. I hope I can count on you to fight alongside me and all those working every day to provide for their families and build a better life. We must show support for workers now more than ever.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

* * *

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Happy Labor Day to all!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024?refcode=240902em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024?refcode=240902em]
Hey folks _
I wanted to write you a short note today about Labor Day. I'm down in Buena Vista getting ready to walk in the Buena Vista Labor Day Parade, and later today, I will join many Hampton Roads supporters and union members for my friend Congressman Bobby Scott’s annual Labor Day cookout. But before I do all that, I wanted to take a second to acknowledge why we have this day "off" and what we're celebrating.
Labor unions in Virginia and across America are essential to protecting the rights of our workers across industries. As someone who grew up working in my dad’s union-organized ironworking shop, I know the labor movement is part of our American success story — we band together to have one another's backs, and through that togetherness, we can create a rising tide that lifts all boats.
If you're with me — proud to support workers and labor unions — add your name today to say so! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vd7OIjWFOka8cAE4gj82YQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vd7OIjWFOka8cAE4gj82YQ2]
Thanks for being on my team,
Tim Kaine

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: They are America’s greatest asset
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
**I wanted to take some time today to tell you about America’s greatest asset.** A force that built our country. A force that defended our country. And a force that created the middle-class way of life in our country.
As our nation found itself under attack in World War II, they mobilized in the workplace and on the battlefield, becoming the key to turning the tide against fascism.
In the face of a political status quo that violently defended segregation, voter suppression, and discrimination in countless forms, they united with civil rights leaders to fight equality and justice — and continue to today.
And when union-busters and corporate political machines tried to break them, they banded together to demand dignity for everyday people, securing safer workplaces, 8-hour workdays, weekends, and benefits like paid leave, healthcare, and retirement for millions of Americans — all while building our country from the ground up.
So, any guesses?
**Our country’s greatest asset is the American worker** — and I want to join you this Labor Day in honoring the critical role they’ve played in creating our way of life.
**But celebrating their accomplishments is not enough.**
Massive corporations and the corrupt politicians they’ve bought off have launched an all-out assault on our workers. Through corporate PACs, powerful lobbyists, and state-by-state assaults on unions, now only a handful of massive companies dominate our economy in a system that’s rigged against working people.
It has destroyed family farms, made the costs of life-saving drugs skyrocket, suppressed wages, made it impossible for small businesses to compete, and shipped countless jobs overseas. And after they finish stripping our communities for parts, they leave behind forgotten towns and neighborhoods filled with boarded-up buildings and empty lots.
**It’s class warfare from the top — and this is not a war we can afford to lose.**
We need a new generation of leadership ready to lead, fight, and organize against corrupt corporate elites in both parties who’ve used division and obstruction to prevent every effort to empower American workers — efforts like passing the PRO Act, guaranteeing a living wage, breaking up Big Ag, Big Tech, the pharmaceutical cartels, and the rest of the monopolists whose goal is to destroy our way of life.
Thanks to years of corrupt political leadership in Missouri, our state has become the frontline in this fight. And that’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate to be a warrior for working people — with the support of the Missouri AFL-CIO, Missouri Fire Fighters, and so many other members of organized labor across this state.
I hope you’ll join us on the battlefield.
In solidarity,
Lucas Kunce

_**A note from Team Kunce**_ Without a single cent from corporate PACs, we’ve built a record-breaking, people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. But we can’t afford to slow down now. National insiders and corporate elites are already spending MILLIONS to tear down Lucas and keep control of this Senate seat. **[So if you’re able to support Lucas’ grassroots campaign, please consider making a donation of any amount today:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69999?refcode=em20240902-7517&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7517%2E614464%2EhfbfhL)****[Add a donation →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69999?refcode=em20240902-7517&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7517%2E614464%2EhfbfhL)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240902-7517-footer&t=3&refcode2=7517_614464_hfbfhL&akid=7517%2E614464%2EhfbfhL)**
---

# Massachusetts Republican candidate for US Senate, Ian Cain, goes On The Record
---
[](https://cainforus.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d43ce56ef89bc59b1de5a39e8&id=49517db4e9&e=76cb22207d)
|
---
|
# Guest column: Why state Rep. Michael Soter is backing Ian Cain for U.S. Senate
---
| _Michael Soter_ _Worcester Telegram & Gazette_
I am supporting Republican Ian Cain in his campaign for United States Senate, and I hope you will join me in voting for him in the Sept. 3 Republican Primary.
Ian Cain is a refreshing candidate for Massachusetts, one who can usher in a new generation of leadership. Instead of divisiveness, he embraces results. Rather than rhetoric, he proposes solutions. And I truly think he can win.
Electing a Republican to one of our two Senate seats, especially when it involves challenging an incumbent like Elizabeth Warren, might seem unbelievable or unattainable to many. But when you learn about Ian Cain, I think you will believe in it too.
Ian Cain, a Massachusetts native, has built a career in technology and local governance, tackling complex challenges to make government work for the people, not against them.
Ian Cain understands the importance of fostering innovation and embracing the digital economy to keep America competitive on the global stage. His policies aim to create an environment where businesses can thrive, communities are safe, and the economy can actually grow. Furthermore, Cain's emphasis on improving infrastructure is not just about fixing what is broken but about building for the future — ensuring that Massachusetts remains a leader in innovation and economic growth.
Voters are tired of inauthentic, self-serving politicians. Instead, Ian Cain will bring a new, energetic perspective to Washington. Young, fresh, new faces energize voters and can propel us forward this November.
Supporting Ian Cain for U.S. Senate means endorsing a candidate who is not only ready to fight for Massachusetts but also prepared to bring fresh ideas and a collaborative spirit to the national stage. Most important, he is the only Republican who can actually win. His vision for a more innovative, secure and prosperous America is one that we should all rally behind.
I am proud to endorse and support Ian Cain for U.S. Senate.
_Michael Soter of Bellingham is state representative for the 8th Worcester District._
---

subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Celebrating the contributions of everyone who has helped shape our country

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92016792/495733648/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTczZWQ5Yy0zNjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JAJE6iMWReUwhMnqdFrE_VSQG-D8JNc6Y8UkzrxI1w=&emci=23397bf2-0b67-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=1973ed9c-3669-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=43402272) | Hi Peter,

Happy Labor Day!

Here in Vermont, we owe a great deal to local heroes — from farmers and educators to healthcare workers and small business owners. Today, we recognize and honor the labor unions that have fought tirelessly for workers' rights and laid the groundwork for the benefits we enjoy today. I've seen firsthand the difference that collective action can make, from my time with GEO UAW Local 2322 at UMass Amherst to my work as a teacher with the National Education Association. Thanks to these efforts, we have essential benefits like health insurance, paid sick leave, and fair pay — victories that have made a real difference for millions of Americans.

As we tackle new challenges like income inequality and threats to workers' rights, it’s more important than ever to stand together and protect our progress. **In Congress, I’m committed to supporting the middle class and advocating for everyone’s right to organize and improve working conditions.**

So Peter, let’s spend this Labor Day honoring those who fought for a more just world by continuing to support and uplift our working communities.

Peter, enjoy your day and thanks for all you do!

– Becca
---

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: A personal story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
As a child of hardworking parents, I understand the importance of fair wages and strong unions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92017756/495736576/175592731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjRlOWNlMC0zNzY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-tYetFve6mRbhcoS0Nrpk2chwnAwmpBB4E7659NuDw=)

Peter,

I grew up living in a trailer in a rural small town. My parents did not complete high school, but worked extremely hard in order to provide for their three children.

I am the product of the work ethic my parents instilled in me, and my family's personal journey led me to desire what most Americans want: **A nation that delivers on its promises.** A country where hard work is rewarded and **everyone** has the opportunity to live their own version of the American dream.

I’ve seen firsthand how labor unions can help make the American dream a reality for so many families. My father was not in a union, and our family took on the burden of caring for him when he got sick. Fast forward a generation, and my brother is now a proud member of IBEW. When he got sick, he was provided with the health care he needed for treatment and time off to be with his family.

Labor unions have made immense strides toward safe, fair working conditions — but we still have work to do. That is why I am running for Congress, because I believe in raising the federal minimum wage, wages that keep up with inflation, better retirement plans, and stronger labor unions. And I’m proud to be endorsed by many labor unions — including the Iowa Federation of Labor, AFL-CIO, and UAW.

Unfortunately, my opponent has a very different view on workers in Iowa.

Mariennette Miller-Meeks has a 9% lifetime score from the AFL-CIO. This means she falls lower than the average House Republican in their far-right caucus. And she has consistently voted against bills that would benefit workers, instead opting to vote in favor of the donor class. Iowa workers deserve better than Miller-Meeks representing them in Congress.

This Labor Day, I hope we can all honor workers and unions across the country and commit ourselves to fight every day for them.

Thank you for your hard work,

Christina
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92017757/495736577/175592731?refcode=em24_240902_labord_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240902_labord_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=024e9ce0-3769-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjRlOWNlMC0zNzY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-tYetFve6mRbhcoS0Nrpk2chwnAwmpBB4E7659NuDw=) **Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. She's running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District in Congress because she believes everyone deserves a fair shot.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Christina's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92017758/495736578/175592731?refcode=em24_240902_labord_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240902_labord_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=024e9ce0-3769-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjRlOWNlMC0zNzY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-tYetFve6mRbhcoS0Nrpk2chwnAwmpBB4E7659NuDw=) | [DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92017759/495736580/175592731?refcode=em24_240902_labord_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240902_labord_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=024e9ce0-3769-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjRlOWNlMC0zNzY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-tYetFve6mRbhcoS0Nrpk2chwnAwmpBB4E7659NuDw=)

A country where hard work is rewarded and everyone has the opportunity to live their own version of the American dream. I’ve seen firsthand how labor unions can help make the American dream a reality for so many families. My father was not in a union, and our family took on the burden of caring for him when he got sick. Fast forward a generation, and my brother is now a proud member of IBEW. When he got sick, he was provided with the health care he needed for treatment and time off to be with his family. Labor unions have made immense strides toward safe, fair working conditions — but we still have work to do. That is why I am running for Congress, because I believe in raising the federal minimum wage, wages that keep up with inflation, better retirement plans, and stronger labor unions. And I’m proud to be endorsed by many labor unions — including the Iowa Federation of Labor, AFL-CIO, and UAW. Unfortunately, my opponent has a very different view on workers in Iowa. Mariennette Miller-Meeks has a 9% lifetime score from the AFL-CIO. This means she falls lower than the average House Republican in their far-right caucus. And she has consistently voted against bills that would benefit workers, instead opting to vote in favor of the donor class. Iowa workers deserve better than Miller-Meeks representing them in Congress. This Labor Day, I hope we can all honor workers and unions across the country and commit ourselves to fight every day for them. Thank you for your hard work, Christina = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. She's running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District in Congress because she believes everyone deserves a fair shot. = | = | Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress Christina Bohannan for Congress PO Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52244 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Wesley Bell
subject: My gratitude for America’s laborers is personal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

As we celebrate Labor Day, **I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt appreciation for the hard-working Americans who are the backbone of this nation.**

I am proud to come from a union family and know firsthand the crucial role unions play for workers and the working class. That’s why I was beyond honored to have been endorsed by six labor unions in St. Louis.

Building a stronger economy starts with fortifying workers’ rights and ensuring equity for working Americans. As a former union member (NEA), I understand the importance of standing shoulder-to-shoulder with workers.

I am beyond ready to take this ongoing fight to the halls of Congress, where I will continue to be a strong advocate for workers’ rights and a voice that amplifies the need for fair wages and equitable treatment.

**So today – _and every day_ – I hope you’ll join me in honoring the contributions of laborers from all walks of life and recommit to protecting and expanding workers’ rights for EVERY American.**

Wishing you a safe and restful Labor Day,

Onward,

Wesley

| PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Happy Labor Day, friend!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Labor Day is one of my favorite holidays, friend.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92019635/495741375/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240902_mk_ld&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGQ4N2Y0MC0zYTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9dKVvNTo8pYJkMJZLLWF378LLV9PpQ6MyG04a2Xbhro=)
---
Friend, there are few things I love more than honoring and celebrating the working men and women who keep our country running. **It's what I've tried to do since the day I was elected to Congress, because I believe Ohioans deserve a Congresswoman who works just as hard as you do.** Friend, I'll _**always**_ fight for working people over corporate profits. After all, I grew up in a union family. My dad worked at Toledo Jeep, and my mom helped organize the first labor union at Champion Spark Plug. **That's why I'm especially honored to be serving as the Grand Marshal of the Toledo Labor Day Parade this year.** It means so much to be recognized by the Toledo Federation of Teachers, the Teamsters, UAW, Northwest Ohio Building & Construction Trades Council, Toledo Port Council, and all of the other local unions putting on this parade. I'm so proud to have their support, and I'm proud to go to work every day for working people. Onward, — Marcy
| Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress.

name: Andy Kim
subject: I proudly stand with union workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Today stands as a tribute to the hard work, dedication, and achievements of workers and unions across the nation.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92020507/495742837/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDc1ODYxNy0zYjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9YnRu_NIpezhQTpCY56Ykz-nlP0eVZA_ZKV1S-z1bc=&emci=35993d11-0767-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=24758617-3b69-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Happy Labor Day! Today stands as a tribute to the hard work, dedication, and achievements of workers and unions across the nation. This holiday has its roots in the labor movement of the late 19th century, when labor leaders and activists advocated for fair wages, reasonable working hours, and safe working conditions – and the fight continues today. I proudly stand with union workers and the labor movement, and I'm honored to have the endorsement of groups like:
* New Jersey State AFL-CIO
* New Jersey Education Association and the National Education Association
* SEIU 32BJ
* Communications Workers of America
* Retail, Wholesale and Department Store Union
* American Federation of Government Employees
* Actors' Equity Association
* UAW, Region 9
* Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen
* SEIU New Jersey State Council and 1199SEIU United Healthcare Workers East
* District 1199J, National Union of Hospital and Health Care Employees, AFSCME, AFL-CIO

**As Senator, I'll continue the fight to help secure better working conditions, better pay, and a better quality of life for all working families, and I'm proud to have these unions with me in this election.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92020508/495742838/-1197072038?refcode=2024-09-02-labor&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=24758617-3b69-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDc1ODYxNy0zYjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9YnRu_NIpezhQTpCY56Ykz-nlP0eVZA_ZKV1S-z1bc=) It's time to honor the contributions of workers in all fields, recognizing that their efforts are fundamental to the strength of our communities and economy. clean_body: Today stands as a tribute to the hard work, dedication, and achievements of workers and unions across the nation. | | | | Happy Labor Day! Today stands as a tribute to the hard work, dedication, and achievements of workers and unions across the nation. This holiday has its roots in the labor movement of the late 19th century, when labor leaders and activists advocated for fair wages, reasonable working hours, and safe working conditions – and the fight continues today. I proudly stand with union workers and the labor movement, and I'm honored to have the endorsement of groups like: New Jersey State AFL-CIO New Jersey Education Association and the National Education Association SEIU 32BJ Communications Workers of America Retail, Wholesale and Department Store Union American Federation of Government Employees Actors' Equity Association UAW, Region 9 Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen SEIU New Jersey State Council and 1199SEIU United Healthcare Workers East District 1199J, National Union of Hospital and Health Care Employees, AFSCME, AFL-CIO As Senator, I'll continue the fight to help secure better working conditions, better pay, and a better quality of life for all working families, and I'm proud to have these unions with me in this election. = It's time to honor the contributions of workers in all fields, recognizing that their efforts are fundamental to the strength of our communities and economy. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm just a guy driving a union-made Jeep and fighting for the Dignity of Work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Bernie Moreno has shown who he is time and again, so we should believe him.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92020519/495742851/-388113348?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_BrownSplit_240902_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc1ODYxNy0zYjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQafjsWilsjFwGzott44Df8BkVaXJ1H_dqz5AkvUVp0=) Team – my Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno, has shown who he is time and again, so we should believe him.
* He's the guy who stole his employees' overtime wages and then shredded the evidence.
* He's the guy who used a taxpayer-funded police escort for a joyride on closed public roads in his $3.4 million sports car.
* He's the guy who's gone on the record to say he's "100% pro-life with no exceptions" and would vote against the will of Ohio voters for a national abortion ban in the Senate.

I hope you already know this, but in case you don't, I want to be clear: I'm the guy that drives a union-made Jeep, fights for the Dignity of Work, and has always supported reproductive freedom.

But I'm worried. Polls show this race is statistically tied, and Republicans are spending record amounts to defeat me because they know Ohio will decide Senate control. **Now, I'm counting on a massive surge in grassroots support to right the ship before it's too late.**

[**_Please, will you split $5, $25, or anything you can spare right now between me and the Ohio Dems to help me win here in Ohio, save our Senate majority, and keep making progress for working families?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92020521/495742853/-388113348?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_BrownSplit_240902_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc1ODYxNy0zYjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQafjsWilsjFwGzott44Df8BkVaXJ1H_dqz5AkvUVp0=) He's the guy who's gone on the record to say he's "100% pro-life with no exceptions" and would vote against the will of Ohio voters for a national abortion ban in the Senate. I hope you already know this, but in case you don't, I want to be clear: I'm the guy that drives a union-made Jeep, fights for the Dignity of Work, and has always supported reproductive freedom. But I'm worried. Polls show this race is statistically tied, and Republicans are spending record amounts to defeat me because they know Ohio will decide Senate control. Now, I'm counting on a massive surge in grassroots support to right the ship before it's too late. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Sherrod Brown and the Ohio Democratic Party: = = = = = = Thank you, Sherrod | Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? →** | = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Hillsdale College via America First War Room
subject: Put Constitution 101 on television
body:
Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAURb_meEbk7GMneOAB99J0ULVClTpg6LzAKG6CE0j5-4qUdnoeay9tF4bOtzdL-T8Cjr4eCSDeEHDezyFeTuHleXV617w6Z29B37f4T8B0G5q_0wclaYLz3X2ab0Vtua2lEo1Nc2isTaqVOFoYlZd1CamZK27XDm1mSgWzRpWyYeEtJJQ0EqnSuTRJU6LUrYJjAI5rUnLJSVxooq9cOk6zi7HvQ1L1QXT2OE3DuIgVhGKOffJ5qbrmMv68VX0gFA9lQnElFNl19_oVN-2giIulBd7OB7n_2D2dWURbD7PvOj9mOSl5-MWIq8V3AAAA__9naGCd)
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muIHMGGM4cGjXoZW22UrbqlJPkbFN8MoG1jaJ8vZVUJqj_9-a-eaTfnV2vHXAvwLiZHUERKBfAPHz79WH7cO_fss_3hnNP-s3z-4tvgBiuq3m-fUxpTBeWndPuch0R0dNqsx0JUeGTVuyKps6LQemBjbycmiRkaFGTrBueTk2pGwazGyHBCvSEiwrxklbmAEHNlYoKSJKqqEi-55CehOskmVMVxnCsvhCLT5z3ZTSGnewHrCPRm3B6GKyzkUtnSmM3gD75xuw1yFdplEB7aMCKgihvHwjWOEP1ouf4nD4BVhvyZ_isgVlgIo1LHE1Ktn5_Ki80XbzQMVDwh4q6VdpzzNQId5___nev_wvljmZOQEVNxPn5TScDuKY6yF_YuXGkzond9_1TnV8bZEcjk0WOr1erXM21hwqct5l3E-_dPgvAAD__7Y4j18) Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don’t worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff...
* Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven’t read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn’t read one of our most important founding documents! But there’s one more stat I’d like to give you...

* 26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment—not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly—not a single one.

These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It’s the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That’s why we’ve been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I’m excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, “**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ,” that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **[“Constitution 101” directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muIHMGGM4cGjXoZW22UrbqlJPkbFN8MoG1jaJ8vZVUJqj_9-a-eaTfnV2vHXAvwLiZHUERKBfAPHz79WH7cO_fss_3hnNP-s3z-4tvgBiuq3m-fUxpTBeWndPuch0R0dNqsx0JUeGTVuyKps6LQemBjbycmiRkaFGTrBueTk2pGwazGyHBCvSEiwrxklbmAEHNlYoKSJKqqEi-55CehOskmVMVxnCsvhCLT5z3ZTSGnewHrCPRm3B6GKyzkUtnSmM3gD75xuw1yFdplEB7aMCKgihvHwjWOEP1ouf4nD4BVhvyZ_isgVlgIo1LHE1Ktn5_Ki80XbzQMVDwh4q6VdpzzNQId5___nev_wvljmZOQEVNxPn5TScDuKY6yF_YuXGkzond9_1TnV8bZEcjk0WOr1erXM21hwqct5l3E-_dPgvAAD__7Y4j18)**
## Do you think Americans should learn the history and meaning of the Constitution on TV?
[YES](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muIHMGGM4cGjXoZW22UrbqlJPkbFN8MoG1jaJ8vZVUJqj_9-a-eaTfnV2vHXAvwLiZHUERKBfAPHz79WH7cO_fss_3hnNP-s3z-4tvgBiuq3m-fUxpTBeWndPuch0R0dNqsx0JUeGTVuyKps6LQemBjbycmiRkaFGTrBueTk2pGwazGyHBCvSEiwrxklbmAEHNlYoKSJKqqEi-55CehOskmVMVxnCsvhCLT5z3ZTSGnewHrCPRm3B6GKyzkUtnSmM3gD75xuw1yFdplEB7aMCKgihvHwjWOEP1ouf4nD4BVhvyZ_isgVlgIo1LHE1Ktn5_Ki80XbzQMVDwh4q6VdpzzNQId5___nev_wvljmZOQEVNxPn5TScDuKY6yF_YuXGkzond9_1TnV8bZEcjk0WOr1erXM21hwqct5l3E-_dPgvAAD__7Y4j18) [NO](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muIHMGGM4cGjXoZW22UrbqlJPkbFN8MoG1jaJ8vZVUJqj_9-a-eaTfnV2vHXAvwLiZHUERKBfAPHz79WH7cO_fss_3hnNP-s3z-4tvgBiuq3m-fUxpTBeWndPuch0R0dNqsx0JUeGTVuyKps6LQemBjbycmiRkaFGTrBueTk2pGwazGyHBCvSEiwrxklbmAEHNlYoKSJKqqEi-55CehOskmVMVxnCsvhCLT5z3ZTSGnewHrCPRm3B6GKyzkUtnSmM3gD75xuw1yFdplEB7aMCKgihvHwjWOEP1ouf4nD4BVhvyZ_isgVlgIo1LHE1Ktn5_Ki80XbzQMVDwh4q6VdpzzNQId5___nev_wvljmZOQEVNxPn5TScDuKY6yF_YuXGkzond9_1TnV8bZEcjk0WOr1erXM21hwqct5l3E-_dPgvAAD__7Y4j18) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they’ve been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I’m excited about this and why it’s so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible—so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It’s also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing “Constitution 101” on television networks isn’t as expensive as you might think. To air the ** _30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We’ve negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the “big game.” So, airing one 30-minute segment of “**Constitution 101** ” on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200—which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muIHMGGM4cGjXoZW22UrbqlJPkbFN8MoG1jaJ8vZVUJqj_9-a-eaTfnV2vHXAvwLiZHUERKBfAPHz79WH7cO_fss_3hnNP-s3z-4tvgBiuq3m-fUxpTBeWndPuch0R0dNqsx0JUeGTVuyKps6LQemBjbycmiRkaFGTrBueTk2pGwazGyHBCvSEiwrxklbmAEHNlYoKSJKqqEi-55CehOskmVMVxnCsvhCLT5z3ZTSGnewHrCPRm3B6GKyzkUtnSmM3gD75xuw1yFdplEB7aMCKgihvHwjWOEP1ouf4nD4BVhvyZ_isgVlgIo1LHE1Ktn5_Ki80XbzQMVDwh4q6VdpzzNQId5___nev_wvljmZOQEVNxPn5TScDuKY6yF_YuXGkzond9_1TnV8bZEcjk0WOr1erXM21hwqct5l3E-_dPgvAAD__7Y4j18)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muIHMGGM4cGjXoZW22UrbqlJPkbFN8MoG1jaJ8vZVUJqj_9-a-eaTfnV2vHXAvwLiZHUERKBfAPHz79WH7cO_fss_3hnNP-s3z-4tvgBiuq3m-fUxpTBeWndPuch0R0dNqsx0JUeGTVuyKps6LQemBjbycmiRkaFGTrBueTk2pGwazGyHBCvSEiwrxklbmAEHNlYoKSJKqqEi-55CehOskmVMVxnCsvhCLT5z3ZTSGnewHrCPRm3B6GKyzkUtnSmM3gD75xuw1yFdplEB7aMCKgihvHwjWOEP1ouf4nD4BVhvyZ_isgVlgIo1LHE1Ktn5_Ki80XbzQMVDwh4q6VdpzzNQId5___nev_wvljmZOQEVNxPn5TScDuKY6yF_YuXGkzond9_1TnV8bZEcjk0WOr1erXM21hwqct5l3E-_dPgvAAD__7Y4j18)** After reading those statistics, I’m sure you’ll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only “a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people.”** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFuqzAQRb9mvAsy13YICy_ea0oXlaqqUhdZ2tgkjnAgNhTl76uktNs7M2eOroljH7qbpuo_AafgMgEk_hFwPSwxzef4-rI5fyixuW7forpP8UTAdBv93-pKKXw0ob-n1Z45LTrHJfO6rKCwq0sl2UnXpRLOdxbSVtiiVRyqNM53crfzyioWNDgkrzlKqSpeF97Cqk7CCABGOJL88acw0afQmjJPi0lpGGLRDpH1-jRNY36INYRmSUNxmdvez_nnrB0ioVmVCU2ebW5TGKcwXDKhmS9rYj2J5lGJ2C9Hfvh8f74KlrQbl9D3IW8rkvz4y2RfGt8BAAD__1x4Z3I)
