name: Adam Schiff
subject: Unions deserve a fighter in California’s next U.S. Senator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=7362%2E5257348%2EBZzFFO ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Happy Labor Day,
Derek.

If you appreciate weekends, paid leave and vacation, health benefits,
overtime pay, minimum wage, sick leave, lunch hours, and more, thank a
union. Their fight for workers made it possible. And their fight
continues. I’m so proud to be with them.

I’ve been standing up for California’s workers and working families for my
whole life — they’ve always had my back, and I will always have theirs.

That’s why I kicked off my U.S. Senate campaign at the IATSE Local 80
union hall in Burbank last year — the same place where I kicked off my
first Congressional campaign.

It’s why I’ve stood on the picket line alongside striking workers and
fought to protect the right to organize the workplace for better wages and
working conditions.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sept2024_abs_em.p0j6ot&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=7362%2E5257348%2EBZzFFO ]Adam on the picket line with Writers Guild of America

It’s why I’m so proud to have the support of over 30 statewide labor
unions — which represent some of the hardest-working people fighting to
build the middle class across California and the rest of our country — and
labor champions like Senator María Elena Durazo.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sept2024_abs_em.p0j6ot&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=7362%2E5257348%2EBZzFFO ]Adam and Senator María Elena Durazo

It’s why I’ve been a vocal advocate for the Protecting the Right to
Organize Act, which helps unionizing workers, providing them protections
when bargaining for better wages, benefits, and safer workplaces. In the
Senate, I’ll do everything I can to pass this legislation — including
abolishing the filibuster.

Unions built the middle class and deserve a fighter in California’s next
U.S. Senator. That’s how we create an economy that works for everyone.

I’m a loud and proud supporter of the labor movement, and [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=sept2024_abs_em.a1Ivk6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=7362%2E5257348%2EBZzFFO ]I hope you’ll
support my campaign to help me fight for unions and workers from the
United States Senate. With barely two months until Election Day, any
amount makes a difference.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sept2024_abs_em.ak_Y1R&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1007&akid=7362%2E5257348%2EBZzFFO ]EXPRESS DONATE

subject: Happy Labor Day!

body:
Today, we celebrate and honor the work and sacrifices that workers across our country have made to build and strengthen this country.

Hi there Peter, it’s Michelle Vallejo. Happy Labor Day! Today, we celebrate and honor the work and sacrifices that workers across our country have made to build and strengthen this country. I am proud to stand with workers today and every day. As someone who grew up at Pulga Los Portales, my family and I helped dozens of working-class entrepreneurs start and run their own businesses and provide for their families. And I’m running for Congress to continue fighting for workers and unions here in South Texas and beyond. We must stand together in our fight for higher wages, for stronger unions, and for the future of all our families. Together, I know we will keep fighting and WIN BIG for worker’s rights, the working class, _and_ democracy in November. Happy Labor Day, Peter. I’m grateful to have you on this team. — Michelle
* * *

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi there Peter, it’s Michelle Vallejo. Happy Labor Day! Today, we celebrate and honor the work and sacrifices that workers across our country have made to build and strengthen this country. I am proud to stand with workers today and every day. As someone who grew up at Pulga Los Portales, my family and I helped dozens of working-class entrepreneurs start and run their own businesses and provide for their families. And I’m running for Congress to continue fighting for workers and unions here in South Texas and beyond. We must stand together in our fight for higher wages, for stronger unions, and for the future of all our families. Together, I know we will keep fighting and WIN BIG for worker’s rights, the working class, and democracy in November. Happy Labor Day, Peter. I’m grateful to have you on this team. — Michelle | | | ---|---|--- = My name is Michelle Vallejo, and I'm running to represent TX-15 — the most competitive congressional seat in the state**. The stakes have never been higher! The Biden admin wants

exposed for it.

The vice president is

head.

Kamala Harris is in

ABOUT
US
The

political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates

subject: Peter, Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92027800/495760238/985656312?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2IzNTIzMS00OTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2SUbNifsocsHT11aT5XZDe1b2CAT1lBHuxZoyltgQCQ=) Happy Labor Day! Today, we celebrate the labor movement, and I want to take the time to recognize the contributions of all of the hardworking people right here in OH-13 that are the backbone of this community and economy. We have come so far in the fight for workers rights. From establishing the 8-hour workday, to raising wages, and improving health and safety standards, unions have played a critical role in building the middle class. _**But there is more work to do—including passing the Protecting the Right to Organize, or PRO, Act.**_ I know that unions built the strongest middle class our community and nation has ever seen. It’s why every day in Congress, I have been a strong voice in the fight for workers’ rights and have always advocated for higher wages, better benefits, protecting our unions and the right to organize, and safer working conditions. I am proud to stand in solidarity with our working class families, and I am running for re-election so I can continue to do so, but I need your support. [**Can you please chip in $5 or whatever you can today, so I can bring home a win for all of Northeast Ohio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92027802/495760239/985656312?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2IzNTIzMS00OTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2SUbNifsocsHT11aT5XZDe1b2CAT1lBHuxZoyltgQCQ=) | [**CHIP IN NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92027803/495760240/985656312?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2IzNTIzMS00OTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2SUbNifsocsHT11aT5XZDe1b2CAT1lBHuxZoyltgQCQ=)

Happy Labor Day,
_Emilia Sykes_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: NEXTGENAMERICA.ORG
subject: Take a break from fighting for workers' rights? Couldn’t be us
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/92027858/495760295/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGIzNTIzMS00OTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ko-rNwn9Qu9CVS2ZR6LJb58yT35BEqJusV38hKZYrKk=&emci=fe0f37f6-ec66-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=cdb35231-4969-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)
---
It’s Labor Day, folks. And while that means barbecues, sales, and a long weekend for some, today represents a long history of workers standing up for their rights.
The first Labor Day in 1882 wasn’t just a holiday — it was a day of protest and solidarity. _Thousands_ of workers took to the streets, demanding better wages, safer working conditions, and respect for the labor that built this nation.
**It was a day born out of struggle, dedicated to the belief that every worker deserves dignity and fair treatment.**
Nowadays, those same workers wouldn’t even have today off. And that’s not the only injustice we’re still fighting against.
Too many workers are still facing unsafe conditions, insultingly low wages, and a lack of respect in the workplace. **_The holiday’s true meaning can be overshadowed by sales and leisure, but we have the power to reclaim its spirit._**
[If you’re ready to stand up and fight injustice, add your name today and join the movement for workers’ rights. We can’t make a difference without you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/92027860/495760297/1141450537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGIzNTIzMS00OTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ko-rNwn9Qu9CVS2ZR6LJb58yT35BEqJusV38hKZYrKk=&emci=fe0f37f6-ec66-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=cdb35231-4969-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: It’s Labor Day, folks. And while that means barbecues, sales, and a long weekend for some, today represents a long history of workers standing up for their rights. The first Labor Day in 1882 wasn’t just a holiday — it was a day of protest and solidarity. Thousands of workers took to the streets, demanding better wages, safer working conditions, and respect for the labor that built this nation. It was a day born out of struggle, dedicated to the belief that every worker deserves dignity and fair treatment. Nowadays, those same workers wouldn’t even have today off. And that’s not the only injustice we’re still fighting against. Too many workers are still facing unsafe conditions, insultingly low wages, and a lack of respect in the workplace. The holiday’s true meaning can be overshadowed by sales and leisure, but we have the power to reclaim its spirit. | In solidarity ✊ NextGen America | = |

This doesn't make any sense, folks:
**A group of generous donors is matching every donation supporters make to my campaign until midnight, but somehow we're still short of our daily fundraising goal.**
National Republicans have made defeating me a top priority and experts are rating my Senate race a tossup, so I really need your support to compete against my self-funding opponent and the waves of outside spending crashing into Montana.
This slowdown could not have come at a worse time. While outside special interest groups ramp up, with $4 million in new spending, our fundraising is slowing to a crawl.
I’m not here to beg for a donation, but falling short has real consequences. If everyone who received this email chipped in $5, we could close the gap _tonight_ , but the truth is not everyone will.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Sign on: Tell Mike Johnson to pass the PRO Act ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Americans have been observing Labor Day for 142 years now.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240902-4257-footer&t=1&akid=4257%2E420207%2ENTPL_F)
Happy Labor Day, Peter!
**Americans have been observing Labor Day for 142 years now**. Since 1882! It’s a day to celebrate not just the work they’ve done, but also the battles they’ve won.
After all, it was labor unions that gave us concepts like the weekend, overtime pay, child labor laws, and workplace safety rules. It’s impossible to overstate their impact, and yet we take so much of it for granted.
That’s why each and every day, I’m proud to stand and fight alongside working people across America. We’ve made so much progress together. But make no mistake, we still have a long way to go.
Republican politicians funded by big corporations are actively trying to reverse all of the progress labor unions have made up to this point. It’s why they’ve passed so-called “right to work laws” in several states that make it much harder to join and operate a union.
They know, as we know, that **unions empower working people**. So sitting back and letting big business gut labor unions is not an option.
In Congress, we can fight back by passing the **PRO Act** into law _today_. It would reverse those so-called “right to work” laws and ensure every American has the right to join and benefit from a union.
[**If you’re with us in the fight to empower working people across America, will you add your name to the petition calling on Mike Johnson to allow a vote on the PRO Act today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pass-pro-act-em20240902/?source=em20240902&akid=4257%2E420207%2ENTPL_F)
**[Sign on →](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pass-pro-act-em20240902/?source=em20240902&akid=4257%2E420207%2ENTPL_F)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240902-4257-footer&t=2&refcode2=4257_420207_NTPL_F&akid=4257%2E420207%2ENTPL_F)**

name: Team AOC
subject: There is power in a union! 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
The labor movement is heating up — **recent polls show that a record 70% of Americans support labor unions** ,1 and the better pay, healthcare, and workplace protections that they come with.
The **Emergency Workplace Organizing Committee** (EWOC) is organizing every day to bring those benefits to non-union workers across the country, providing support and training to help folks win the changes they want to see at work.
Any worker — in any industry, anywhere in the country — can call on EWOC to respond to emergencies faced by workers on the job.
To celebrate this Labor Day, **we’re uplifting EWOC's work in case you, or someone you know, could benefit from the power of a union** in your workplace.
[And if you’re able, help EWOC reach the millions of workers in the U.S. who don’t have a union to turn to. Will you make a $5 donation today to power their mission to protect working people everywhere?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240902-ewoc.wLbVhe&refcode=em20240902-7128-P_FND_CHA_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240902-ewoc.wLbVhe&refcode=em20240902-7128-P_FND_CHA_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)**
The act of **organizing means coming together to address issues important to you as a worker** , from sexual harassment to wages, bullying, and benefits.
We’re seeing workers rise up across the country to demand better pay and better working conditions — **just last week, unionized flight attendants at United Airlines voted by 99.99% to authorize a strike** as they negotiate for better wages, schedule flexibility, and retirement.2
💪 **If you’re a worker looking for organizing support,[sign up to speak to an Emergency Workplace Organizing Committee (EWOC) organizer here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/29802?utm_source=em20240902-7128&t=21&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)**
💪 Sign up to [get directly involved with EWOC’s organizing here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/29803?utm_source=em20240902-7128&t=22&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)
And if you’re able, [ please support EWOC’s mission to build better workplaces across the country with a $5 contribution today this Labor Day.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240902-ewoc.wLbVhe&refcode=em20240902-7128-P_FND_CHA_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240902-ewoc.wLbVhe&refcode=em20240902-7128-P_FND_CHA_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)**
Now is the time for workers to come together in collective action to address ongoing issues and organize themselves. Present your demands in a way that’s clear and concise — **it is your right as a worker to take necessary action**.
And don’t forget: **We stand with you!**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**Common Dreams** : Support for Unions Hits 70-Year High as US Workers See Power of Organized Labor](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/29804?t=25&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)
2 - [**NBC** : United flight attendants vote in favor of strike: What it could mean for travel plans](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/29805?t=26&akid=7128%2E2526796%2EWCNvAL)

We’re seeing workers rise up across the country to demand better pay and better working conditions — just last week, unionized flight attendants at United Airlines voted by 99.99% to authorize a strike as they negotiate for better wages, schedule flexibility, and retirement.2 💪 If you’re a worker looking for organizing support, 💪 Sign up to And if you’re able, Now is the time for workers to come together in collective action to address ongoing issues and organize themselves. Present your demands in a way that’s clear and concise — it is your right as a worker to take necessary action. And don’t forget: We stand with you! In solidarity, Team AOC 1 - 2 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Trump will win unless we step up

body:

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Can I please make a case for your support?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)

Friend --
In just a few weeks, the first votes will be cast in Michigan for the U.S. Senate and presidential races.
With your permission, I’d appreciate the chance to make the case for why a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate before that happens is one of the most strategic contributions you can make today.
Let me start with what you probably already instinctively know: Michigan is going to be a critical state for the 2024 campaign.
There is no winning the White House without Michigan. For Democrats, there is no holding the Senate without Michigan. Even our House delegation rests on a one-seat Democratic majority.
But you were probably already sold on the importance of Michigan. So, aside from the fact that control of the U.S. Senate is at stake (!), what about my race? Why donate to my campaign?
This is one of the rare open Senate races without an incumbent running -- in fact, it’s one of the few competitive races in the entire country. That means we have A LOT of introducing of me to do across the state. A recent poll showed about 50% of the state knows me, across our 11 media markets.
Reaching those folks takes resources, and that's not something I can do without you.
Add the fact that this is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country -- not just with candidate spending, but outside spending too.
And I'll close with the news that in all of my elections, I have historically done better than Democrats usually do in the "redder" areas of the state. That means I am finding and pulling voters other races couldn't, and that is good for Kamala Harris and every other Democrat on the ballot on Election Day.
So yes, this race is kind of a unicorn. It's a unique situation where control of the White House and Congress is on the line, most voters don't know the candidates yet, and the Democratic Senate candidate can help the top of the ticket.
[**That's why I am asking for your support: Can I count on you to make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate before early voting begins? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep24.1Cpmdt&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=2&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep24.hgGmcr&amount=3&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=21&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep24.q1Ta44&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=22&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep24.FsOTX_&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=23&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sep24.t6R_Gf&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=24&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sep24.X12NXS&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=25&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep24.hgGmcr&refcode=em240902-2-900&t=26&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)**
---
****
Thank you very much,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=28&akid=1864%2E135344%2EMCE3St)

name: George Latimer
subject: What Labor Day means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=qsdgVPt%2BazND1tp8%2F6tCRpqPBQQKW%2Bmos5mwDq0MBhNniGXZ9XnFHmTGT7ay5pGewSALo8rTtMFCE8Jw4NshIvSDS3%2Bc1TkPSklVINzESMThKuSS6Rn%2FxgVEJGYUl234Vo1gLWiaarJ6cBbxNR7stJ7RliISS%2FnXANAJEDATQnJcf9zqe1gTJANWsFj7%2Fbx6%2FTmOQKyLiiJc4vYbxX%2FeeMPmWchlcHirmaPmMpZnNZSQ0PDNXy5vaSNDy54r1Nt625g7k1OAPDrhYyW%2FQoFGKRPfbBKmKGzkaqZGHEifgrBeHRi23liDKISQNF7mem1iKtPI8ZsIhMH2JoIgH8P4sk39PFmkDiQw3GXFcZf9eKTUNgxms7OPt5vJzbz8UMFodEhG5rdUNwbVAsJF0prImflL%2FynI7poVyHfL7Xa2tryGW0tfmFXwIvnKOQVQJQDB]

# [#]
Hey Peter,

Labor unions are the backbone of democracy

All working people should be treated fairly, with decent paychecks and benefits, safe jobs, dignity and equal opportunities. I’m proud to have received the endorsement of labor unions across NY-16:

# [#]

Unions grant working people a collective voice to address workplace injustices without the fear of retaliation. As many of us enjoy today as a day off from work, we must also use it as a reminder of what it means to fight for social and economic justice and strive to eradicate oppression in all its forms.

Every worker deserves the right to bargain over their salary and working conditions — that’s why Labor Day is more than just a holiday. In Congress, I will continue to fight tooth and nail for working-class New Yorkers.

Happy Labor Day, Peter. Thank you for being a part of the fight to protect workers’ rights, and make our world a better place to live and work in.

— George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]

George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Kean MacLelland
subject: Your Kean for Congress Weekly Update 9-2-2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc _Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress_
body:
Updates from our week in the field| | |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=4c528e6ebbee41dfa3849d4ad645e639&_e=iDx9JtvwLyOqLQAnrAFGP2fwj9l0mr9oQzGNaHRH-CQiSNgk5zkPbYBCDc_koMe8cKUr13sFbJ7XFkhX2Wc7bxnIN3zQUnF_-5OsqXyUcRxtzY_PpYG8t_PvUu8uWUxbQ-dDcTKuUXPRKlDYEYBw91CTMEhKjB4BEqSKbcUWUvSUWLVO27HjHNUhuAmkXQG-l2uVz26F224Fhwyr2_ih0A%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Happy Monday and Happy Labor Day! Welcome back to another edition of our weekly Kean for Congress newsletter update. I will keep this message short so you can get back to enjoying your holiday, whether that is resting with friends and family, spending time down the shore, or catching up on some much-needed rest and relaxation. Last week, Tom spent much of his time traveling across the district for events and meetings. He had the opportunity to sit with business leaders and constituents, announced some big endorsements, and visited Community Project Sites in NJ07 towns which are currently going through the FY25 appropriations process. More on all this below. Our Field Team spent their week hitting the pavement and phones ahead of the long weekend. Our volunteers joined our field team in the final week of our summer push before we expand our operations for our _**critical**_ GOTV efforts. It has been great to see their energy in our offices and in the field every day. We are so grateful for all of their hard work. In my coming emails, I will be outlining everything you need to know about voting on or before Election Day. __**Vote-by-mail ballots will start to be sent out on Sept. 20th**__ \- less than 20 days away already. If you are reading this, we will need your help. Please consider signing up to volunteer using one of the many links below. Together, we will get out the voters needed to make November 2024 a great success. Are you ready to work hard to deliver Republican victories in November, and send Tom Kean, Jr. back to Congress? To get involved, [please visit our website](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=4c528e6ebbee41dfa3849d4ad645e639&_e=iDx9JtvwLyOqLQAnrAFGP_aqiSe54WiXgFFelnfZVZAj3JzsDXxxA_Td64uGnkETIhQauJvyPTP5Tcswrpox59NXC9pUPv9nwbHVvO9CGbOxl6El1PJehhLh0N9-ttfRo6zzCNGZfgVC9PvZmMUgq90FReLKRseE0L98OUjCKTyJ4zuZYoZEmBOGIpA3rh_GrHOQd1VQ3VPubmCwsNWeQxUbwE-j6JMsiM5jfr-lw7w%3D). Read more below to stay up-to-date on everything Kean for Congress has been up to!
---
| | [**Sign Up to Volunteer**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=4c528e6ebbee41dfa3849d4ad645e639&_e=iDx9JtvwLyOqLQAnrAFGP_aqiSe54WiXgFFelnfZVZAj3JzsDXxxA_Td64uGnkETyH6cDzLuDjah4jyu5qCruAIAk7rWmqogBhYtkvlsg-YQjt5v3MiktWhd6b11XTRC4FCCt89AJY6pR7z-8HWmopi7wiSfmEoU6tc_tKnRhJ98utZCxxF_4aMypr2v5qwAo_nnUEdOksc1kCRnGAlDap_edxKDmGAi2BvpNo3eF-M%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **✅ Kean Constituent Services Return Over $8 Million to NJ-07 Residents ✅**
---
| | On August 30th, Tom announced that his Constituent Services operation, based out of his District Office in Bernardsville, has now returned more than __**$8,652,279**__ to constituents. Since his office opened in January of 2023, Congressman Kean and his team have closed over 2,641 constituent cases. Constituent services will always continue be Tom's #1 priority as your Congressman, and we are so grateful to his government team as well for all that they do for NJ07! Read more [here](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=4c528e6ebbee41dfa3849d4ad645e639&_e=iDx9JtvwLyOqLQAnrAFGPyUAdfs6vWpo71i_xJIGvZQvSIpUALjF9nkY0SLEzTrubBIREG6M0WNDTQTsPr9teHI8Xh-bpgvDSyPNTvIQNJpb435hHmVaokmc6jDFqRkYGkJb148WwLIgtlzGZXWf_cweOBvpEwpd45SmwEqBKj6CzWOojKjJGZpOxwVItlu5PViabCY_IWeDYnV-1iEG1Kzt3tuLMhxGHc0PbgrGozLggnM-9wCURG6tZd67S36S9YbvAAr-xtG69KiMRNomkD3WyvLB1krF4Ewbawzc277EEqmtWNPRfgz5Ltc39nA4). _“I am excited to share that our constituent service team has returned over $8 million dollars back to constituents through our casework services. This achievement underscores our commitment to serving New Jerseyans and ensuring they receive the benefits and assistance they’re entitled to. This is a testament to the hard work of my team and our unwavering commitment to addressing the needs of every individual we represent.” _ _-**Congressman Tom Kean, Jr.**_
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | **Field Update**
---
| | [**Sign Up to Volunteer!**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=4c528e6ebbee41dfa3849d4ad645e639&_e=iDx9JtvwLyOqLQAnrAFGP_aqiSe54WiXgFFelnfZVZAj3JzsDXxxA_Td64uGnkET4a7yxkTVwXks0DV6logdbicREIiBv6yXTQExURwtV-7Bp2kthOwe7L2Qv-Mq3qjhvjlf5XqP2jq1aKaTZjv_NyrQaDk7YCmxHNR65r3qYJyDNiWu20FzeMqXTPLJ6nx8wDQoH0IK8nsi53R5_kG5kS0FsjuwWAQklIGRXizfymE%3D)
---
| | Things in the field are beginning to really ramp up. This past week, our Field Team spent time in all six counties, meeting with our fantastic county organizations and leadership, candidates, recruiting new volunteers, and launching our door knocking and phone banking efforts. Despite the long, final weekend of summer, they had the opportunity to speak with hundreds of voters excited about participating in the general election. Over the coming weeks, we will be working closely with these candidates and organizations on vote-by-mail return efforts, GOTV door and phone efforts, and encouraging voters to participate in early voting. We will also be joined by many motivated partners from the labor organizations that have endorsed Tom - ensuring our message reaches every corner of the district. If you have been looking for the right time to step up and get involved, now is your chance. We just over 60 days until the Election, there is no time to waste, and every day needs to count. Our door knocking program has continued with efforts covering towns like _**Sparta**_ ; _**Belvidere**_ ; _**Mendham Borough**_ ; _**Raritan Township**_ ; _**Clinton Town**_ ; _**Bridgewater**_ ; _**Raritan Borough**_ ; _**Somerville**_ ; _**Westfield**_ ; _**New Providence**_ ; and _**Summit**_. We also are hosting launches in coordination with our county and municipal organizations in _**New Providence, Springfield, Mountainside, Summit, Sparta, Washington Township, Mendham Township, Raritan Township, Washington Borough, and more**_ over the coming weeks. I am proud of our team's efforts in recent months which have produced over 30,000 door knocks and over 100,000 phone calls. **Tom Kean Jr.** is the proud husband to Rhonda, and the proud father to two daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful town of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom’s dedication and commitment to public service was inspired at a young age by his grandfather who served in the U.S. House of Representatives, and his father who served as Governor of New Jersey. Throughout Tom’s life, he has followed in their footsteps while setting forth his own path of public service—now serving as a first-term **Congressman for New Jersey’s 7th District.** **_Kean's mission is simple:_**** For New Jersey. For America. For _All Of Us_. Last cycle, NJ-07 was one of the KEY districts responsible for flipping the House from Democrat Rule. This November, you can bet the Radical Left will be gunning for Kean in their efforts to take back Congress. clean_body: Updates from our week in the field| | | | | Friend, | | Happy Monday and Happy Labor Day! Welcome back to another edition of our weekly Kean for Congress newsletter update. I will keep this message short so you can get back to enjoying your holiday, whether that is resting with friends and family, spending time down the shore, or catching up on some much-needed rest and relaxation. Last week, Tom spent much of his time traveling across the district for events and meetings. He had the opportunity to sit with business leaders and constituents, announced some big endorsements, and visited Community Project Sites in NJ07 towns which are currently going through the FY25 appropriations process. More on all this below. Our Field Team spent their week hitting the pavement and phones ahead of the long weekend. Our volunteers joined our field team in the final week of our summer push before we expand our operations for our critical GOTV efforts. It has been great to see their energy in our offices and in the field every day. We are so grateful for all of their hard work. In my coming emails, I will be outlining everything you need to know about voting on or before Election Day. Vote-by-mail ballots will start to be sent out on Sept. 20th \- less than 20 days away already. If you are reading this, we will need your help. Please consider signing up to volunteer using one of the many links below. Together, we will get out the voters needed to make November 2024 a great success. Are you ready to work hard to deliver Republican victories in November, and send Tom Kean, Jr. back to Congress? To get involved, . Read more below to stay up-to-date on everything Kean for Congress has been up to! | | | | | | | ✅ Kean Constituent Services Return Over $8 Million to NJ-07 Residents ✅ | | On August 30th, Tom announced that his Constituent Services operation, based out of his District Office in Bernardsville, has now returned more than $8,652,279 to constituents. Since his office opened in January of 2023, Congressman Kean and his team have closed over 2,641 constituent cases. Constituent services will always continue be Tom's #1 priority as your Congressman, and we are so grateful to his government team as well for all that they do for NJ07! Read more . “I am excited to share that our constituent service team has returned over $8 million dollars back to constituents through our casework services. This achievement underscores our commitment to serving New Jerseyans and ensuring they receive the benefits and assistance they’re entitled to. This is a testament to the hard work of my team and our unwavering commitment to addressing the needs of every individual we represent.” -Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. | | | | | | | Field Update | | | | Things in the field are beginning to really ramp up. This past week, our Field Team spent time in all six counties, meeting with our fantastic county organizations and leadership, candidates, recruiting new volunteers, and launching our door knocking and phone banking efforts. Despite the long, final weekend of summer, they had the opportunity to speak with hundreds of voters excited about participating in the general election. Over the coming weeks, we will be working closely with these candidates and organizations on vote-by-mail return efforts, GOTV door and phone efforts, and encouraging voters to participate in early voting. We will also be joined by many motivated partners from the labor organizations that have endorsed Tom - ensuring our message reaches every corner of the district. If you have been looking for the right time to step up and get involved, now is your chance. We just over 60 days until the Election, there is no time to waste, and every day needs to count. Our door knocking program has continued with efforts covering towns like Sparta ; Belvidere ; Mendham Borough ; Raritan Township ; Clinton Town ; Bridgewater ; Raritan Borough ; Somerville ; Westfield ; New Providence ; and Summit. We also are hosting launches in coordination with our county and municipal organizations in New Providence, Springfield, Mountainside, Summit, Sparta, Washington Township, Mendham Township, Raritan Township, Washington Borough, and more over the coming weeks. I am proud of our team's efforts in recent months which have produced over 30,000 door knocks and over 100,000 phone calls. Kean for Congress held our weekly phone bank series in Morris county targeting our critical swing-voter universe. As we ramp up our efforts I am thrilled to announce that Kean for Congress will now host THREE organized phone banks across NJ07 each week, with standing residencies in Union, Somerset, and Hunterdon Counties. Call for Volunteers!! Kean for Congress team is expanding for GOTV and needs your help!!! Join Team Kean and local candidates as we knock on key swing-voter doors and push to reach the largest GOTV universe we can. Want to join us? Use the SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER button below and details will be provided. Want to get involved? Join us at some of our upcoming weekly events! | | | | | | | 🚨 Endorsement Alerts 🚨 | | | | Since my last update, Tom has announced a critically important endorsement from the nation's top small business group - NFIB. Kean for Congress is proud to be fighting each day for our small businesses struggling with record high inflation, cost of living, and affordability concerns. Thank you to NFIB for your belief in Tom's ability to get the job done and support our small business across NJ07. See what they are saying: “Rep. Tom Kean has a proven record of supporting small businesses, earning a NFIB Voting Record of 100%. He has prioritized tax relief by cosponsoring the Main Street Tax Certainty Act and truly understands the environment that New Jersey job creators and their employees need to succeed. We are proud to endorse Rep. Kean for re-election today and look forward to continuing to work with him.” \- Eileen Kean , NFIB New Jersey State Director “We know Rep. Tom Kean will continue to be a dependable voice for small businesses in Congress. He has a strong pro-small business voting record and has been an advocate for policies that empower Main Street to grow and give back. We are proud to endorse him.” -Sharon Sussin , NFIB Senior National Political Director Follow our using this link for more endorsements to be announced in the coming days! | | | | | 🎥 More Local Leaders Endorse Tom Kean, Jr. 🎥 Click to watch! | | | | | | | Tom In The News | | | | | | | RESERVE A TOM KEAN LAWN SIGN | | | | | | | | | Get Involved : Join our team and help spread our message in the community. : Your contributions power our grassroots efforts and make a difference. mailto:JJ@TomKean.com "JJ@TomKean.com": The Kean for Congress Team is looking for dedicated and responsible high school and college age Republicans that are interested in a campaign internship. This is a great way to learn the ins and outs of campaign-style politics and have a true on-the-job campaign experience. We can also offer college credits and signing service hours. Spread the Word: Share our updates on social media and encourage others to join our movement. Follow #TeamKean on Social Media! Help us spread the word! If you're not already doing so, please follow us and share our channels with a friend. | | | | | The support from across NJ-07 has been amazing thanks to each and every one of you. This is a team sport, so if there is any way our team can be helpful in your town, never hesitate to reach out. | | Thank you, Kean MacLellandCampaign ManagerKean for Congress | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Tom Kean Jr. is the proud husband to Rhonda, and the proud father to two daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful town of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom’s dedication and commitment to public service was inspired at a young age by his grandfather who served in the U.S. House of Representatives, and his father who served as Governor of New Jersey. Throughout Tom’s life, he has followed in their footsteps while setting forth his own path of public service—now serving as a first-term Congressman for New Jersey’s 7th District. Kean's mission is simple: For New Jersey. For America. For All Of Us. Last cycle, NJ-07 was one of the KEY districts responsible for flipping the House from Democrat Rule. This November, you can bet the Radical Left will be gunning for Kean in their efforts to take back Congress. Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Missed call for Peter, from Ruben.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter,
Happy Labor Day!
Summer might be closing out, but that means Election Day is right around the corner. We’re taking today to recover after a pretty busy few months, but that doesn’t mean we’re taking the day off.
So, instead of fundraising, Ruben asked us to try something different. [**We’re asking you to add your name and personally endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_sept24/?source=em240902-1-90&akid=3000%2E734936%2EDfAA4v) And from this list of endorsers, we’re going to pull some folks for Ruben to call and personally thank for their support.
Kari Lake might have scores of millionaires and billionaires, countless MAGA faithful, Super PACs and Trump himself behind her. True.
But we’ve got something they don’t. We’ve got you. This might seem like a small act, but it really does speak volumes about what we’re trying to do on this campaign: Build something BIG with people who really care. Win in Arizona. And get things done for the country we love.
[**So, if you’ve got a minute, add your name and endorse Ruben. We’d love to see you on the list, and we know Ruben’s looking forward to making these calls.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_sept24/?source=em240902-1-90&akid=3000%2E734936%2EDfAA4v)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_sept24/?source=em240902-1-90&akid=3000%2E734936%2EDfAA4v)
Thank you,
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3000%2E734936%2EDfAA4v). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3000%2E734936%2EDfAA4v). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3000_734936_DfAA4v&akid=3000%2E734936%2EDfAA4v)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The Patriotic Roadmap I Wrote for You
body:
It's focus is on how all Americans can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving ourselves.| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca2a6b12b55d424da525afaf0881c71b&_e=oyz0PLHW5dTilh8onwIJOf864iFSAm_CQEegDH8a3uAmyLEp3FZh78kphtJOJYV6NT_IM0wLd9iNeNmQOCmvD-nfSN_zOEB9vq1SkDEgkbrZhNV-BEDXEGNxJDSmAE2zLn8XP-enrIQ3_OUcvL4SlY0PXGVDDulNvs8ldAQtu3rnYsYl6a38hAetF2xT0Qv_tk911DgCfU34F2ZYdReiCyqRFH_MmSwoF1e5qTtXgCnDqnumcH_iSHOmSnbCaJUr9eq7Bh3YzylRhDx3p85ZwryW0gJ5g8NajTlJh9YZJgqRKdeQM1fU6LGENX5i-Jlm)
---
Peter, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Peter, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca2a6b12b55d424da525afaf0881c71b&_e=oyz0PLHW5dTilh8onwIJOf864iFSAm_CQEegDH8a3uAmyLEp3FZh78kphtJOJYV6NT_IM0wLd9iNeNmQOCmvD-nfSN_zOEB9vq1SkDEgkbrZhNV-BEDXEGNxJDSmAE2zLn8XP-enrIQ3_OUcvL4SlUU-8vcKLew9Axnu0TOIC4V4CCNVKMmq_ChSVPM65YXIwQV5MhbWaBj1XHqVXjXInrxW5my0ssUNUuUkMEW9BlQiDcjVLU8MW629iQI_nESVzeScBUQM4Ji68Oi_bWwUuKhRk9QxZvc7TkybqTbZHN0Ie6iv1NPaEfvWJtEyh8ZS)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca2a6b12b55d424da525afaf0881c71b&_e=oyz0PLHW5dTilh8onwIJOf864iFSAm_CQEegDH8a3uAmyLEp3FZh78kphtJOJYV6NT_IM0wLd9iNeNmQOCmvD-nfSN_zOEB9vq1SkDEgkbrZhNV-BEDXEGNxJDSmAE2zLn8XP-enrIQ3_OUcvL4Slcjw_jGIYsZJcY5alG0rBbB2pNs4Jf6uwkF0xTB0dF0ut0hdQ9u5qevc1aaaegJF2cbPPhttAqLRNFoyKwZX1zRECF-LTP2XETr4sC5UUn7iu0pOwatKnVSzJmuvuZQvEjshPO8xf8bwO1x0SnkcYEmE-VOOUSpF-oH0IBiqZrXP)
---
Peter, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca2a6b12b55d424da525afaf0881c71b&_e=oyz0PLHW5dTilh8onwIJOf864iFSAm_CQEegDH8a3uAmyLEp3FZh78kphtJOJYV6NT_IM0wLd9iNeNmQOCmvD-nfSN_zOEB9vq1SkDEgkbrZhNV-BEDXEGNxJDSmAE2zLn8XP-enrIQ3_OUcvL4SlRNO3z2PstF0y8O7C3OUBJi2pw5eOUQsuK1CjtNHUWcUAMJ9gi6RbMd5LRxyMU5VMRyoccCiFGXrnHjRQV_ZkcMz3OYjnpCSE-DcFAgrKjnUoNdEw-10lxxv_UJvN5_bqBByAQ37H0SQH_9ft-wp--rYY35UbJ4SIr93GbtL46kS)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca2a6b12b55d424da525afaf0881c71b&_e=oyz0PLHW5dTilh8onwIJOf864iFSAm_CQEegDH8a3uAmyLEp3FZh78kphtJOJYV6NT_IM0wLd9iNeNmQOCmvD-nfSN_zOEB9vq1SkDEgkbrZhNV-BEDXEGNxJDSmAE2zLn8XP-enrIQ3_OUcvL4SlR_I2QS2bDQ4hv2_ODbdvTJQ0vLunsu9Ndu3Ua6_8DHapBth15-BLjlk12y-NPyAsL3iPIIGMll-rG8WLmprqBcUf9as5yYsfKR0iEYkFe2c2WIc6Bejr5JeVJrK5fPHOzErZtqcWiK8UIHj-hQ3RJeRFHJGPrWVkGM-yaX2Amp8)

Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Today, we celebrate America’s unions

body:
it means an incredible amount to me

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92028816/495763288/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmRkY2MyOC00YjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7nsX2vjNa_CDXppdXKilyqcFc_1pLjdCJw1XD50SVs=) I grew up in a working class family, so Labor Day means an incredible amount to me. My dad worked in construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week. In the winter, when the construction season slowed, he worked snow removal – all to make ends meet for our family. Labor Day is a day to celebrate the people who built our state and our country and work tirelessly to power our country today. Today and every day, it’s up to our elected leaders to make sure our workers are treated with the respect and dignity they deserve. I’m honored to be a steadfast ally of Michigan’s labor unions and was proud to help end so-called “Right to Work” and restore prevailing wage in Michigan. **As we celebrate Labor Day today, let’s remember this: In Michigan, we stand with our unions, no matter what.** And as we push forward in this critical election year, I am committed to working alongside our incredible labor leaders to continue the fight for better treatment of our workers. Happy Labor Day! Thanks, Kristen | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92028817/495763289/-1840305088?refcode=email_090224_labor-day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmRkY2MyOC00YjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7nsX2vjNa_CDXppdXKilyqcFc_1pLjdCJw1XD50SVs=)

name: Mike Haridopolos
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE HARIDOPOLOS FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | Dear Friends,

As we gather with family and friends this Labor Day, I want to take a moment to recognize and celebrate the backbone of our great nation: the American worker.

From the factories to the farms, the small businesses to the startups, it's the hardworking men and women of this country who drive our economy, build our communities, and uphold the values that make America exceptional.
This holiday is more than just a long weekend—it's a tribute to the strength, dedication, and resilience of our workforce. It's about honoring those who get up every day and contribute to the American Dream.

---
[](https://link.support.mike4congress.)
This Labor Day, let's remember that a strong America depends on a strong workforce. Let's continue to support and uplift the workers who make our nation the greatest on Earth.
Thank you for your hard work, your dedication, and your belief in the promise of America. Together, we will keep our nation prosperous, free, and always putting Americans first.
Wishing you and your family a safe and happy Labor Day!

Thank you,
Mike Haridopolos
Republican Nominee for FL-8
|
---

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92029097/495764545/1929658185?refcode=em_fl_eha_20240902_na_eomty_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDA3ZGZiNy00YjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ikEQBVYe3P9VLx7wgFvU54qjh79JvtKMedHsR8eDcO8=)
---
First things first: THANK YOU. This is the SECOND month in a row that we've raised our grassroots fundraising goals because this team has blown past the first one. My finance team suggested we try to raise another $6000 above our goal – **and I'm proud to report we exceeded that and raised $8037!** Every time we exceed our fundraising goals, it means the world to me. Yes, because we need to raise a LOT of money to compete with Brian Fitzpatrick's war chest filled with MAGA dollars. But also because: A) I come from humble beginnings. I remember pouring water on my cereal as a kid because we couldn't afford milk that month. I joined the Army at 17 as a way to afford college. I don't have a trust fund and a long list of prep school buddies to fund this campaign. B) I'm not accepting a cent from corporate PACs. It's really important to me to represent people, not special interests. And part of living up to that is making sure people, not special interests, are fueling this campaign. Both of these things make fundraising harder for me than your typical candidate. But I believe they're also the exact same reasons I'll make a great representative – Congress has enough corporate-funded rich kids making decisions for all of us. We need more folks who know what it's like to struggle at the table. I'll always fight for the underdog, because I am one. I'll always fight for our freedoms, because I did the same thing on the battlefield. And I'll always put the working families of PA-01 first – not special interests - because that's who funds this campaign. Happy Labor Day – may it be filled with rest and reminders of all that unions have done to build the American middle class. Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilot, Ashley 🚁
---
| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

subject: Happy Labor Day

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94275/images/DonDavisBlueLogoV2.jpeg]
To all –
Labor Day is a time to pause and celebrate our remarkable workers nationwide and the success of labor movements that have fought for their rights.
Labor unions have secured fair wages, safer working conditions, and essential benefits for millions of workers.
I'm honored to have the support of American workers in my run for a second term in Congress. [https://aflcionc.org/news/endorsements-november-5-2024-general-elections] We must continue protecting workers' rights.
Happy Labor Day!
- Congressman Don Davis

body:

---
#
Peter, happy Labor Day.
Today is much more than a day off – it’s a time to honor the strength of our country’s workers and what they give to our nation.
In high school, I worked at a meatpacking plant to save up for my education. There, I saw my fellow employees endure hard work and long hours to make ends meet for themselves and their families.
All Americans, of all professions, deserve jobs with fair wages and good benefits; and all Americans deserve a work environment that prioritizes employees’ safety.
As a Senator, I’ve worked tirelessly to support worker’s rights through legislation like the _PRO Act_ , a bipartisan effort to allow employees to unionize for better wages, benefits, and conditions.
>From factory workers to educators to social workers and nurses, all Americans should have strong job protections.
Organized labor and unions continue to fight for better conditions for our nation’s workers, and I am honored to support those fights. Thank you for all your efforts.
With gratitude,
Dick

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

Today marks 64 days out from Election Day, so that’s how much we’re asking grassroots supporters to give right now. | | | We know that $64 is a big ask, and it’s one we don’t make lightly. We understand that not everyone can, or is willing, to give that much to a political campaign. But let us explain what’s at stake in this election and why your support -- today -- could determine whether we win or lose come November. Right now, polling shows this race statistically tied. The MAGA Right is attacking Kamala and Tim left and right with baseless lies, misinformation, and clickbait. The only way we can fight back, spread Kamala and Tim’s message of freedom, opportunity, and progress, and send them to the White House is with your help. Yes, your help, Peter. ****According to our records, you haven’t had a chance to give to Kamala and Tim’s campaign yet. The momentum behind our movement is surging, but we need new supporters like you to help keep it up. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Happy Labor Day!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Happy Labor Day, team!

The Labor Day holiday commemorates the hard-won rights fought for by the trailblazers of the labor movement, like a five-day work week, eight-hour work days, safety mandates, a minimum wage, vacation time, and more.

While none of this would have been possible without the labor movement, we know the work is still not done. I’m confident that with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz’s leadership, we can keep up the fight, but first we need to get them in the White House.

We must continue to demand equal pay for equal work. We must continue to stand by workplace protections for our LGBTQ+ neighbors. We must continue to fight for a living wage. And we must continue to protect workers’ right to organize.

I stand by working Americans in their fight for safety and fairness. That’s why I’m in Congress, and that’s why I support the Harris/Walz ticket. If we win in November, we can build on real, positive changes in the life of the American worker.

So, team, let us take today to show our gratitude for the courageous efforts of the labor movement, while pledging to never stop the fight for better working conditions for all.

— Eric Swalwell
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/esca-14-email-sept2024-fr-september?refcode=-footer-Holiday&amount=3]

body:
When workers strike and organize for better working conditions, they secure rights for all of us. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWAjZ_RDT5C4CYMFQPM56x8tBKB2pOaI5CH9SqsGLulNP8HIQ0kGjczDXPScMuyKBdTITTOA_0ANimSrTWQQp2Q9lAwb456K9FndRbU4qiKPnT2L0TNSs3YUi_VCkBqNewNuwUoK21D2rWCSwVX8qPMHRefRLQK5zAP51knuM71r_QgayUp82JpLLT0zus5F_wQAhhQjiy9JDD7xkXi9UAzw/49f/yxy7R5xRQsW6J6HHcGdePg/h0/h001.8gHry00weiU5uufQpj9k7Sdc_ggiuKlJlQk0aRafgjs)
---
Friend, This Labor Day, I want to lift up and honor the workers who’ve been striking and organizing for better working conditions, securing rights for all of us. My family received healthcare for the first time when my father joined the United Auto Workers union, so I know how labor rights can transform families and communities. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5eddAUAklmIEh0hBHmX5xmPvXKgy3MNAh3Gsgp56EqMFyYVyVIypFszfxo93nf6WUrOfG5IWAn_IQIKPFli_ueXZZFdFzEeBc81j-P_Ms6lcj1kJhq7RdaIBM_fzJ9khWR3GuVF-8NIufaB6fD_D6cEI5AQcoIHeUMhs0cRYJtfhPiPP4NFW5Uy-dQflll8LzoDhtmkE1yZ8DA3wQLxuWQhmNDCXgb5uCVIt5LH1p5Q_HQw4xVsbrt628IViyrgnZqQT8wbbHts_JHxYB0Fjqxt3xgA9oG1Dc719KaR1wLWggS4YKTGLDKNv6iFHkC8X7DTWpE0fyH2oz8lM0j3gvxUFRky8tQsR8J9kC6WB_pc0/49f/yxy7R5xRQsW6J6HHcGdePg/h1/h001.oqgmQvI3Pxib0EAR716rlEChq9SClgWQdW26CWHXQs0) **I’ve been proud to join striking workers on picket lines who are rising up for safe working conditions, living wages, better benefits, and human dignity.** The American people are with us: New polling shows that 70% of Americans support unions. Last year, the number of striking workers more than doubled, including autoworkers at a number of corporations across the country who won historic victories. Now the fight is on to enforce these new contracts. In my district, Stellantis (which owns Jeep, Chrysler, Dodge, and more) is failing to uphold its contract with the UAW and instead raising its CEO’s salary by 56%. In addition to exploiting workers, the corporation continues to pollute and poison my neighbors. UAW may strike again to secure needed changes. **We also need to push back against corporations’ union-busting and far-right leaders who are trying to weaken workers’ rights.** After Trump appointed three justices to the Supreme Court, the right-wing majority of Justices stood with Starbucks this summer after it illegally fired pro-union workers. Soon after, Trump celebrated billionaire Elon Musk’s illegal actions to fire workers who were organizing for better conditions. In response, the United Auto Workers (UAW) filed an unfair labor practice charge against Musk. We must defeat Trump in this November’s elections and we must pass legislation to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the millionaires and billionaires. [**This Labor Day, please add your name to support two policies that would help workers and hold greedy CEOs accountable: the**** _Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_****, which would hold corporations accountable for worker intimidation and expand workers’ rights to fight for safety and fairness in the workplace, and the**** _Tax_********_Excessive_********_CEO_********_Pay_********_Act_****, which would tax corporations if they pay their CEOs over 50 times their median worker pay.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5eddAUAklmIEh0hBHmX5xmPvXKgy3MNAh3Gsgp56EqMFyYVyVIypFszfxo93nf6WUeQa2HEIjUgjI6LiMYzkvVYZ4XT_UquShwnYfxy1ztMTU9sxqgs8mxn8f5eQSb9OyKLV_dvR646p67WDyy3zvcoZSJz1mW938o7r_JOdy2dk3XnYflJecMxW7q0cacoupmFX8mgikgGfhA33Q7-um3WmvkHT3XJnB76HpqsXJCcq0XI28b-gWpYNaSr-tXiuYul22k-oH1Ht4wfOgNuxG3H-gkI_1oPp40QjrMYHhGMNCKI7yp7S0D64t5Agmbq7agI0S68MWIAyktq1qwpvdGFK_zRLWbs_3YCLzsKkGKwE/49f/yxy7R5xRQsW6J6HHcGdePg/h2/h001.GYViHI1FxSeAdU93JukxeUj2msvg_pM-_tIrkD7t4jA) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5eddAUAklmIEh0hBHmX5xmPvXKgy3MNAh3Gsgp56EqMFyYVyVIypFszfxo93nf6WUiKUR721SWe6uLcxVcAOYCudE741SXXUVrFW2fNv0E1kDRisbMLmDO-vQJtT4F3e2HcH4uHF-LyfN_HDvuRmvRU_Ib1YyMA8ADt4THe3_h0B66qe6g5Ck8tKwtFn5KThJe3XowS44aBgzebAxHUjKQF-V0VPZoQAhGYS7rD7P5-I72YqMDD8rS68N_sr5JBb90UJ2c7jFgdCr5hPTGaIJZQ-2wQwOyVMWQpGbjIVLLg3rm3fdNgI259XUPpr4wcQMm8r-ocKs6alFZTlyRen4egd86ImAVif81CtgOoGfRM8/49f/yxy7R5xRQsW6J6HHcGdePg/h3/h001.5yeA5a0e1JdEZH7MSljPsF3p5iQdni6demLKCB4SsyU)
---
For too long, our economy has been rigged to serve those at the top. Billionaires and CEOs keep getting richer—at the expense of the rest of us.
CEOs are now making 400 times more than their average worker. That’s why I helped reintroduce the **_Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act_** with colleagues in Congress this year. If passed, the bill would incentivize a narrower pay gap between CEOs and employees, with a higher tax rate for wider pay gaps. This would generate billions in revenue, which could be used to support working families around the country.
I’m also a proud co-sponsor of the **_Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_****.** When the U.S. House of Representatives previously passed the _PRO Act_ , the bill included my amendment to help eliminate employer stall tactics in contract arbitration and deliver union workers their rights more expeditiously.
If passed, the _PRO Act_ would:
* Ensure the enforceability of our labor laws and enhance support for worker strikes and boycotts.
* Protect undocumented workers and gig workers.
* Repeal so-called “right to work” laws that have decimated unions in dozens of states.
* Penalize employers that interfere with their employees’ organizing efforts.
* Make explicitly clear that employers cannot interfere with employee unionization voting procedures.

[**Please sign on to support pro-worker legislation this Labor Day.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5eddAUAklmIEh0hBHmX5xmPvXKgy3MNAh3Gsgp56EqMFyYVyVIypFszfxo93nf6WUyLqLdE7v21gPenSiAzZqlZbP_nEj8B70dSfEV0SrqUJA1-MHZmaf1kN0lLfxYROW7y61w_sCLNUrRB03yWOSBQJx_DsxZTWK9kP2foJc89EPPlZztqGhpgtoqYqQPa3qmTcch5UyRYZNfAzkRlV0E_DC5Nh0wIR6xgSzR6JX9fQ_K2C0dFK57D8KJPLhgXHpP6qgvaBjktz5VtPl9_05odBqj_Sur6F5_GzuYKujav-cdf84A6eAsBQWT7yvL_QfUqTnKcokQ9SiNIwYtn1RMZUnDaMfhoT3-YFzQzFty90/49f/yxy7R5xRQsW6J6HHcGdePg/h4/h001.G7pWyVkjG1Lj3BVWUZpXDlwGMpQ8Y640kOfe2ffo_BM)
Thank you for taking action to stand with workers today. Unions are an essential part of our progressive movement, demanding human dignity across borders. The UAW and other major unions representing millions of Americans have also continued to call for a ceasefire and an end to U.S. weapons shipments to Israel.
Together, we’ll keep building a society where everyone can thrive.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: When workers strike and organize for better working conditions, they secure rights for all of us. | | | Friend, This Labor Day, I want to lift up and honor the workers who’ve been striking and organizing for better working conditions, securing rights for all of us. My family received healthcare for the first time when my father joined the United Auto Workers union, so I know how labor rights can transform families and communities. I’ve been proud to join striking workers on picket lines who are rising up for safe working conditions, living wages, better benefits, and human dignity. The American people are with us: New polling shows that 70% of Americans support unions. Last year, the number of striking workers more than doubled, including autoworkers at a number of corporations across the country who won historic victories. Now the fight is on to enforce these new contracts. In my district, Stellantis (which owns Jeep, Chrysler, Dodge, and more) is failing to uphold its contract with the UAW and instead raising its CEO’s salary by 56%. In addition to exploiting workers, the corporation continues to pollute and poison my neighbors. UAW may strike again to secure needed changes. We also need to push back against corporations’ union-busting and far-right leaders who are trying to weaken workers’ rights. After Trump appointed three justices to the Supreme Court, the right-wing majority of Justices stood with Starbucks this summer after it illegally fired pro-union workers. Soon after, Trump celebrated billionaire Elon Musk’s illegal actions to fire workers who were organizing for better conditions. In response, the United Auto Workers (UAW) filed an unfair labor practice charge against Musk. We must defeat Trump in this November’s elections and we must pass legislation to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the millionaires and billionaires. | For too long, our economy has been rigged to serve those at the top. Billionaires and CEOs keep getting richer—at the expense of the rest of us. CEOs are now making 400 times more than their average worker. That’s why I helped reintroduce the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act with colleagues in Congress this year. If passed, the bill would incentivize a narrower pay gap between CEOs and employees, with a higher tax rate for wider pay gaps. This would generate billions in revenue, which could be used to support working families around the country. I’m also a proud co-sponsor of the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act. When the U.S. House of Representatives previously passed the PRO Act , the bill included my amendment to help eliminate employer stall tactics in contract arbitration and deliver union workers their rights more expeditiously. If passed, the PRO Act would: Ensure the enforceability of our labor laws and enhance support for worker strikes and boycotts. Protect undocumented workers and gig workers. Repeal so-called “right to work” laws that have decimated unions in dozens of states. Penalize employers that interfere with their employees’ organizing efforts. Make explicitly clear that employers cannot interfere with employee unionization voting procedures. Thank you for taking action to stand with workers today. Unions are an essential part of our progressive movement, demanding human dignity across borders. The UAW and other major unions representing millions of Americans have also continued to call for a ceasefire and an end to U.S. weapons shipments to Israel. Together, we’ll keep building a society where everyone can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Happy Labor Day weekend, team!

This holiday recognizes the strength and resiliency of America’s workers – people like my grandmother.

She was a union leader for a ball-bearing plant back in the day – not a typical job for a woman, especially a woman of color. That’s her in the middle. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92030455/495768391/-843060894?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.09.02_LaborDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYThhZTY4Ni00ZDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ch5EOABwNMubsQfWTJUlbMHfS8jBeLbiLcmsQK2tji0=) She is part of why I have always advocated for workers’ rights. People deserve to make an honest living and have access to proper benefits without facing dangerous or inhumane conditions. As Delaware’s Labor Secretary, I enforced policies providing job growth and fair wages to the state. Now, in Congress, I’ve established the Bipartisan Future of Work Caucus and Co-Chair the New Democrat Coalition’s Future of Work Task Force to help prepare America’s workers to enter an ever-changing market. My commitment to our nation’s workforce is why I like to say: “You can’t spell L-A-B-O-R without LBR!”

**[From steelworkers to public school teachers to social workers and nurses, every American should be protected in the workplace. name: Gwen Moore
subject: Celebrating the Heart and Backbone of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Labor Day holds a special place in my heart as the daughter of proud union parents. Today, as we gather with family and friends, let's not only celebrate but also reflect on the incredible impact union workers have had on our nation. It's because of their hard work that our country thrives.

This is a moment to recommit to the vision of building a stronger future for generations to come, a vision where union workers and the broader labor movement are strengthened and empowered across America. Together, we create opportunities that lift us all, making every American life better.

To each and every one of our union heroes, a heartfelt THANK YOU for your dedication, resilience, and unwavering spirit.

Together, #WeRepresent!

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District
Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
100% Democracy Defender

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: What’s the matter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
Unless I’m wrong, we understand you to be an America First patriot who backs President Trump and wants to stop the destruction of our country at the hands of the radical left. |
---
I don’t get it, fellow patriot...

> **Ohio is a top-target Senate race for Republicans to flip in 2024.
>
> It’s one of only three Senate races rated as a “toss-up.”
>
> It’s the most expensive Senate race in the country by far.
>
> It’s key to winning back a Republican Senate majority. **

_But you don’t seem to want to lend your support to winning this race?_

Unless I’m wrong, we understand you to be an America First patriot who backs President Trump and wants to stop the destruction of our country at the hands of the radical left.

I want to make it clear to you now: **We can’t secure our borders, lower inflation, make our communities safe again, or defend against the woke agenda without a victory in my race.**

Right now, we’re getting buried by the Democrats in the fundraising game. But we’re still closing in on Sherrod Brown in the polls, and thankfully, we still have time to make up our fundraising shortfall.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

body:

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to GAP American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

clean_body: I've never seen journalism so abused It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Peter,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to GAP American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun coGAP as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to GAP America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

It's because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we've been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they've tried to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we're going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But in order to do that, we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

TEXT "TRUMP" to 88022 to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status follow [this link.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=f7dbdcc467564843bb7dc3d88dfee65b&_t=xX7TCSn6UwHI1iyhcbtjAoyVs-ZDp5wc0lNNh-nYZYq5eEPFj-fb_vCtWN0HS3RqkdrJRvNCN7oTcNaa0JI7Lryfu1VQ8CgoWsW1_jFV6mfOR7wJxPf1ZAklPY4ne4QJ)

I'm pretty sure I already know the answer, but I can't go on until I know for sure... You're getting this message because I care DEEPLY about what you have to say. clean_body: | | = Happy Labor Day, Peter! = I'm incredibly proud of the victories we've achieved for working people in Phoenix. We passed a prevailing wage ordinance to raise pay for thousands of workers. We made history by passing the Worker Heat Safety Ordinance, a first-of-its-kind policy to protect workers from extreme heat. And it's no coincidence that we earned the support of the vast majority of labor unions in this race. I'll never stop fighting for working people, Peter, from Phoenix to Washington. I'm so proud to have you with me. — Yassamin = | Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03, and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. Will you support her campaign? = = PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so .
