name: Lanon Baccam
subject: Standing with Iowa’s workers
body:
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92032144/495773256/-1141683812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU5ODY2NTMtNTA2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-F94EgNTnwbVoCFfoZlM2bpl95FQfKT4ZGpjpcUriUc=&emci=2017c8e0-3d66-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c5986653-5069-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23786099)
---
| | Hey Peter, Labor Day is more than just a long weekend. It’s a day to honor the workers who keep our country running and to recommit ourselves to the fight for fair wages, strong benefits, and workplace protections. Here in Iowa, unions have been the backbone of our communities, fighting tirelessly for the rights of workers across every industry. From the fields and factories to the classrooms and hospitals, it’s our unions that have stood up to ensure that working families get a fair deal. They’ve fought for livable wages, safe working conditions, and the benefits that keep our communities strong and our economy thriving. **That’s why I’m proud to be endorsed by the Iowa Federation of Labor, AFL-CIO, and so many other working brothers and sisters.** But the truth is, the fight is far from over. In Iowa, Kim Reynolds and Zach Nunn went after organized labor and are gutting the protections that generations of Iowans have fought for. We need to make a change. | [SIGN ON: SUPPORT IOWA’S UNIONS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92032145/495773261/1344254997?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU5ODY2NTMtNTA2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-F94EgNTnwbVoCFfoZlM2bpl95FQfKT4ZGpjpcUriUc=&emci=2017c8e0-3d66-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c5986653-5069-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23786099)
---
Unions are more than just organizations—they’re a powerful voice for fairness and dignity in the workplace. They’re a force for good that lifts up all workers, whether they’re union members or not. When unions are strong, all of Iowa benefits. Our schools, our healthcare, our infrastructure, and our local businesses all thrive when working people are treated with respect and paid fairly.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me in standing up for Iowa’s unions. We need to make it loud and clear that we won’t back down in the fight for workers’ rights. **[Will you add your name to our petition to protect Iowa’s unions and ensure that every worker has a fair shot at the American dream?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92032147/495773262/1344254997?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU5ODY2NTMtNTA2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-F94EgNTnwbVoCFfoZlM2bpl95FQfKT4ZGpjpcUriUc=&emci=2017c8e0-3d66-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c5986653-5069-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23786099)**
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92032148/495773263/1344254997?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU5ODY2NTMtNTA2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-F94EgNTnwbVoCFfoZlM2bpl95FQfKT4ZGpjpcUriUc=&emci=2017c8e0-3d66-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c5986653-5069-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23786099)
---
This is about more than just wages and benefits—it’s about protecting the values that make Iowa strong. It’s about ensuring that every worker has the dignity and respect they deserve, and that no one is left behind.
Together, we can make sure that Iowa remains a place where hard work is rewarded. Let’s stand together, fight together, and win together for the future of Iowa’s working families.
In solidarity,
Lanon
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92032149/495773264/-1132396962?refcode=E10263-20240902-LaborDay-footer-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU5ODY2NTMtNTA2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-F94EgNTnwbVoCFfoZlM2bpl95FQfKT4ZGpjpcUriUc=) |

name: Josh Hawley
subject: This Labor Day, our working class is under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, As we take a moment this Labor Day to honor the backbone of America - our hardworking men and women - I can't help but think about the challenges our working-class faces. The strength of our nation has always come from the sweat, determination, and grit of everyday Americans. But today, that strength is under siege. My opponent is pushing some nutty ideas – like banning gas and diesel trucks, tractors, and combines - which would decimate the livelihoods of millions of hardworking Americans. Lucas Kunce is too busy pandering to the radical interests of his donors to see the devastating impact his woke agenda would have on working families across Missouri. I believe in fighting for you—for the farmer, the factory worker, the small business owner, and every American who puts in an honest day's work to provide for their families. This isn’t just about stopping bad ideas—it's about protecting the American Dream. But I need your help. This battle is not going to be easy, and my opponent is already raising millions from far-left donors who want to see their radical agenda imposed on us all. We can't let that happen. **[Will you stand with me and chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today? Every dollar helps us fight back against the radical left and keep our working class strong.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=623a7eecc07c48e8be25269245c0ebbd&_e=JjaTC4OAPN7AU-R4nTpfIhpy7YILxJ0sCaaKt-Ci4w5JirELduUHHgXjSR7rZxqBzmsPwLK9UwQs8cz0y3P08rsPRXxFcSBnGNHhS0Jy0f499VTd3zmOXoH7N0azMMNswH3994BSQWXgHO89exBb40D63hZGFFCGxNO1E_9ySrwc1F9IycqgAEpO2Edy4AT0m9w5r5irDrecMB6PgQGhRnTfnF8yT7F5VANjzNcRvLxscEzBwhz-9MoezMx4Lzg0Gv7x6-EeBpCAOozufuZEHY2em7jH5NeQoXWxv-zM6urL_7yqqNwkttBdweeW25VrGQoOAjgMmkJ9bzMu3bH8D_b5Z_GTcF3QnqwCZYN6Hys%3D)**

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Honoring Colorado Workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Happy Labor Day, Peter!
Today is not just a well-deserved break from work and school, but it’s also an opportunity to honor the incredible contributions that workers across our great state of Colorado—and the entire nation—make every day.
From the fields of the Eastern Plains to the bustling tech hubs of Denver and Boulder, to the ski resorts in our majestic mountains, everyday Coloradans make our state such a wonderful place.
As Secretary of State, I believe that no person should have to choose between a day’s pay or standing in an eight-hour line to vote. Workers in Colorado are the backbone of our state, and they must have their voices heard in our elections. I also believe in collective bargaining, the right to unionize, and a fair wage.
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
The Labor Movement has done so much for our state and nation, ensuring fair wages, safe working conditions, and reasonable hours for workers.
As you enjoy your long weekend—whether you’re hiking in the Rockies, attending a local festival, or simply spending time with loved ones—I hope you also find a moment to reflect on the contributions that workers have made to our state and how we can continue to support them in the future.
Wishing you a wonderful Labor Day!
Jena Griswold
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

| Why I introduced my Go Pack Go Act.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=3546%2E35263%2ERun4Xo)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2409_GoPackGo_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3546%2E35263%2ERun4Xo) Good morning, Peter! The start of September means that football season is just around the corner. Like so many Wisconsinites, I can’t wait to cheer on our beloved Green Bay Packers this year. _But did you know that some folks in our state can’t catch the Packers on gameday?_ Nearly 415,000 people across 13 counties in Wisconsin are stuck watching neighboring teams on NFL Sundays. I’m working to change that. My Go Pack Go Act would make sure EVERY Wisconsinite can cheer on the Packers on game day — regardless of where you live in the state. **[Before the Packers kick off their season this Friday, will you add your name to show your support for my Go Pack Go Act?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2409_GoPackGo_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=3546%2E35263%2ERun4Xo)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2409_GoPackGo_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240902_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=3546%2E35263%2ERun4Xo)
---
I’ll never stop fighting for Wisconsinites — _no matter how big or small the issue._
Go Pack Go!
— Tammy

name: Ron Wyden
subject: There’s a lot left to do for American workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
But it’s a fight I’m all-in for!
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92032659/495775275/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDhjNThiNy01MTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dAuJKaviLyQQvfygGZhkcJAXFAop7x8daYVBOxDSoFU=&emci=e10209cd-a168-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=048c58b7-5169-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=9818364)
---

| | It's another gorgeous Labor Day here in Oregon, and I hope you're out there enjoying it! As you do, please do take a moment to acknowledge the hard-working men and women who have, and continue to, lead the fight for fairer pay and better working conditions for every American. **Without the work of previous generations of labor organizers, we wouldn't have the weekend, the 40-hour work week, a minimum wage, or bans on child labor.** These things we take for granted today were hard-won by the struggle and determination of organized workers. **But there's a lot left to do.** We need to raise the minimum wage. We need to tighten protections to further crack down on corporate union-busting tactics. We need to reform the tax code so that we're protecting jobs on American soil and not creating incentives to ship jobs overseas. By sticking together and standing up for working families, we can get it done. And I'm certainly excited by the prospect of all the pro-labor policies that a Harris-Walz administration would deliver us. So from the office to the factory line to the picket line, the fight for workers' rights goes on. Let's all celebrate today as a recognition of that fight's importance to every one of us. clean_body: But it’s a fight I’m all-in for! | | | | It's another gorgeous Labor Day here in Oregon, and I hope you're out there enjoying it! As you do, please do take a moment to acknowledge the hard-working men and women who have, and continue to, lead the fight for fairer pay and better working conditions for every American. Without the work of previous generations of labor organizers, we wouldn't have the weekend, the 40-hour work week, a minimum wage, or bans on child labor. These things we take for granted today were hard-won by the struggle and determination of organized workers. But there's a lot left to do. We need to raise the minimum wage. We need to tighten protections to further crack down on corporate union-busting tactics. We need to reform the tax code so that we're protecting jobs on American soil and not creating incentives to ship jobs overseas. By sticking together and standing up for working families, we can get it done. And I'm certainly excited by the prospect of all the pro-labor policies that a Harris-Walz administration would deliver us. So from the office to the factory line to the picket line, the fight for workers' rights goes on. Let's all celebrate today as a recognition of that fight's importance to every one of us. Onward, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Yolanda Bejarano, Chair
subject: Organize and mobilize
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92033355/495777679/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2EyMzJkZjktNTI2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BgdZG6eiDmExZY-SxQNyr5VvuojcsL6KTUAgy1iSuJI=)
---
Happy Labor Day! Today, the labor movement is stronger than it has been in **decades**. Workers are uniting to demand the protections and wages they truly deserve. From LA to New York, from Amazon warehouses to UPS delivery trucks, workers are standing up and standing together against corporate billionaires across every industry. SAG-AFTRA and the Writers Guild of America raised the bar for actors and writers everywhere and are putting the labor movement center stage. I couldn't be more proud of the workers in Arizona and across the country who are standing up for what’s right. Before my time as Party Chair, I served as the field director for the Communications Workers of America, representing over 700,000 communications and media employees from diverse backgrounds and industries. The key to making lasting, impactful change in both Democratic politics and our labor movement is how we organize. By mobilizing every group and community, we not only bring diverse voices and experiences to the table but also build enduring power for workers. This will ensure we can turn out strong in every election to elect champions for working people. Thank a union today and help us build a better tomorrow! In solidarity, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92033357/495777680/-1700737188?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2EyMzJkZjktNTI2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BgdZG6eiDmExZY-SxQNyr5VvuojcsL6KTUAgy1iSuJI=) Yolanda Bejarano Chair, Arizona Democratic Party ****P.S. Your support is crucial in these final weeks. As we approach our last FEC report before the November election, we need your support.**[Could you pitch in $5 (or more!) this week to help us expand our strategy to reach voters in Glendale? Your contribution will help us continue to stand strong for Arizona's workers and ensure their voices are heard loud and clear. Together, we can make a difference for workers everywhere. Thank you for all you do!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92033359/495777682/-1700737188?amount=5&refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2EyMzJkZjktNTI2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BgdZG6eiDmExZY-SxQNyr5VvuojcsL6KTUAgy1iSuJI=)**

name: JD Vance
subject: Friend, I wrote you a letter from the campaign trail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
Can you please read it? It’s your patriotic support that gives me strength to keep fighting. | | **
[A LETTER FROM AMERICA'S NEXT VICE PRESIDENT JD VANCE](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=f0b39d995b50406faf46406107109df6&_e=JOcG_WqauAU4KUPB1uea3TjMoG64CHeQBMkZOBL4d4gdOeeS3Va40MiekbYWxvEdHF2Q_oOg9s6dBpHORMB_D5tNGVXi6Ooz2erjzSlO8uO0b5Zi9ePeFPie1kPLZlN7mC2NZSilVBfwuK8R1o7n6mv25FcUmF71dhUPHPHcAcqg0N9n4jzvYL5w50eHvHAc82hmXagaTcG4Tvp5irxT1VH68u-cuUFKRcmYPommyqpx5Cmimt5xm22SLPv4L3wfc5qjI0WwVHO4pX9dfwWE6ioZ1zeA3ZOAf3p9TosEG78X37j7SpmsCsysMkt4vVIyYn9rqqGZsd7T7wcNvo2tlGS4NperK_jo5Bsnf135tPfY3Q3Bjm7jsUVZhkmXakU3JMjbsHDH0Q3nGnGXJABANrfy9jXiPWsZjsZyudZ5kSnNcPsv_nnldGn00jUiagcHiLmLRBaLX9VIzkHLBsM5aKYkAqI1xICA1T7CMxd_8ARy0POnBL5D-c5JLP9IILwp)**
I've been traveling around the country sharing President Trump's vision for a brighter future, but I wanted to take a moment to send you a message from the bottom of my heart:
**[THANK YOU.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=f0b39d995b50406faf46406107109df6&_e=JOcG_WqauAU4KUPB1uea3TjMoG64CHeQBMkZOBL4d4gdOeeS3Va40MiekbYWxvEdHF2Q_oOg9s6dBpHORMB_D5tNGVXi6Ooz2erjzSlO8uO0b5Zi9ePeFPie1kPLZlN7mC2NZSilVBfwuK8R1o7n6mv25FcUmF71dhUPHPHcAcqg0N9n4jzvYL5w50eHvHAc82hmXagaTcG4Tvp5irxT1VH68u-cuUFKRcmYPommyqpx5Cmimt5xm22SLPv4L3wfc5qjI0WwVHO4pX9dfwWE6ioZ1zeA3ZOAf3p9TosEG78X37j7SpmsCsysMkt4vVIyYn9rqqGZsd7T7wcNvo2tlGS4NperK_jo5Bsnf135tPcLTTBgi5Dn32GJQ2bJ0pBfDrBwYSsYb8KZwLwJnuCufOrncSj2V85se2l5b-C1CtpbaQqH_REM7vuVjs4AhpUaIe559SLfFw7jk-byUQk9o4PND61f3NldG6p0yj1N12SJ2m1CgTajZoFtBSi99tqg)**
You've selflessly stepped up to support our campaign, even while Kamala Harris wreaks havoc on our economy.

_And trust me, friend, I understand the value of a dollar._

As you probably know already, I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth like so many of the career politicians I've had the misfortune of working within the D.C. swamp.

I grew up poor, in the Rust Belt, in a small Ohio town that had been losing jobs and hope for generations.

In Middletown, hard-working families that gave everything they had to achieve the American Dream watched helplessly as their jobs were shipped overseas by the "elites" who rule our country.

But under President Trump's strong leadership, their manufacturing jobs finally started to come back.

Despite all the incredible progress he made, I'll be honest with you: communities like mine are in more danger than ever if Kamala Harris takes the White House.

Friend, President Trump and I are fighting to keep the American Dream alive for future generations, but we can't do it alone.
**[So today, I'm humbly asking you to step up one more time and contribute any amount - even just $1 - to get President Trump back in the White House. >](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=f0b39d995b50406faf46406107109df6&_e=JOcG_WqauAU4KUPB1uea3TjMoG64CHeQBMkZOBL4d4gdOeeS3Va40MiekbYWxvEdHF2Q_oOg9s6dBpHORMB_D5tNGVXi6Ooz2erjzSlO8uO0b5Zi9ePeFPie1kPLZlN7mC2NZSilVBfwuK8R1o7n6mv25FcUmF71dhUPHPHcAcqg0N9n4jzvYL5w50eHvHAc82hmXagaTcG4Tvp5irxT1VH68u-cuUFKRcmYPommyqpx5Cmimt5xm22SLPv4L3wfc5qjI0WwVHO4pX9dfwWE6ioZ1zeA3ZOAf3p9TosEG78X37j7SpmsCsysMkt4vVIyYn9rqqGZsd7T7wcNvo2tlGS4NperK_jo5Bsnf135tPeVrWz17ndjorAJPs0jqQOWUyXTfNcz1K1XgUR-XkU0OIb-95jh3jG78TEU8uRDMPNWNOUPCJFoMRFPFMWr-V3azJ803nsilXDB5Ea_D291AHTa4dtdkcFjWxfJgDnGzbuPFi4x4MNyrcU-HU-hqAVb)** ******[DONATE TODAY](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=f0b39d995b50406faf46406107109df6&_e=JOcG_WqauAU4KUPB1uea3TjMoG64CHeQBMkZOBL4d4gdOeeS3Va40MiekbYWxvEdHF2Q_oOg9s6dBpHORMB_D5tNGVXi6Ooz2erjzSlO8uO0b5Zi9ePeFPie1kPLZlN7mC2NZSilVBfwuK8R1o7n6mv25FcUmF71dhUPHPHcAcqg0N9n4jzvYL5w50eHvHAc82hmXagaTcG4Tvp5irxT1VH68u-cuUFKRcmYPommyqpx5Cmimt5xm22SLPv4L3wfc5qjI0WwVHO4pX9dfwWE6ioZ1zeA3ZOAf3p9TosEG78X37j7SpmsCsysMkt4vVIyYn9rqqGZsd7T7wcNvo2tlGS4NperK_jo5Bsnf135tPcWApVPcqzUyv55HJSceHUszOPWXkNfem9WpGJH-09TnQmrCj1_mOn6jbOxebK2b7uAkTtHUPH_0LBvYg9RFFPZSXrjc9-liGWyETOmWUY3rAe28XvFGjlfwHCZUtsoxP__fJMlSKtEX--3kUFFL36D)******
I ran for the Senate because I knew somebody had to stand up to the corrupt Washington establishment and be a voice for YOU - the American people.

And I'm running to be your next Vice President so we can finish what we started.

clean_body: Can you please read it? It’s your patriotic support that gives me strength to keep fighting. | | I've been traveling around the country sharing President Trump's vision for a brighter future, but I wanted to take a moment to send you a message from the bottom of my heart: You've selflessly stepped up to support our campaign, even while Kamala Harris wreaks havoc on our economy. And trust me, friend, I understand the value of a dollar. As you probably know already, I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth like so many of the career politicians I've had the misfortune of working within the D.C. swamp. I grew up poor, in the Rust Belt, in a small Ohio town that had been losing jobs and hope for generations. In Middletown, hard-working families that gave everything they had to achieve the American Dream watched helplessly as their jobs were shipped overseas by the "elites" who rule our country. But under President Trump's strong leadership, their manufacturing jobs finally started to come back. Despite all the incredible progress he made, I'll be honest with you: communities like mine are in more danger than ever if Kamala Harris takes the White House. Friend, President Trump and I are fighting to keep the American Dream alive for future generations, but we can't do it alone. ****** I ran for the Senate because I knew somebody had to stand up to the corrupt Washington establishment and be a voice for YOU - the American people. And I'm running to be your next Vice President so we can finish what we started. Thank you and may God bless you, JD Vance **** ** Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Casey
subject: Workers’ champion vs hedge fund executive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb)
Peter, workers’ rights are on the line in this election, and the contrast in Pennsylvania couldn’t be more clear.
On one side, you have Bob Casey, who has spent his career fighting for working Pennsylvanians. On the other, there’s David McCormick, a hedge-fund executive worth hundreds of millions of dollars who has, time and time again, put his bottom line above all else.
**[If that makes you mad as hell, chip in now to join Team Casey:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-2&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb)**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-2&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb)**
While Bob has fought to pass legislation creating thousands of jobs in the Commonwealth, David McCormick was shipping his firm’s good-paying Pittsburgh jobs overseas.
Bob Casey stands with organized labor and has fought to pass the “Protecting the Right to Organize” Act, which would ensure all Americans are able to form a union. David McCormick, however, supports corporate tax giveaways that would make greedy companies even richer.
From championing unions to fighting to raise the minimum wage, Bob Casey has stood with workers at every turn. David McCormick, meanwhile, has shown that he will always do what’s best for him, even if it means selling out Pennsylvanians.
Bob has always had our back, but now he needs us. He’s in the toughest campaign of his career, and polls show the race is tightening.
**[That’s why we're asking you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can today to stand with workers and send Bob Casey back to the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-2&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240902-2-el&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240902-2-el&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240902-2-el&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240902-2-el&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240902-2-el&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-2&refcode2=4057_552475_isQqsb&akid=4057%2E552475%2EisQqsb)

An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Celebrating Labor Day: Honoring the Workers Who Make Massachusetts Strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Friends,
As we gather with loved ones this Labor Day, the Massachusetts Democratic Party stands in solidarity with the hardworking people who make our Commonwealth thrive. Today, we honor the contributions of workers across every sector—teachers, healthcare providers, public servants, retail workers, tradespeople, and countless others who are the backbone of our communities.
Labor Day is more than just a day off; it's a reminder of the strength, resilience, and perseverance of the labor movement. It’s a day to reflect on the progress we've made thanks to the tireless efforts of workers and unions who have fought for fair wages, safe working conditions, and the rights and dignity of all employees. Here in Massachusetts, we are proud to continue this legacy by advocating for policies that support working families, promote economic justice, and ensure that everyone has the opportunity to succeed.
As the son of two union parents, Labor Day always had a special meaning in our house growing up. It was a time to honor the brothers and sisters in organized labor that helped our Dad through tough strikes back in the day or worked along side our Mom as a unit C president and contract negotiator working to get the best protections for her colleagues at their school. It meant understanding that we owed everything to unions and their members...and by “we” I mean the nation
But our work is far from over. As we celebrate today, let’s recommit ourselves to the fight for workers' rights, equitable pay, and the protection of benefits that so many have struggled to secure. The challenges of our time—whether it’s economic inequality, healthcare access, or workplace safety—require our collective action and unwavering commitment.
Let’s use this Labor Day to renew our dedication to the values that unite us: fairness, justice, and the belief that every worker deserves respect and opportunity. Together, we can continue to build a Commonwealth where everyone can prosper.
Wishing you a restful and meaningful Labor Day.
In solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: What does an empowered citizen look like?
body:
I invite you to view...

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_t=zSFJHntugQ8lAwUZdz9iUsPIqyL7k74fFTr35-LP-rs-4EKzYL_ejTCM6dVJds_mNLbph7qlIVWqp2S_XHuFP169SXFmoaA6xqylqNDPByYKcAANyw4V8T4bBNme_9r5)_
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_e=BD74-RS3emxdIbeJFatKdMxVizH7NTXl51EVCYh2qGE1D9W8Z4ZauhXDphGzoAuL1GEihi2TWK-nhTJK1kqCWJG7Afmo5n_6FNR7eL-RMYh4hfVw55-Pjb5SxcWBb1d5WIRxral_YvzyKqOaxyKDVadnEZZDRyhY6e7XIzsj6FOgLJp09zxFowz2XRVc4Q6Figdc8ataQt362kd-V7a3n4RQWZGCWLDaREW_d7jzS0hHoj1gJ8arbdJHg1K2RPHpJzAqp7p629jFXCyBAumtVlhbzTSSZsGSgp7vKd_3nhY_bVoC-B-NuokqVjSo7J6e4YL8xAlXOerwvSF71SFTt-tCnAIbtx8kuSLji-2At4Nyajr8HCqo_pmLWomMsfAY6YA2iogRLWNUd53I5gYc9g%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_e=BD74-RS3emxdIbeJFatKdMxVizH7NTXl51EVCYh2qGE1D9W8Z4ZauhXDphGzoAuL1GEihi2TWK-nhTJK1kqCWJG7Afmo5n_6FNR7eL-RMYh4hfVw55-Pjb5SxcWBb1d5WIRxral_YvzyKqOaxyKDVadnEZZDRyhY6e7XIzsj6FOgLJp09zxFowz2XRVc4Q6Figdc8ataQt362kd-V7a3n4RQWZGCWLDaREW_d7jzS0hDPbjeNZ6nqfzZWrTCnE89FV9UlV5BMqAT8RVlItjHCQkgbwVVA0N8KQV73OE8b4KPWUXWzH6SAz5YVvuD5OpJHyRascA1LIe96hlduYX97U8dWSpamlGEmqVYMa3PZ8FBXkgO6ToeUR0_riiRdrL6MMfoCsD41y8ar_Uxe_gjHA%3D%3D)** ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_e=BD74-RS3emxdIbeJFatKdMxVizH7NTXl51EVCYh2qGE1D9W8Z4ZauhXDphGzoAuL1GEihi2TWK-nhTJK1kqCWJG7Afmo5n_6FNR7eL-RMYh4hfVw55-Pjb5SxcWBb1d5WIRxral_YvzyKqOaxyKDVadnEZZDRyhY6e7XIzsj6FOgLJp09zxFowz2XRVc4Q6Figdc8ataQt362kd-V7a3n4RQWZGCWLDaREW_d7jzS0gEF-jOiGsdi0Dve9e-yg1DpAmzV23NpFU-L-YF3rtTub-cDEJ-SIBGBvQGqRCbpKj6Xe3VR5uHEkWaoeobPfvAA9nZWmtDosnaefCxyMV5j9axvWEHUCsiel-cCCi6pd32KJ-PENMo9hiBF55K7lWsd91n7g52EwR_R_05trRPKA%3D%3D)
---
| | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_e=BD74-RS3emxdIbeJFatKdMxVizH7NTXl51EVCYh2qGE1D9W8Z4ZauhXDphGzoAuL1GEihi2TWK-nhTJK1kqCWJG7Afmo5n_6FNR7eL-RMYh4hfVw55-Pjb5SxcWBb1d5WIRxral_YvzyKqOaxyKDVadnEZZDRyhY6e7XIzsj6FOgLJp09zxFowz2XRVc4Q6Figdc8ataQt362kd-V7a3n4RQWZGCWLDaREW_d7jzS0jqI8gFTYpJW0HqyWb-GbGlPgt9EUhtINdAB5NY-X8Eyp3taW1eUXkY0x_2GGJW9L2vboety5aZeIgv2Id08y1WYDO0aMRMZdzwQ86XaBSsYGIX7RBGTJQ4tFagouoi6tAMY49ReXIO9SL13i4sDtMGq5rrvT5fpicgbG6HnTcVnQ%3D%3D)

Best wishes,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| | **[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_e=BD74-RS3emxdIbeJFatKdJkGyUU7OP1gH5dpGQNSHzX0zgOH0LY3PB4FlsyKaNmmLPHaELCFrYWKXQu8m2FQ1Wlpka0MwUmcJEetz-BLq8-vEwKh4F337FhKkcy9CkxNXRrMVRuFcDd8uViMm7GeVK-Swi66S7dFyWaqN7ZbX8LvDe5lIyvreeUcKfq3qRVZ9pCnc8V_A2v4WHqQBaKiOL-gMLi3Brp43gHZ0dwnWNk1dH4fTiKeBqz9SIT8mXOsMazpqogQGBuqoufLpK1_2w%3D%3D)**

**[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aca32780df2e4ee3b3816b91420f7130&_e=BD74-RS3emxdIbeJFatKdJkGyUU7OP1gH5dpGQNSHzX0zgOH0LY3PB4FlsyKaNmmGVbzT4O1eqrPONxTUAuQkw78ZFe6r52TjgNeaxrGZwzlHSTU_P5vPrbVctByyoXoXswsBSzdwxTnkXlgMJtNanxylNSq62GJTk9tpwp_mj1RZaqY6WrTAmdcNrbee4XhIcFst3uyTJNQwlCaEjwZZg8HTvppoYtdcx-8JR5N0MrOcsfgU03ASKvFNBuieADd).**
---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Labor Day, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92034072/495780838/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_240902labor_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2I5MDgzNy01NTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFH9IYLSxLJqHf1b9H3PhO0Gj4RL1Oqry7L4F6QfR7M=) **Happy Labor Day, Peter!**

The labor movement has endlessly worked to advance the rights of working people. This Labor Day, I couldn’t be more honored to be out in my community to celebrate hard-working Americans and our labor leaders in Ohio.
While labor organizers work to secure higher wages, better benefits, and real investment in our employees, I'm fighting every day in Congress to pass pro-worker, pro-union policies.

During my time in Congress, I have cosponsored legislation to protect workers against unfair trade practices, raise the minimum wage, and provide affordable healthcare. I also helped deliver $500,000 in federal funding to train local Black entrepreneurs and secured additional federal funding for economic development in the Fairfax neighborhood, East Cleveland, and Cleveland Heights. **But we still have work to do to overcome Republican roadblocks and ensure worker rights.**

The power of the people is in our collective strength, and I know we can create an economy that works for us all together.

Together,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: our ActBlue bottomed out over the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=2364%2E52803%2EKoxGOf)

| | We knew that Labor Day Weekend is typically a tough time to fundraise, Peter, but I don’t think any of us were expecting such a steep dropoff: [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30628?t=11&amount=25&akid=2364%2E52803%2EKoxGOf) | | | [DONATE](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30628?t=12&amount=25&akid=2364%2E52803%2EKoxGOf)
---
Peter, at the end of September, we need to file our fundraising numbers with the Federal Election Commission.
Once we do that, everybody — _and I do mean EVERYBODY_ — will be able to take a look at our numbers and decide for themselves if they think we’ve got the resources that it’ll take to defend Maryland.
Look, I know what this grassroots team is made of, because our supporters have been the beating heart of this campaign since day 1.
When our opponents, our supporters, and the political pundits get a look at our numbers, I want them to see what I see: **A strong, dedicated, vibrant grassroots movement.**
So we need to make up for this weekend’s fundraising dip ASAP or we’ll be forced to make major cuts to our grassroots operations. That means we won’t be able to hit the streets, talk to voters, and do what it takes to win in November.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $25 (_or whatever you can_) before you close out of this email? Once we do that, everybody — and I do mean EVERYBODY — will be able to take a look at our numbers and decide for themselves if they think we’ve got the resources that it’ll take to defend Maryland. Look, I know what this grassroots team is made of, because our supporters have been the beating heart of this campaign since day 1. When our opponents, our supporters, and the political pundits get a look at our numbers, I want them to see what I see: A strong, dedicated, vibrant grassroots movement. So we need to make up for this weekend’s fundraising dip ASAP or we’ll be forced to make major cuts to our grassroots operations. name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Mechanic
body:
The next 64 days are going to be busy as Election Day is just about two months away. The top of the ticket gets all of the attention but there are many other races under the radar that could be pivotal.
| | | September 02, 2024 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QGfsgyVxW3tkl1otTx5UQZc6URuYqXN7KwYa8lWvep773dlbqjtpo-Xeu3Tdafs1Ct4jwm7vGieaRPVPcJZwjSrE5OFcpd8A-9-UZjJDD4zFkghuz4P2eZVSLEdbiT4pN963FSwCooTKmkUtYhcph0YQcStErEwaxZD02HgqHMBNt0-l6NUd0R2_b96JQ-aonnH6zRYsbq6OgX0OhbJb_coO0hlKlW4R2wse3mj_NG3GFOF-q9pLtiCtyrgoo2M-/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h0/h001.-IGj8lmwCXFRAUhjDM5c-Om_KFvTyjZgcGkf7dBEJOc)
---
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QtKflUKrzodfXtago74Ps8EN3ROWxEkMkeIirpafo0UGJ4pTT-5OuiTmqb8f15eNO_tJeu6Yxj4LFXkgkQqvPHfMte9lnflQotEopy6o_Y7swJeA0I3Ek0QbGlvN7_pm4JeMflYRoj03DUKmqdvWyAJEzkOUuRHv0QqF6kKBV7IvqLIJksoIcpCDJ8ZZfvmfIK3kfT-Hhvo2N6EooQduUA/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h1/h001.U7q2MYgwRxXiwZ0fDLRgaPaebUTyEde5Xp3A9tnXcCY)
---
| | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.WQmwPZwh7PJ6OHcw662ltPTECipieSeBTPVp8e8czOEUB5saKi4yJoZfG08BQAqRkrgROn3ZWZMnxcTM7pIYRrsGqfmmfIDsrgB8dNIcjOAXJAL5KecqRwmQpR6toj86wNa-cbiMg01xhbM36E9cA3ziN9XWoYEheq8Cy_RyaTrc9_oO4iIxHxJD9pj8m3-O78I0krSJ9ORF55yGvI7rmGL2T5HA-nQGIkjj3VGmoUE/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h2/h001.4LStrs6_BVumf09i1vF9vFJ1zW4YGxqGsDb7mswGvis)
---
Hello, I hope that your summer has ended on a high! Labor Day means back to school.
The next 64 days are going to be busy as Election Day is just about two months away. The top of the ticket gets all of the attention but there are many other races under the radar that could be pivotal.
What would you say if I told you that an Independent is running for Senate against an Incumbent in Nebraska and is now virtually tied? That is the case for [Dan Osborn](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.WQmwPZwh7PJ6OHcw662ltPTECipieSeBTPVp8e8czOEUB5saKi4yJoZfG08BQAqRkrgROn3ZWZMnxcTM7pIYRrsGqfmmfIDsrgB8dNIcjOAXJAL5KecqRwmQpR6toj86wNa-cbiMg01xhbM36E9cA-naK4f2UYiQJna1asKpfBn69GYXXxXOTbVydN-Sb5ywK9l-MEa8LHtTEJsdkmODHZ6slpWxccfoBtn4khlBvfE/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h3/h001.kqW3dGTiob6xeyFbPp0aT80TAEv_hJor8nm4ccScGW8), a Navy veteran, mechanic and labor leader who is running against Deb Fischer, a Republican incumbent who is not terribly popular. “People in Nebraska are tired of politics as usual. There’s no love lost for our current leaders. Anytime I talk to someone in person they get excited as soon as they hear about me and the campaign. That’s why I spend every day driving around the state talking to voters. We are growing every day. If we get the resources to get the message out, we are going to win.”
I’ve met with Dan and he’s the real deal; a fed-up 49-year-old military veteran who wants to change things for the better. Imagine a real-life mechanic as a U.S. Senator. “Every day, I roll up my sleeves to fix something. No institution in America needs fixing more than the United States Senate.” It’s a very appealing message.
Can Dan win? His opponent, Deb Fischer, is 73 years old, not terribly popular and hasn’t been meaningfully opposed in 12 years. There is no Democrat in the race. The usual playbook in this situation is to try and paint the Independent as the minority party. But Dan doesn’t feel like a conventional Democrat given his military background and man-of-the-people profile.
Dan’s race reminds me of Evan McMullin’s race in Utah two years ago. If you recall, Evan was an Independent military veteran running against the incumbent Mike Lee. The Democrats wisely decided not to run a candidate because in Utah the Democrat is something of a sacrificial lamb.
Evan got 43% of the vote in 2022, losing to Mike Lee who got 53%. Still, that 10 point margin was 10 percent closer than the margin Trump beat Biden by in Utah. That’s a big difference. Running an Independent is the recipe for introducing competition where there seems to be none possible.
It’s a similar situation in Nebraska, a state Trump won by 19 points. It turns out that Utah and Nebraska are typical in that 36 of the 50 states are essentially dominated by one party. Hence, the general elections in those states tend to be formalities.
That makes for bad incentives and unmotivated leadership. Why rock the boat if you’re going to coast to re-election?
In Nebraska, the Democrats are also wisely stepping aside and ceding the field to Dan.
Will the outcome be different this time? Every race is different, and at some point the Independent candidate will break through. Dan happens to be pro-choice, which is going to help in November.
If Dan were to win it would be a political earthquake. I’ve [donated](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.rTvIY3IwA5InrpwBO8kyOiKfe31jb9S7L_vXgu69DXUXty53Me_8ezxw4AE_uBofYFfqoF7jOugh0-RpY_YFcls0-_qpE1wKeizy-kojdU4sRjOwy1oujyu5yAirKamLAV5OTyLV_9fEz-5z1I3kVrttXQJhLeJMtpw7ILr1DxtZwJ2ulXwr2SRcKvDYx7fuuLJI-bXUD7WX8pY2nbL0tnzl8s-xmKD8w28J3tguAHeR7_KcvpY7h224iLC1TmnDvviLQm4Ihz7dDJTi_GhhxA/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h4/h001._tZ_PE3cz0tjtBYUNFvRyMtobJMEW1QT9ag83SRFXfg) to Dan’s campaign and hope that you’ll consider [doing](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.rTvIY3IwA5InrpwBO8kyOiKfe31jb9S7L_vXgu69DXUXty53Me_8ezxw4AE_uBofYFfqoF7jOugh0-RpY_YFcls0-_qpE1wKeizy-kojdU4sRjOwy1oujyu5yAirKamLAV5OTyLV_9fEz-5z1I3kVrttXQJhLeJMtpw7ILr1DxtZwJ2ulXwr2SRcKvDYx7fuea-G6qgUTOPn_ENrr0F8v_7pgqH8ktS2QR89Z41-fYE63bpOwGu1HyNKxNKMI4mWF-cJycjENgl3hyGLG_iBXg/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h5/h001.k4X1i6PYZX2QxzkI3Uae-0Udqp88Bo3pCXDSJypP_eE) so as well.
He’s right that politics as usual won’t cure what ails us. An [independent](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.WQmwPZwh7PJ6OHcw662ltPTECipieSeBTPVp8e8czOEUB5saKi4yJoZfG08BQAqRkrgROn3ZWZMnxcTM7pIYRrsGqfmmfIDsrgB8dNIcjOAXJAL5KecqRwmQpR6toj86wNa-cbiMg01xhbM36E9cA75vsU9QoLoAzTv8kBwbGc4_uEsLAe4lWp4s0rAf5GcR5Aom6uoqPawm2C7rFxYm8xMUXCjtfy07PlMmS8EXayE/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h6/h001.xs1C60HIpAt3zqGrcdmDXDaD_Ldd3SeMebPbJZJEmlA) in Nebraska becoming a U.S. Senator would help. Let's help make it happen.
Want to support candidates like Dan? Check out the [Forward Party](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QGfsgyVxW3tkl1otTx5UQdJcqFMnrDs4EOFyqnH8oB61EyxnmKfw3eusE_P2NtvKagOY2yQ4gBGtWUjAkwVvLR8-8gkz4ixx4tRj1nt_cGmvkxZ8bBct7xqHBnohfq27Iym63nyHuDsCoQdWLLdkGThq7RGzYQ7UT86YH55rsYgmiX7nLQQPuAUYkT2ZmV-oEewIOlcZefjRwIVfQoQjPDxwT_Z7wrLRjYo0qKteuB0/49f/K4K7kgmoQraKN8Yq8IvUFQ/h7/h001.EKvcpHIvjj9Wnl76KFYduiyBK2yFGDseB9K-sR6-808). We are working on local races around the country.
|

**Andrew Yang**

name: Ty Pinkins
subject: Wishing you a happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92034505/495782122/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_C_240902_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM2ZmNiZGUtNTU2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WIoPE4Wi4itfvZGbpfq-MyMukFGtAFeqr5_2e8rhe2c=)
Hi, Peter!

From myself and all of us here on the campaign, we want to wish you and yours a happy Labor Day.

I am a proud labor advocate. As an attorney, I’ve fought for Mississippians who were being denied fair compensation for their work. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, I’ve earned the endorsement of labor groups like the AFL-CIO.

And, as Mississippi’s next Senator, I’ll work across the aisle to raise the minimum wage to $15/hour and create stronger protections for workers.

Thank you to all of the individuals who keep our communities and businesses running every single day. I hope today is a day of rest and celebration for all of you!

In solidarity,

_Ty_

* * *
| The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta.

Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2024.

[You can support Ty's campaign for U.S. Senate here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92034506/495782123/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_C_240902_bioboxlnk&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM2ZmNiZGUtNTU2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WIoPE4Wi4itfvZGbpfq-MyMukFGtAFeqr5_2e8rhe2c=)

clean_body: = Hi, Peter! From myself and all of us here on the campaign, we want to wish you and yours a happy Labor Day. I am a proud labor advocate. As an attorney, I’ve fought for Mississippians who were being denied fair compensation for their work. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, I’ve earned the endorsement of labor groups like the AFL-CIO. And, as Mississippi’s next Senator, I’ll work across the aisle to raise the minimum wage to $15/hour and create stronger protections for workers. Thank you to all of the individuals who keep our communities and businesses running every single day. I hope today is a day of rest and celebration for all of you! In solidarity, Ty * | The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta. Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2024. = = Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=090224_1&amount=25]
@RecorderDannyO: **Important** It is with great disappointment that I share that the Veteran Photo-ID Cards issued by Ohio County Recorders’ Offices appear to no longer be considered eligible forms of voter ID. This change is part of the new voter ID law, HB 458, signed into law on 1/6/23. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Ohio_VeteransID.png]
Ohio counties are grappling with the impact of their voter suppression law that enacts stringent voter identification laws.
Franklin County, home to the state capitol of Columbus and more than a million Ohioans, is among the counties that has announced that they're no longer able to accept veterans photo ID cards issued by the county as proof for voting because of Ohio's law.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should states with voter ID requirements expand or further restrict the types of IDs they accept?

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

MAGA Republicans only need to flip one battleground seat red to retake Senate control. The GOP came 7,928 votes away from winning Nevada’s last Senate race – _**that’s less than 5 votes per precinct **_– so they’re laser-focused on electing my Trump-endorsed opponent, Sam Brown. And expert polling shows us locked in a statistical tie.
We can’t take a single vote for granted, so it’s critical that we have the resources to execute every part of our campaign strategy flawlessly. **Your $5 contribution will help us launch one more TV ad, register one more voter, and knock on the door of one more undecided Nevadan.**
With outside groups targeting Nevada nonstop, I need your help before we’re outspent and totally drowned out. **[Please – will you chip in $5 to my campaign to keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92034756/495782982/1399008008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4646-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY1MjZlNi01NTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuMFe_T2mUIjMU2YKx24kYptkzH95wc4mkBpij5sbGQ=)**

With outside groups targeting Nevada nonstop, I need your help before we’re outspent and totally drowned out. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = – Jacky Rosen | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country... | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=6e1ff213fdc04742983b90846a756038&_t=uXadCS_VMRCTeG85Ipf7RUY85kv_i5SUm68w-5LUYg9JMedMTi-krcigYzOKwMe904uQVNinzkiqx7xoyaBMNQlxlbbCrOxnqjik1qeyYeQUR2eeePwICpfYBnhQH4vy)_
---
|
---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6e1ff213fdc04742983b90846a756038&_e=Sca3uBzsP2CnVq618eMAkdhtGHUplLlTagPdTey8zT2s5YpUv8JeaVNshlsRZ3iXwOGn4cRgLR5Iyxrhxh55i_WmsgDIiUIgx0a_D_utkbLtrHAu4AXZF5wBgqfYplXzxUGIu3qWdzQt673OHA2DUl37CqjBEfsUsqEsQpk8ofXvBzTIey_Vh1gE4d4xycOq9chkC-ZdXLu1opsUEza5fHY51LT0q6Fgb_VbbFXoAx69N4CxOWjxCmVeUdRObdacUUa1H990Tdy317_NO2MlOUhD4O4-Yu81SNF0ulruqAZz3OMpDK-KU0IfLMbrDEEkti6h0thCzyCqJyOK48YYjXTwRxQSQrCmswxcSTARK6Z9c5zECipM7UpPVQeplWpH14XqvohX2wE6UQU-HXRRai556V7bFMOU8BYooHrKWzR_QFqhXevwjc5REK3QSQtd)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty_?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6e1ff213fdc04742983b90846a756038&_e=Sca3uBzsP2CnVq618eMAkdhtGHUplLlTagPdTey8zT2s5YpUv8JeaVNshlsRZ3iXwOGn4cRgLR5Iyxrhxh55i_WmsgDIiUIgx0a_D_utkbLtrHAu4AXZF5wBgqfYplXzxUGIu3qWdzQt673OHA2DUl37CqjBEfsUsqEsQpk8ofXvBzTIey_Vh1gE4d4xycOq9chkC-ZdXLu1opsUEza5fHY51LT0q6Fgb_VbbFXoAx69N4CxOWjxCmVeUdRObdacUUa1H990Tdy317_NO2MlOSDfvReeFETw_5azPl6mwNj07eNb5csbQnU11d6eqCu3X73HnPFmNe4R3OO9GHlDd1ngJRbwx7jXfmWOXcq1BloPw2YbAL6KEzmwPG7B2YkEHzFDBH0giblJ24OEgQr2r-hnl2PXtRSGO_EKhKAyD1QbZdzea0aYTQ4nAZRYTfjW) [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6e1ff213fdc04742983b90846a756038&_e=Sca3uBzsP2CnVq618eMAkdhtGHUplLlTagPdTey8zT2s5YpUv8JeaVNshlsRZ3iXwOGn4cRgLR5Iyxrhxh55i_WmsgDIiUIgx0a_D_utkbLtrHAu4AXZF5wBgqfYplXzxUGIu3qWdzQt673OHA2DUl37CqjBEfsUsqEsQpk8ofXvBzTIey_Vh1gE4d4xycOq9chkC-ZdXLu1opsUEza5fHY51LT0q6Fgb_VbbFXoAx69N4CxOWjxCmVeUdRObdacUUa1H990Tdy317_NO2MlOX03udQ0JueeJU17DM0JprYkGVrmbLQQrn5zP82vgoMtjLBdu9gjHU9az89lH3GvfEIuwF5vk5rCCChmTtDGTFNwwp3Cps-as6fYK720cVh4KZpuRdnMkuRy2MIRrdl6mkyvYCU-_ypiivSfyaFeGVMPoL1sVEjs1a5e8Kw-VfBR) In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act, brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values.**

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,**are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6e1ff213fdc04742983b90846a756038&_e=Sca3uBzsP2CnVq618eMAkdhtGHUplLlTagPdTey8zT2s5YpUv8JeaVNshlsRZ3iXwOGn4cRgLR5Iyxrhxh55i_WmsgDIiUIgx0a_D_utkbLtrHAu4AXZF5wBgqfYplXzxUGIu3qWdzQt673OHA2DUl37CqjBEfsUsqEsQpk8ofXvBzTIey_Vh1gE4d4xycOq9chkC-ZdXLu1opsUEza5fHY51LT0q6Fgb_VbbFXoAx69N4CxOWjxCmVeUdRObdacUUa1H990Tdy317_NO2MlOfvKEYp55mGyBQPu1s3BW88qVpXd3JOco49MwZ0rRg6fxGUGu4XnQUd-121X-Mut7aNwTLQ7h1peHVLsKuUWp7tHTT9LphtVyMEt2tVjB0ql75qB9hm9qZeJwxFfL--bxaF5LLiWrpqQs74HCozX5bq3R3F-3YRwbMzmGo1jbQcl)

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6e1ff213fdc04742983b90846a756038&_e=Sca3uBzsP2CnVq618eMAkYy5wLmNdQcBX4lQm6HB0OE2qbxiNs5NKIgUSIQNVRPxEMtdqu2GZQC6yzfJSDeHLh8GO0nG-8u40oKARxyNJM4QZ1Fvr8Td7u_wHUi7VT1s-7qmeQ8wFA5hKRId_0xX7o4Q_YvAanUHEOdE3QugOYkDCN51QKIlOI0pKlsRxT7MreaVe--ad4XHAMp-9-C4lK6sjHKH2DUhCydo1SLuwB3aWET66ZVOmrNxDZKrmo8a).

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country... | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=a460787c354b4c22afa38742ef1f8cb3&_t=YY1Sx53gT3Byq9hdU13pNRF0FZIUFGBfvvMNXmRA_1tpBXAKEwSJGdpQOg_yreofdyK5uZKosaOU0vxsDPC9R2sBVxpxBF53FgBJl2-D7flP9QwE_xVJjrTbyLhcMU3Y)_
---
|
---
| | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a460787c354b4c22afa38742ef1f8cb3&_e=H5P6XtdhtZokM1jmR041eZV6cVLAPt3WV67v7djAE7WWkGrzxOz4MQcxhXS0502bUxYPEQiVAoUmujmW3_ulMXBRbjEq9LFur4r10TFNRWmJJjkbgOOmctStn1TTglsSb8Elh66j-UZm9SycEKWhUbnlrp8dSu1Iq1xiKaLR1wsb5OHtdokU3MaWO9U-XRMBDnWabB_Z2O-6OwhlsiOWC0Y6VbPANnD3lckWlhYrRsF3LHBPUrvJWRhSuF0pADF2dwk2zp-GuL6So6zd2YNkdCIVSoc4on98xqhdNxKB2jn97j2xmVXxaYnPZMHlx1IX8pEHSeQ32xgCXuDjvTazeQ9Q9lQoPiU25e4MMufbgHy49g8lNloc9-LYZjiPegRUITiwxDmBfDSoHyXgwVDEqO3aU4Gvxr7IwoN1rCEM1apyLHQfNlRo-XHtvlR4Df4r)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty_?**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a460787c354b4c22afa38742ef1f8cb3&_e=H5P6XtdhtZokM1jmR041eZV6cVLAPt3WV67v7djAE7WWkGrzxOz4MQcxhXS0502bUxYPEQiVAoUmujmW3_ulMXBRbjEq9LFur4r10TFNRWmJJjkbgOOmctStn1TTglsSb8Elh66j-UZm9SycEKWhUbnlrp8dSu1Iq1xiKaLR1wsb5OHtdokU3MaWO9U-XRMBDnWabB_Z2O-6OwhlsiOWC0Y6VbPANnD3lckWlhYrRsF3LHBPUrvJWRhSuF0pADF2dwk2zp-GuL6So6zd2YNkdAE1c_07j9Ynq0_eZQdbq4DtFjkqIUtvvM0EkQTgqFtlWlcYo2um-nYq3AmuLkMGLLblgvi1cq4Cv4sdt-StqbBnmXxj4YStHqQIBkGSsIvW-t5i4j3iEYHF4-QLc9fkhmGXHAJSHcKiuELy8sYTVyvHlHW9qqIzeKSjq9nv0qDv) [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a460787c354b4c22afa38742ef1f8cb3&_e=H5P6XtdhtZokM1jmR041eZV6cVLAPt3WV67v7djAE7WWkGrzxOz4MQcxhXS0502bUxYPEQiVAoUmujmW3_ulMXBRbjEq9LFur4r10TFNRWmJJjkbgOOmctStn1TTglsSb8Elh66j-UZm9SycEKWhUbnlrp8dSu1Iq1xiKaLR1wsb5OHtdokU3MaWO9U-XRMBDnWabB_Z2O-6OwhlsiOWC0Y6VbPANnD3lckWlhYrRsF3LHBPUrvJWRhSuF0pADF2dwk2zp-GuL6So6zd2YNkdJCOb8FDRmakr8_APORMzF_tjQbz80KyDu1I0gXmk56_ZpkJTFJCSO1zYvZ9Km_6cp8zrTQabiVwTOX7i9dXhMjuTbwIDUm83blhP07Oewuwg0La6wQ1PvKYcQlt6yHEsl_ES95EG6c2f6qqZkUceT60OJ_yb3CpMcmFgBn5vIiB) In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act, brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values.**

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,**are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a460787c354b4c22afa38742ef1f8cb3&_e=H5P6XtdhtZokM1jmR041eZV6cVLAPt3WV67v7djAE7WWkGrzxOz4MQcxhXS0502bUxYPEQiVAoUmujmW3_ulMXBRbjEq9LFur4r10TFNRWmJJjkbgOOmctStn1TTglsSb8Elh66j-UZm9SycEKWhUbnlrp8dSu1Iq1xiKaLR1wsb5OHtdokU3MaWO9U-XRMBDnWabB_Z2O-6OwhlsiOWC0Y6VbPANnD3lckWlhYrRsF3LHBPUrvJWRhSuF0pADF2dwk2zp-GuL6So6zd2YNkdN5GlRQSPDbyyA5jFFyOfWh06BLyxVs1wo_QJ76okyT2gydk9eOT5Kl7ZO2-bkRzP-wBtO8fm_vEQCV4CPnz2I8Vo335wgAvejJPIToveXpVi9pvQAAg8fs06-cDUiVU1dtpq00j1tHzKNvOcPGg2VYeLrGJ6mBmwrS8ZnhWSueq)

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a460787c354b4c22afa38742ef1f8cb3&_e=H5P6XtdhtZokM1jmR041eZglzNAO_YnDI5kTVkjrhtpmM6YAtUl8O2STjXxkeI9Tkg0mUV0kNpuGV_RnlGLJ0RMU977sW5xvsCXnzxs3-ipy-8hMM4B7VvKOJax_TDcYbZyLF0ORyVrHtydMdOFjqA8P1bhbWAwR2R_w9ZsqNr0Gq3gkJg-6JLRgLRPUvWbw5vbISm1RQN0NKBWBk5qCLraJxgp_5MVrhKyEywd7z5_Bo65_HXbqlEsyNPNm3IcN).

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Do you know my friend Bobby?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-scott [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-scott]
The road to a Democratic majority in the House runs straight through Virginia. I’m proud to support strong VA Democrats who are running for U.S. House seats, and I hope you’ll join me by reading these emails and chipping in when you can. With your help, we can flip the House and keep VA blue!
Friends,
I’ve known Congressman Bobby Scott for a long time, and I think a whole lot of Virginians agree with me when I say that Bobby is exactly the kind of leader we need in Congress.
I’m so proud to support Bobby Scott’s re-election campaign for Virginia’s 3rd Congressional District. As one of my longtime supporters, I’m asking you to join me: Can you split a donation of any amount between me and Bobby right now to power our campaigns through November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-scott]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-scott [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-scott]
In July, Congressman Bobby Scott and I joined Black elected officials and community leaders in Hampton Roads to discuss how we can best serve the community in Congress.
Bobby’s record of fighting for Virginians spans decades . From serving his country to practicing law and helping those in need access legal representation to serving in the Virginia General Assembly and the U.S. Congress – Bobby has devoted his life and career to working for the people .
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-leslie] Bobby has long been recognized as one of the hardest-working members of Congress, and for good reason – he’s fought to ensure all children can access quality education, workers have safe jobs and strong wages, and seniors can have a dignified retirement. He’s worked to expand access to health care, lower costs for seniors, address climate change, and build a more resilient Hampton Roads.
Now more than ever, we need strong, effective Democrats like Bobby Scott in Congress. And I’m not the only one who thinks so — Second Gentleman Doub Emhoff is here in Virginia to campaign with Bobby, too!
Please, will you split a donation of any amount between our campaigns? Together we can keep Virginia blue and keep delivering progress for our great Commonwealth. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-leslie]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-leslie]
Thanks for your support – and for helping Virginia stay blue up and down the ballot this November.
-Tim Kaine
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-leslie]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
Kaine for Virginia
P.O. Box 239

clean_body: [] The road to a Democratic majority in the House runs straight through Virginia. I’m proud to support strong VA Democrats who are running for U.S. House seats, and I hope you’ll join me by reading these emails and chipping in when you can. With your help, we can flip the House and keep VA blue! Friends, I’ve known Congressman Bobby Scott for a long time, and I think a whole lot of Virginians agree with me when I say that Bobby is exactly the kind of leader we need in Congress. I’m so proud to support Bobby Scott’s re-election campaign for Virginia’s 3rd Congressional District. As one of my longtime supporters, I’m asking you to join me: Can you split a donation of any amount between me and Bobby right now to power our campaigns through November? [] [] In July, Congressman Bobby Scott and I joined Black elected officials and community leaders in Hampton Roads to discuss how we can best serve the community in Congress. Bobby’s record of fighting for Virginians spans decades . From serving his country to practicing law and helping those in need access legal representation to serving in the Virginia General Assembly and the U.S. Congress – Bobby has devoted his life and career to working for the people . [] Bobby has long been recognized as one of the hardest-working members of Congress, and for good reason – he’s fought to ensure all children can access quality education, workers have safe jobs and strong wages, and seniors can have a dignified retirement. He’s worked to expand access to health care, lower costs for seniors, address climate change, and build a more resilient Hampton Roads. Now more than ever, we need strong, effective Democrats like Bobby Scott in Congress. And I’m not the only one who thinks so — Second Gentleman Doub Emhoff is here in Virginia to campaign with Bobby, too! Please, will you split a donation of any amount between our campaigns? Together we can keep Virginia blue and keep delivering progress for our great Commonwealth. [] DONATE NOW [] Thanks for your support – and for helping Virginia stay blue up and down the ballot this November. -Tim Kaine CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia Kaine for Virginia P.O. Box 239 Alexandria, VA 22313 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
| **In just a few hours, we’ll be facing the LAST filing deadline before the New Hampshire primary — _which is just over one week away_ —** and we need everyone on board.

The stakes couldn’t be higher — we’re fighting to safeguard our fundamental rights, protect our environment, and defend our democracy. The choice is clear: Kelly Ayotte not only opposes these values but also **_serves her own interests above all else._**

We want to make sure we leave it all on the field and end this primary in the strongest possible position to beat Trump’s extremist ally, Kelly Ayotte.

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]
This Labor Day, we recognize and celebrate all of the hard-working families that contribute to our economy and our country.

We honor those women and men who fought hard for safer working conditions, overtime, the 40-hour work week, retirement plans and so much more.

I am committed to fighting for the rights of our workers and grateful for all of the workers in our district. Their contributions to our community do not go unnoticed.

I will continue to fight to make sure every worker is being treated well and paid fairly at work. Thank you for joining me today in recognizing the diligence of all workers.

Wishing you a safe and happy Labor Day.

Thank you,

Zoe Lofgren
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. clean_body: I think it's time we go "Animal–Style" on Adam Schiff.| | | Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies. | | | | In-N-Out... As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain.This wildly successful business should be a true indicator of California's success and brilliance. Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.Those same policies bring about headlines such as this: In-N-Out was forced to close its first restaurant ever because of the rampant crime in Oakland. The Democrats who did this to our state and to Oakland should be ashamed.I called for the Oakland Mayor to resign, and I called for Adam Schiff to join me - But unsurprisingly he's silent on the issue.That's because Adam Schiff, Gavin Newsom, and Sheng Thao are all part of the same Democrat machine driving California out of prosperity and into the ground. Peter, I think it's time we go "Animal-Style" on Adam Schiff. Your contributions to my campaign show your support and a complete rejection of the 4-decade Democrat-Rule in California. They fund our extensive door-knocking campaigns - pay for impactful ads - and help me travel across the state getting in touch with my supporters and speaking as much as I can to Californians encouraging them to cast off the Democrat malaise. | | | | | | | Your support means the world to me.Sincerely, | | | | | go.txting.io/7up80c PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE Please Add mailto:info@stevegarvey.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. | | I'm running to unseat Republican Senator Kevin Cramer and flip North Dakota blue. [**_I’m about to ask you to help me hit my goal to keep this campaign funded and deliver a victory for everyday folks. But first I’m gonna explain why I need your support. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92036476/495789532/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240902_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc1MjI0M2UtNWE2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0T_tSvs3vNkVj6_SqinB0P_wKTT9OpFhKcadT-zp4AM=) Peter, when I launched my campaign I chose to reject all corporate PAC money. name: John Avlon
subject: This Labor Day, a real pro-labor, pro-family agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

Happy Labor Day! I hope you're enjoying the long weekend away from work, with family and friends, at backyard barbecues and the beach.
But let's not forget that what this weekend celebrates is the crucial role of labor unions in building the America we all love. It’s a holiday that began in New York in the 1880s and then went nationwide.

Watch my Labor Day message here: [https://www.instagram.com/p/C_as0h-PqOf/]
https://www.instagram.com/p/C_as0h-PqOf/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/C_as0h-PqOf/]
(And if you're not on Instagram, here it is on Twitter!) [https://x.com/teamavlonny/status/1830657562423001412?s=12]

The core belief driving my campaign is that we’ve got to Rebuild the Middle. That means rebuilding the middle of our politics and rebuilding the middle of our economy. After all, the middle class is the backbone of America - and three things built the middle class after the Second World War: labor unions, the GI Bill, and community colleges.
I believe that we need to find common ground by building on common facts, and that's why I was sort of stunned - but not surprised - to see my opponent, Nick LaLota, fire off an email claiming that he's been great for labor. Here's a reality check for Nick: He's got a 10 percent rating [https://aflcio.org/scorecard/legislators/nick-lalota] from the AFL-CIO. That's a failing grade by any measure.

In fact, LaLota voted to cut law enforcement and teachers. And the agenda from LaLota’s Republican Study Committee and Project 2025 would be a hammer blow to working families – abolishing public sector unions and collective bargaining and cutting Social Security and Medicare.
It’s time for a better approach that can bring us together, promoting a real pro‐family agenda that lowers the costs for families to bring kids into this world, and then expands child tax credits and builds more housing to make it just a bit easier to raise their children. It’s all part of an agenda to lower the cost of living and improve the quality of life here on Long Island and across the country.

Let’s move away from the extremes this Labor Day. Let's reclaim the American Flag and truthfully say that we respect labor unions and American workers.
Because we know that America works best when we work together so we can build a country where everyone who works hard and plays by the rules can achieve their own American dream.

-John

SPREAD THE WORD [https://www.instagram.com/p/C_as0h-PqOf/]

PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
John Avlon for Congress
PO Box 1200
Sag Harbor, NY 11963
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IS8qlw_Po0mWPR_Ga3fvNQ2?unsubscribedata=OB0%2FWY3%2Bhq7OdNEdG6Fl7oNmGuWsqyx3BNaYyg2%2B10e0DsMczaAwpFXw71vTnTCG%2B5si29Gs9NOuYEBFwI3JiATmyEyC%2FJXudTj6EDiZYOY%2FN6dfQ691hSZPkkEV0wqttkhNV7vBIEDc96eZ1ovE6EDSpKpNHP7rMJi0raKrJiB2kZwlmPxURrlZWFWDyb0fxH3XTIuE7FVW%2BYie0SWxX4HiyYICq4LynNUaFe3M6qaxAZFJp6xLc%2FLpYBaaSXSO8LTwcjUG8X1Wqc2xXxK28vY2Ji4sxb7uCtEZoz3SzxQIwQrz7rUL0T4%2BEzgMvTySeE4C47E6tu7i%2FsceEFB3AMkSi8%2FvytQdT3DC0sZvIa6BsKllUTQJ%2BS7s7W8JTkYkIxW7qgDz2RXzOcwJLU6KfCbKeToS6dFRDqL4%2BCiQcZrEARbtTdPiRT3ZazpfIBmv .

body:
Sending everyone a Happy Labor Day in honor and recognition of the workers who built this country, and keep it moving forward. | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT0lhW6SUIBaDocFw1qIPk2ncdK2ZYzkOmTfT-On-pn93n8tFmRVfb0Qwbavyyn8NecWDQ1Mcfa7REUlUd7t7MFFH4bM75YfFJiDXsE15NitWSE--0z9gm_pM4GLuarUqMUZXhxBlwZMpnNI7duDT7gqUeXY0peOUSB-6nAJ2cvcqrqwc5moRQuuwtlHgIU2wuMtSaui6AiLq3pDFrek84bKikdvMwDkS8ojzc_x5EqUdpTvHBOMWjy4xvBAV-BmR6MhxZuEphi4aMhnYze6n-P8U2Uj03Fpcj7fQxcx1rMYKIrUYgrV2zsrbX_SJ6a7EI40dovUYzejKCKImKMR-BuQ/49f/-m2ETQr0SJe7MPFP74zCEQ/h0/h001.i8aU09xQpleGst2YubYlw2xiDTbiGVcp28OC3yHO61g)

Hey friend,
Sending everyone a Happy Labor Day in honor and recognition of the workers who built this country, and keep it moving forward.

**_Now more than ever, workers of today deserve good-paying jobs!_**
Workers deserve to have __one job__ to cover the cost of living __and__ enough to thrive with their families and loved ones.

In two months, after this Labor Day, Nevadans will cast their votes to determine the outcome of the Senate and the White House. Nevadans will decide.
**On the ballot are extremist Republicans like Donald Trump and Sam Brown who side with corporations and mega-billionaire CEOs over everyday people to attack unions and dismiss workers’ contributions to their success.**
**Democrats including Senator Jacky Rosen and the Biden-Harris Administration helped write and pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, creating jobs for union members including clean-energy union jobs throughout Nevada.**
Union activism and fighting for workers’ rights is my passion and I am here to fight for the long haul, not just because it’s the right thing to do, but because our livelihood depends on it. Time and again, Democrats have proved with action not just words that they have workers’ backs.
**_[The election is going to be close, MAGA megadonors think they can buy the Senate and the White House. clean_body: Sending everyone a Happy Labor Day in honor and recognition of the workers who built this country, and keep it moving forward. | | | | Hey friend, Sending everyone a Happy Labor Day in honor and recognition of the workers who built this country, and keep it moving forward. Now more than ever, workers of today deserve good-paying jobs! Workers deserve to have one job to cover the cost of living and enough to thrive with their families and loved ones. In two months, after this Labor Day, Nevadans will cast their votes to determine the outcome of the Senate and the White House. Nevadans will decide. On the ballot are extremist Republicans like Donald Trump and Sam Brown who side with corporations and mega-billionaire CEOs over everyday people to attack unions and dismiss workers’ contributions to their success. Democrats including Senator Jacky Rosen and the Biden-Harris Administration helped write and pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, creating jobs for union members including clean-energy union jobs throughout Nevada. Union activism and fighting for workers’ rights is my passion and I am here to fight for the long haul, not just because it’s the right thing to do, but because our livelihood depends on it. Time and again, Democrats have proved with action not just words that they have workers’ backs. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | A vote for Democrats is a vote for Nevada’s workers. — Ronnie Proud IBEW 357 Journeyman Wireman Nevada is a critical battleground state for Democrats to keep the Senate and White House in 2024. Unlike Republicans with their war chest full of dark money, we rely on grassroots supporters for the resources needed to win. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
