Hey, friend, it's Tim Ryan. [**I'm asking you to chip in $5 to support my friend and fellow Ohioan, Sherrod Brown**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92036871/495791249/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2768-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JkMDc4Mi01YjY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rv7HgkWy9hG8HVCbhdfi9dox28P1CQEiDJe9wFGH9y4=), so he can win his race and keep the Senate blue.

But first, let me talk to you about what's at stake this year: Sherrod is up against Bernie Moreno, a MAGA Republican who used to be a car salesman (_go figure, friend_). And that's not all – Donald Trump handpicked Moreno to run for this seat, just like he handpicked Ohio Sen. JD Vance to be his running mate.
Now, you might have heard that I ran against Vance in 2022. Let me be straight with you: I know more about JD Vance than just about anyone, and we cannot afford to have him in the White House or to send Bernie Moreno to the Senate to serve alongside him.
**MAGA Republicans like Vance, Trump, and Moreno want to roll back all our progress. They want to ban abortion nationwide, cut Social Security and Medicare, and cut taxes for their billionaire friends while working folks are stuck with the bill.**
Sherrod is fighting like hell to make sure we can stop them, but national Republicans are breaking records to outspend him on TV, so he's counting on us to help him fight back and win.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Labor Day Message: 9/02/2024
body:
Happy Labor Day
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**September 2, 2024** **Happy Labor Day!** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | _Dear RMV Readers,_
_As Labor Day approaches, I'm reminded of the incredible spirit of hard work and dedication that has built this great nation. It's a day to celebrate our collective achievements and honor the tireless efforts of people like you who keep our community strong and vibrant._
_With the upcoming election, we all have a powerful opportunity to shape our future through active participation and thoughtful decision-making. In these challenging times, I believe in our ability to come together and make a real difference. I encourage each of you to consider getting involved with Rocky Mountain Voice, where your passion and commitment can truly shine._
_We're currently looking for volunteers to help us reach more people and engage them in our democratic process. A great way to start is by helping us expand the reach of our Mountain Minute newsletter. Please share this[link](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with friends, family, and neighbors, and encourage them to subscribe. It's a simple yet meaningful way to keep our community informed and connected. Remember to check your spam folder after signing up, as our messages occasionally get filtered out. Your support ensures our voice remains strong, especially against challenges like big tech that might try to quiet us._
_I also want to encourage everyone to get involved at the local level. Whether it's knocking on doors, making calls, sending texts, or writing heartfelt notes to voters in key battleground states, every action makes a difference. Consider using tools like the TP Action app, which you can download for free and can help you connect with voters and inspire them to make their voices heard at the polls._
_This Labor Day, let's remember the power of unity and shared effort. Together, we can create the change we wish to see in the world. Let's inspire one another to engage actively, not just on a national level, but right here at home with Rocky Mountain Voice. Your involvement can help shape the outcome of this election and set a positive direction for our future._
_Thank you for all that you do. I am deeply grateful for your hard work, passion, and dedication. Wishing you a hopeful and inspiring Labor Day!_
_With heartfelt appreciation,_ _Heidi Ganahl_
---
|
---
| | |
---

name: Right Wing Report
subject: This Supreme Court Ruling is a Nightmare for Kamala Harris That’ll Change Everything
body:
| | | |

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: I just don’t get it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
Unless I’m wrong, we understand you to be an America First patriot who backs President Trump and wants to stop the destruction of our country at the hands of the radical left. |
---
I don’t get it, fellow patriot...

> **Ohio is a top-target Senate race for Republicans to flip in 2024.
>
> It’s one of only three Senate races rated as a “toss-up.”
>
> It’s the most expensive Senate race in the country by far.
>
> It’s key to winning back a Republican Senate majority. **

_But you don’t seem to want to lend your support to winning this race?_

Unless I’m wrong, we understand you to be an America First patriot who backs President Trump and wants to stop the destruction of our country at the hands of the radical left.

I want to make it clear to you now: **We can’t secure our borders, lower inflation, make our communities safe again, or defend against the woke agenda without a victory in my race.**

Right now, we’re getting buried by the Democrats in the fundraising game. But we’re still closing in on Sherrod Brown in the polls, and thankfully, we still have time to make up our fundraising shortfall.

[**Will you commit to victory by contributing $10, $25, $50, $100 or even more today? Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I will always stand up for workers’ rights in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Throughout our nation’s history, brave men and women have come together to fight for workers' rights to organize and advocate for better labor conditions.
We are a better country for it. The United States wouldn’t be what it is today without unions.
Because of the labor movement, we have two-day weekends, health and safety inspections, child labor laws, and a minimum wage.
But these advancements have meant so much more than that. They have brought us closer to a world where each person has the right to dignified work in a safe environment with a livable wage. And today, we remember that this work is not over.
I am proud to be endorsed by the UFCW, IBEW, Arizona AFL-CIO and so many more. In Congress, I will always stand up for workers’ rights.
Have a happy Labor Day.
Kirsten
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090224_LaborDay_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090224_LaborDay_act&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090224_LaborDay_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090224_LaborDay_act]
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090224_LaborDay_act]

name: Paul Buskirk for Congress
subject: Notes From Paul...LABOR is the Backbone of Our District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Buskirk for Congress campaign
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/700fcae7abb3/how-can-i-help-the-campaign-12703472?e=a3f26a61c6)
---
| It is only fitting on Labor Day that we take a moment to reflect – and thank – those who truly labor to feed their families and help our economy thrive. Our 1st Congressional District of Kansas – 60 counties and 42,000 square miles – hosts the economies that drive our state’s prosperity: agriculture; education, and industry all are embedded in our communities. Unions are at the heart of this ongoing success.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Back in February, I spent some time in Dodge City. This community is one of the most diverse populations in our entire state. I learned that eighty-two languages and dialects were spoken in the K-12 schools last year. While in town, I had the opportunity to visit with members of the local United Food and Commercial Workers - UFCW. These Union members work at the two major meat-packing plants in the community. To give you some perspective, Dodge City is a community of approximately 25,000 and the packing plants employ 6,000 of these residents. That’s nearly 25% of the residents of this community.
My local host shared with me that the local Union maintains a community center for its members. The UFCW encourages its members to learn English, and where relevant to actively pursue U.S. Citizenship. To support this effort, the UFCW employs a dedicated staff to teach ESL – English as a Second Language – as well as ongoing classes on citizenship. My host asked me if I would be willing to visit one of her classes. Of course, I said **YES**! I asked her if this was a class pursuing citizenship. She said, “No, this group has already earned their U.S. citizenship. They continue to attend my class to understand what being a U.S. citizen really means.”
That same afternoon, after the shift change at the packing plants, a few dozen UFCW workers came to the community center and sat in a makeshift classroom. Their collective English was far better than my non-existent Spanish (so much for taking German in high school...). While a little guarded, as we had just met, they shared a bit of their stories with me and then asked amazing questions.
---
| After this visit, encouraged by the Union, I walked away, convinced, that these very special new U.S. citizens knew more about the U.S. Constitution than 95% of most of the rest of us walking the streets in our district. And...they are so passionate about learning about what it means to be an American citizen, they continue to learn in their spare time!
This local Union provides this amazing encouragement and support for being an American. So today, let us stop for just a moment to be so grateful for these Union workers, not only for the work they do that enhances our lives, as well as the dedication of the organizations that support and encourage the great people of our 1st District of Kansas!
---
| **MANY voices. ONE passion.****UNITED to provide a legacy for our children.**
---
|
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://buskirkforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=655592fff57b051aa2c750af6&id=8e110f6f32&e=a3f26a61c6)

If you prefer to make your donation via a check, please mail your donation to _**Buskirk for Congress,

name: 2016 TRUMP campaign manager Kellyanne Conway
subject: 91/100 votes for the Biden-Harris agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Comrade Kamala knows these Senators will do ANYTHING she says |
**91%**
These radical Senators and Representatives below voted for the dangerous Biden-Harris agenda that has plunged our country into crime-ridden economic collapse, **a WHOPPING 91% of the time as Senators, Fellow American.**

**Bob Casey, D-Pennsylvania
Tammy Baldwin, D-Wisconsin
Jon Tester, D-Montana
Sherrod Brown, D-Ohio
Jacky Rosen, D-Nevada
Martin Heinrich, D-New Mexico
Ruben Gallego, D-Arizona-3

Patriot, **I 'll be blunt. _Democrats declared war on Texas and me_.** We now know, they quietly laid the groundwork to give my far-left opponent, Colin Allred, a massive fundraising boost after his speech at the DNC Convention in Chicago on Thursday night.

In his speech, he attacked me, and predicted that he would beat me and flip Texas blue. __And then national Democrats did the rest__ , flooding his online fundraising account with **over one million dollars** in hard-money contributions via their **ActBlue** online network. clean_body: | | | Patriot, I 'll be blunt. Democrats declared war on Texas and me. We now know, they quietly laid the groundwork to give my far-left opponent, Colin Allred, a massive fundraising boost after his speech at the DNC Convention in Chicago on Thursday night. In his speech, he attacked me, and predicted that he would beat me and flip Texas blue. And then national Democrats did the rest , flooding his online fundraising account with over one million dollars in hard-money contributions via their ActBlue online network. Below is a picture of Allred and the Democrats spiking the football already on X. Let 's make sure this post goes down in history as a massive mistake- let's raise a million dollars to shut down the Democrats' momentum cold. __________ Thank you for your strong support!With determination to defend Texas, | | Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92039308/495800430/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVkNTEyYi02NDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maeiukcWzKruJ6vknZhqP9-B-QN67ttFoeIZt1GEZNg=&emci=faac438f-e366-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=15ed512b-6469-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15820338)

Happy Labor Day, Peter!

Labor Day is more than just a long weekend – it's a time to celebrate the workers who fought tirelessly for better working conditions, fair pay, and the rights we often take for granted. It's a moment to thank those who advocate for safer workplaces and the well-being of all employees.

**But as we reflect on these victories, we must also acknowledge that the fight isn't over.** There's still so much more we can do to support our workers. We need better healthcare options, more robust paid family leave, and a renewed commitment to creating safe, equitable workplaces for everyone.

This Labor Day, let's not only honor those who came before us _but also pledge to be the change we want to see today._ Together, we can build a future where every worker is respected, protected, and given the opportunities they deserve.

Thank you for standing with us in this fight.

In solidarity,

Schrier for Congress Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92039309/495800431/-1223838267?refcode=em24_240902_labord_enask_gq_act___sfc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240902_labord_enask_gq_act___sfc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=15ed512b-6469-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVkNTEyYi02NDY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maeiukcWzKruJ6vknZhqP9-B-QN67ttFoeIZt1GEZNg=)

name: Robert Antonellis for U.S. Senate
subject: John Deaton STILL owes an Apology!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobforma/apology-from-john-deaton-251?e=eb86c99a95)
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Hello Patriotic Friends,

Anyone running for office as a Republican should support and vote for the Republican Presidential nominee President Donald J. Trump.
During the WRKO debate, I declared I would certainly vote for Trump, to become the 47th President. But, both my opponents John Deaton & Ian Cain announced they WOULD NOT vote for Trump on November 5th.
Deaton, has used hostile tweets toward President Trump, “Trump has the intellect of a 4-years old child.” And went on to expressed disgust for people who support Trump, like you and me “...anyone that believes the nonsense and BS that you [Trump] are shoveling now is to be judged as a complete and utter moron.”
There are Marines, Veterans, and Patriotic Citizens who deserve an apology. As the only true Republican candidate running for U.S. Senate, I am demanding that John Deaton apologize for these spiteful filled words. (See below, _**Semper Fidelis “always faithful"**_)
Sincerely,Robert Antonellis[BobForMA.com](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=db0ba03973&e=eb86c99a95)
---
[DONATE](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=c776ebf3c6&e=eb86c99a95)
|

**Semper Fidelis “always faithful”?**
SOMERVILLE MA:
July 24, 2024
PRESS RELEASE
John Deaton Semper Fidelis “always faithful”?
One of the three viable Elizabeth Warren’s advisories running for U.S. Senate, John Deaton, is a veteran. He served our country as a Marine. How can he not align himself with “Make America Great Again”? Why does he repeatedly avow his hatred for President Donald Trump, true American patriots, and veterans?
A marine takes an oath “to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies foreign and domestic”. Semper Fidelis.
Bob Antonellis, lives by a code of honor. He has not sworn an oath to the military but as a lifelong proud American he believes in defending the U.S. Constitution. Always faithful.
According to The Daily Beast,(Brodie, 2024) Deaton Tweeted, “ _You (Trump) actually may be the worst human being in the US,”_ and _“you have without question the mind of a 4-year-old...”_ “ _...anyone that believes the nonsense and BS that you are shoveling now is to be judged as a complete and utter moron.”_ Not Semper Fidelis.
Antonellis’s campaign promotes election integrity, government accountability, and a return to constitutional principles. He supports President Donald J. Trump’s agenda of America First – Always faithful.
Trump-Derangement-Syndrome (TDS) is apparent on social media, mainstream media and in so many Anti-American behaviors. Deaton’s self-proclaimed symptoms are readable in his book, Food Stamp Warrior. Not Semper Fidelis.
Both of Deaton’s rivals, Antonellis and Cain, agree that John Deaton is unfit for any form of public service, especially Federal Office.
Respectfully submitted and always faithful,
Robert Antonellis
U.S. Senate Candidate [R-MA]
[www.BobForMA.com](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=c98526174e&e=eb86c99a95)
[Bob@BobForMA.com](mailto:Bob@BobForMA.com)
857-396-0519

---
[DONATE](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=093b9320e6&e=eb86c99a95)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over ... yet
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-MWqdWNG
ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I feel like our culture has forgotten-or ignored-some
very important and basic lessons
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-MWqdWNG

Fellow
Patriot,

I feel
like our culture has forgotten-or ignored-some very important and
basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.

Our
society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its
most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was
once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has
become the new normal.

Medicine
tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also
tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves,
and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not
treated as though they are alive or even human.

As a
surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you
that they are very much alive.

Life is a
precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No
person is disposable, and every life is precious according to
Him.

I believe
that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this
right by our society. I believe that together we can make a
difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also
believe that I'm not alone in this belief.

I believe
that you believe that too.

I've
started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are
looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that
values life but that takes people like you and I making a
commitment.

The first
step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing
to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me today
and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?

I've
created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you
read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals
and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the
unborn?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63516274:W-MWqdWNG:m:3:2627245898:AAAA2F07980303FA2651CDC8E676C759:r

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

Every day, we’re reminded of the urgent need for common-sense gun safety regulations. Too many families have been devastated by gun violence, and too many lives have been cut short.

In Congress, I will remain committed to advocating for policies that will save lives – _ensuring background checks for gun sales, closing dangerous loopholes, and keeping guns out of the hands of those who pose a threat to themselves or others._

Gun safety is not a partisan issue, and it’s time for all of us to stand together and say enough is enough. These policies are common-sense steps we must take to protect our communities from senseless gun violence.

Taking back the House will be crucial to making meaningful progress towards building a future where no one has to live their life in fear of gun violence. subject: What can $5 do?

body:
I know that today, $5 may not get you much, but for our team, $5 can be the difference between winning and losing this election.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040309/495804027/985656312?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b2_sesfd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JlYjZlYS02ODY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9fQISut0lodYGWTnQyVrYP5MdZG1273QbHTbOc_b0M=) Peter, this is Sunny, Emilia’s Finance Director. I know that today, $5 may not get you much, but for our team, $5 can be the difference between winning and losing this election. It sounds crazy, [**but $5 could really make the difference**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040310/495804028/985656312?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b2_sesfd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JlYjZlYS02ODY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9fQISut0lodYGWTnQyVrYP5MdZG1273QbHTbOc_b0M=) – especially in a race as competitive as ours, and with Emilia and her opponent neck and neck. Because we’re running a people-powered campaign, you all are at the forefront of this movement. When everyone pitches in what they can, [**whether it's $25, $5, or $1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040311/495804029/985656312?&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b2_sesfd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JlYjZlYS02ODY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9fQISut0lodYGWTnQyVrYP5MdZG1273QbHTbOc_b0M=), it allows us to continue to make the investments that we need to keep this movement going full speed. Your donation helps us win this race by keeping our ads on the air, making sure our volunteers have enough materials, and ensuring that voters are informed why Emilia is the best choice for OH-13. ** $5 _—or whatever you can pitch in—_ means so much on a team like ours. **[**So, Peter, can we please count on you to help us in the fight for OH-13?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040312/495804030/985656312?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b2_sesfd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JlYjZlYS02ODY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9fQISut0lodYGWTnQyVrYP5MdZG1273QbHTbOc_b0M=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040313/495804031/985656312?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b2_sesfd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JlYjZlYS02ODY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9fQISut0lodYGWTnQyVrYP5MdZG1273QbHTbOc_b0M=) | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040314/495804032/985656312?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b2_sesfd_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JlYjZlYS02ODY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9fQISut0lodYGWTnQyVrYP5MdZG1273QbHTbOc_b0M=)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Labor Day Reminder: Jim Jordan fails our working families
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Labor Day is a time to honor the strength and resilience of working people, especially those in Ohio’s 4th Congressional District, where the legacy of labor unions runs deep.
In places like Mansfield, known for its rich industrial history...
And Lima, where generations of workers at the Lima Locomotive Works and the Joint Systems Manufacturing Center have stood strong with their unions...
Workers have long defended their rights, fighting for fair wages, safe working conditions, and the dignity that comes with a hard day’s work.
These communities have been shaped by the tireless efforts of union members who refused to back down in the face of adversity.
It’s time our communities, the workers of Ohio, and the country at large had a representative who truly fights for their interests—not the corporate greed and extremist agenda Jim Jordan represents. Help us send a message to Jordan and his ULTRA-MAGA ant-worker cronies by contributing today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_link1]
Growing up, I saw firsthand what it was like for my dad, a contractor who didn’t have union protections.
He worked long hours with little security, and there was no safety net when times were tough.
That’s why I’m committed to standing with unions and working people—to ensure that no one has to go through what my dad did.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_image1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_image1]
That’s a stark contrast to Jim Jordan and his absolutely shameful record on workers’ rights.
Jordan is a proud sponsor of the National Right to Work Act, legislation designed to undermine unions and strip workers of their power – he’s even featured in promotional materials by the National Right to Work Committee.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_image2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_image2]
With a lifetime score of just 5% from the AFL-CIO, Jordan’s record is clear: he is NOT on the side of Ohio’s working families.
Now Jordan is aiming for another run at Speaker of the House, and if Trump wins this November he’ll be in the perfect position to execute all the anti-labor plans baked into Project 2025 . First up? Gutting the National Labor Relations Board.
There’s only one way to stop this radical agenda – defeating the most dangerous man in Congress, Jim Jordan.
We’ve already raised over $1.4 million to take Jim Jordan down and we’re surging in the polls. I need your support today to keep Jordan on the run until we run him all the way out of Congress! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_link2]
This Labor Day, let’s honor the history of labor in our district and our country and commit to a future where every worker has the protections and respect they’ve earned.
As your next representative, I will stand shoulder-to-shoulder with workers every step of the way. Together, we’ll stand up to the corporate interests that Jim Jordan serves and make sure that Ohio’s working families get the fair deal they deserve.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/Screenshot%202023-08-30%20at%2012.16.45%20PM.jpeg]
Donate to Tamie Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_button]
Tamie Wilson is the Democratic nominee ready to unseat ULTRA MAGA extremist Jim Jordan in OH-04. A single mom and survivor who knows what it’s like to endure and overcome challenges, Tamie's fighting for jobs, healthcare, and positive change for everyday Americans. Your donations will help Tamie turn out every voter we need to flip this seat and send Jordan packing.
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240902_labor_day_footer]
©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved
To contribute via check, please address to:
Tamie Wilson For US
273 Saratoga St
Delaware, OH 43015
United States
www.tamiewilson.com [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]

# It’s Time to Reinvest in America
---
| _I’m running for U.S. Senate because America is at a crossroads._
The crisis at our border, the strain in our pocketbooks, and the growing global threats abroad are putting our prosperity and security at risk.
**It’s time to reinvest in America - our infrastructure, our family, and our future.**
I’m asking for your vote tomorrow to begin the work that needs to be done on behalf of Massachusetts and America.
Be sure to pull a Republican ballot and vote for me, Ian Cain.
Thank you for your support,Ian Cain

body:
Tennessee is great, because workers are great.

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f0191b4727c19-8e064f7f-ee49-4516-b37e-aa0128de9c1b-000000/Iqmv_34YKKznv2LF9HlYtTH7Afc=174)
---
Hello Peter,
---
| | As we celebrate Labor Day, we pause to honor the hard-working men and women who have built and continue to build the strength and prosperity of our great state. Tennessee's labor history is rich with stories of perseverance, solidarity, and progress—values that resonate deeply with our commitment to justice, fairness, and opportunity for all.

One of the pivotal moments in Tennessee’s labor movement was the 1934 General Textile Strike, where thousands of workers across the state took a stand for better wages and working conditions. The courage and determination shown during this strike laid the groundwork for future labor protections that many of us benefit from today.

Tennessee has also been home to some of the most significant strides in civil rights and labor rights. The Memphis Sanitation Workers' Strike of 1968, which drew national attention and support from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., remains a powerful example of the fight for dignity and equality in the workplace. The legacy of that struggle continues to inspire us to advocate for workers’ rights and fair treatment for all.

As Democrats, we take pride in this history and remain committed to fighting for policies that uplift working families, ensure fair wages, and protect the right to organize.

This Labor Day, we celebrate the contributions of every worker who has shaped our state’s history and who continues to drive our future forward.

Wishing you and your loved ones a restful and meaningful holiday.
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team
---
| [Donate](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1/1/010f0191b4727c19-8e064f7f-ee49-4516-b37e-aa0128de9c1b-000000/M1Mh4lOOjaWRyyR0qBB68ATzrs0=174 "Donate")
---
_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight.___

---

_Team Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Debbie
subject: Thank you, from the bottom of my heart.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
we've come so far since launching our campaign
we've come so far since launching our campaign
| | |
---
Friend — it means a great deal to write to you as your official Democratic nominee for Florida's U.S. Senate seat.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040730/495805668/503259150?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1822-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWY1MTQxZjctNmM2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SDc99NIiP2Sss8Pzb08vuJiFKtoA3FqMDzE8c-CHW4s=)**
Back when I was a little girl, I never could have imagined running in a battleground race like this — a race that will decide the fate of our Senate majority. I was an immigrant who worked in a doughnut shop to help support my family. I was the daughter of a mother who worked double shifts to ensure my sister and I had our own version of the American Dream.
Whether you joined this team one year ago or yesterday, you've helped me make what was once only a dream a _reality._ Thanks to your support, we've built a grassroots movement that will retire one of the most extremist, dangerous senators in the country. **_Thank you, from the bottom of my heart._**
With 64 days until Election Day — with the primary behind us and Rick Scott already dropping millions of dollars in ads against me — this is where the hard work to finish the job begins. We'll continue to face millions of dollars in attacks. We'll see polls that have us behind a little, tied, and up a little. It will be close and come down to _every last vote_.
**While the road ahead will be unpredictable, I do know that the only way I can win is with the grassroots support of people like you. So, on the anniversary of our campaign launch, I'm asking you:

[Please, will you rush a contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to help me defeat Rick Scott in Florida and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92040731/495805669/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1822-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWY1MTQxZjctNmM2OS1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SDc99NIiP2Sss8Pzb08vuJiFKtoA3FqMDzE8c-CHW4s=)**

I was an immigrant who worked in a doughnut shop to help support my family. I was the daughter of a mother who worked double shifts to ensure my sister and I had our own version of the American Dream. Whether you joined this team one year ago or yesterday, you've helped me make what was once only a dream a reality. Thanks to your support, we've built a grassroots movement that will retire one of the most extremist, dangerous senators in the country. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart. With 64 days until Election Day — with the primary behind us and Rick Scott already dropping millions of dollars in ads against me — this is where the hard work to finish the job begins. We'll continue to face millions of dollars in attacks. We'll see polls that have us behind a little, tied, and up a little. It will be close and come down to every last vote. While the road ahead will be unpredictable, I do know that the only way I can win is with the grassroots support of people like you. So, on the anniversary of our campaign launch, I'm asking you: = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for everything, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. name: James Brown
subject: Two Paths
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAMES BROWN FOR MONTANA—REPUBLICAN—LORNA KUNEY, TREASURERPO BOX 1585, HELENA, MT 59624
body:
One path—the path my woke Democrat opponent proposes—follows the failed policies of the Biden-Harris years. This path resulted in open borders, s | | | | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
This coming November, Montanans will make important election choices that will have a profound impact on our shared future. On Election Day, November 5th, we have the opportunity to choose between very different paths for our cherished Treasure State. One path—the path my woke Democrat opponent proposes—follows the failed policies of the Biden-Harris years.
This path resulted in open borders, soaring grocery prices, the defund the police movement, higher interest rates, and a lack of affordable housing. The reality is that “Bidenomics” is costing the average Montana household an estimated $11,400.00 more a year to live.
---
[CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY! ](https://gmail.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e42c6bb78e8b53de5ee6ec610&id=503138d55e&e=80cd3574a3)
| The better path gets spending under control, leaves more money in the bank accounts of Montana’s families, and restores respect for the nation’s borders. It also keeps Montana affordable, particularly for those young folks we are just starting out in life.
The latter course is the Republican party’s approach. It is also the path I support as the Republican nominee for Montana State Auditor. As a fourth generation Montanan, I know firsthand the high quality of life afforded here in ‘Big Sky Country’ — whether it is our people, our public land, our lengthy history of natural resources development, or our shared live and let live culture. Even as a young man growing up in Dillon, I knew I wanted to dedicate my life to protecting Montana’s future. That’s why I became a land use and business attorney. And that is why I have dedicated my professional career to protecting working men and women. The path of economic freedom and true free-market competition is the clear route to economic growth and prosperity. As Auditor, I will advance policies that make life more affordable by ensuring that insurance coverage is more accessible and more affordable for all.
You can contribute online by visiting my webpage at [jamesbrownformontana.com](https://gmail.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e42c6bb78e8b53de5ee6ec610&id=d006b47d18&e=80cd3574a3). My colleague Troy Downing leaves the State Auditor’s office on sound footing. I’m committed to building on that legacy of success and I humbly ask for your vote in November. Would you pledge of $790 or any amount so that, together, we lay a path for the betterment of all Montanans? Yours truly,
James BrownRepublican Candidate for State Auditor
---
[CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY! ](https://gmail.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e42c6bb78e8b53de5ee6ec610&id=7a42c2d52f&e=80cd3574a3)
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/jamesbrownformontana/two-paths?e=80cd3574a3)
PAID FOR BY JAMES BROWN FOR MONTANA—REPUBLICAN—LORNA KUNEY, TREASURERPO BOX 1585, HELENA, MT 59624

name: Senate Republicans
subject: DSCC DOMINATES JULY, RAISES 2X NRSC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We could fail to retake the Majority and suffer through President Kamala Harris if we refuse to step up now. |
**🚨 DSCC DOUBLES NRSC JULY FUNDRAISING HAUL 🚨**
Peter, this isn’t the news we wanted to share.

Our candidates are being outraised and outspent by margins of 2, 3, and even 4 to 1 in close races where we can’t afford to give an INCH to Democrats.

We could lose critical seats and FAIL to take back the Majority if Republicans don’t step up to help us stay on pace with Democrats’ astronomical fundraising numbers.

We need your help to close the massive fundraising and spending gap that is burying our strong candidates competing in otherwise close races.

**[Please help us close the fundraising gap and take back the Senate.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3e3f95a9c5bc418a83d963f6dae304a3&_e=yHVEAi3_ShKQ06qEYIQawwfdNaCrOJbFTmCYYifajggcVTmf596Kwh2ybjYzwqVsPpYNBP4eznc7-aVr4SofhLdJbk3FAAkpt0_8eC90YubbDNxj7P-cdjRi-en3Sx4A1Qm2wM0T_vYf0WYfNpZjOCikfpmifLl1wq5bscKRD_sSlfE0whStiIcBei5hgMKHz7z2Pjt1PH4sCUZlS4-KdI8IJBAKUGa994bXGqF4Y5xFHfKdp5xwG72wGqow7pur6TNc5Fu2w8sXO7PzqUkoEjxBLhCJWe72P8a7fXw9pIydVutlWnVXJiVSGK4mMznl0hEFOd7s-KO2oVDWo0lC7RLA4s3CTQroovnMo-v6MJZapGEZE6S-KXYZewaPUAtz5zCIL5oW-3pNA7lu-zW8fRXlgVt6K8SYbYVr4_8LVb39QQvvN__eQR9fnUVDYWA5V2H-c841roWYtS96hESL9Q%3D%3D)**

[ ** CLOSE THE FUNDRAISING GAP **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3e3f95a9c5bc418a83d963f6dae304a3&_e=yHVEAi3_ShKQ06qEYIQawwfdNaCrOJbFTmCYYifajggcVTmf596Kwh2ybjYzwqVsPpYNBP4eznc7-aVr4SofhLdJbk3FAAkpt0_8eC90YubbDNxj7P-cdjRi-en3Sx4A1Qm2wM0T_vYf0WYfNpZjOCikfpmifLl1wq5bscKRD_sSlfE0whStiIcBei5hgMKHz7z2Pjt1PH4sCUZlS4-KdI8IJBAKUGa994bXGqF4Y5xFHfKdp5xwG72wGqow7pur6TNc5Fu2w8sXO7PzqUkoEjxBLhCJWe72P8a7fXw9pIydVutlWnVXJiVSGK4mMznll1CmpGDaRox2OoKNr77vyDK7YKSBRRCo9Dl-gWT4MxFWcaLzTj_sdDqp-K9d-b2k50CFWvD8J92MgwG5aFZDk3QngRU2MRpqjwKb7jD6OZk88TNw5aQMaC30XprC9uB-xcXdVHMOu1GkyzoKT_aBUQ%3D%3D)
[ ** TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3e3f95a9c5bc418a83d963f6dae304a3&_e=yHVEAi3_ShKQ06qEYIQawwfdNaCrOJbFTmCYYifajggcVTmf596Kwh2ybjYzwqVsPpYNBP4eznc7-aVr4SofhLdJbk3FAAkpt0_8eC90YubbDNxj7P-cdjRi-en3Sx4A1Qm2wM0T_vYf0WYfNpZjOCikfpmifLl1wq5bscKRD_sSlfE0whStiIcBei5hgMKHz7z2Pjt1PH4sCUZlS4-KdI8IJBAKUGa994bXGqF4Y5xFHfKdp5xwG72wGqow7pur6TNc5Fu2w8sXO7PzqUkoEjxBLhCJWe72P8a7fXw9pIydVutlWnVXJiVSGK4mMznlSp-0PBzzZ1vWO0UYdLx-olL7bVUZGdxUOp_--k_xh1KI0BMXjU562aNy_XpZuZLz8vgfyGxKQN7ovlGCVU7NctFeltBn24v4RKI0-csOXtXBZCTn18qPEKLWo3tXYDXveuhqqVz2M97o8d61YJtu4A%3D%3D)
If Democrats have double the money our candidates do, they can blanket the airwaves with advertisements and attacks on our Republican leaders.

**After a while, even when those attacks are false and continuously repeated on TV, radio, and the Internet,_they stick._**

name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: Project 2025's blatant attack on workers' rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

Donald Trump and JD Vance's far-right playbook, Project 2025, is full of wacky ideas. But we need to talk about its blatant attack on workers' rights.
**Project 2025 would eliminate overtime protections** for an estimated 4.3 million workers, allowing states to opt out of federal overtime and minimum wage laws.

**Project 2025 would eliminate unions as we know them** , taking away the bargaining power and collective organizing that generations of Ohioans have fought for and earned.

**Project 2025 would give corporations a free pass to****engage in union-busting activities** , which will drive up profits for C-suite executives.
Here's what you won't find in Project 2025: **the belief that hard work should pay off or that every worker should have a voice in the workplace. That's the Dignity of Work, and I've fought for it every day of my career.**

**It's clear as day that the GOP's corporate megadonors are spending record-breaking amounts of money to defeat me, flip the Senate, and cash in their newfound power by implementing Project 2025.**
Friend, I want to continue to fight for the people who make this country work, but there's no way I'll be able to fight back against the GOP's slew of attack ads against me without your help – and the polls show I'm neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent.

name: BobCasey.com
subject: Yes, David McCormick really said this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz)
Peter —
With the Senate AND the White House hinging on Pennsylvania: Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to chip in $5 to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign today?
**If you don’t need convincing, you can chip in here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?refcode=em20240902-3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-3&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz)**
What if we told you that David McCormick, Bob’s mega-millionaire opponent, supports a national abortion ban with NO EXCEPTIONS for rape or incest?
Or that he’s lying about living in Pennsylvania and in reality, lives in a $16 million mansion in Connecticut?
What if we told you that David McCormick said that the overturning of Roe v. Wade was a “huge victory,” and if elected, he would vote to ban abortion nationwide?
Or that he wants to put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block?
Finally, what if we told you that if our fundraising slows, we could end up with this mega-millionaire, anti-choice, out-of-touch, out-of-stater representing Pennsylvania in the Senate?
Bob fights day in and day out for Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and we can’t afford to lose his leadership. So we’re asking:
**[Will you PLEASE make a $5 contribution to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign to help keep PA blue this year?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-3&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240902-3-el&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240902-3-el&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240902-3-el&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240902-3-el&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240902-3-el&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240902-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240902-3&refcode2=4058_552475_-4YVVz&akid=4058%2E552475%2E-4YVVz)

It’s less about how much you chip in and more about showing the strength of this team. As Bob likes to say, if we work together now, we’ll win together in November.
— Team Casey

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
I promise to always fight for the working families in OH–01, and to defend our unions.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92042755/495812730/366454392?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.02_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTU3Zjg3Yi03NzY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_C6uBqpSrnN-JYMgDjd5G5yM_oeWq5-EIPWkanAe0Y=)
---
Team,

It’s Greg here, writing to wish you all a meaningful Labor Day. Today is not just a day off; it’s a time to reflect on the progress we’ve made in securing fair wages, safe working conditions, and the rights of workers to organize and bargain collectively. These are values we hold dear and continue to fight for in Congress.

Our efforts are not done. We remain committed to advancing policies that support working families, create good-paying jobs, and ensure that every individual is treated with dignity. Together, we can build an economy that supports working people – not just the super wealthy and big corporations.

This Labor Day, let’s celebrate the victories we’ve won and renew our commitment to the work ahead. I’m grateful to have you by my side as we continue to fight for a fairer, more just Southwest Ohio.

Wishing you a meaningful Labor Day with family and friends.

In Solidarity,

_Greg_

name: Lidia Vargas
subject: my son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I’m doing what moms do: I’m stepping in to help Tony out.

|
---

| | [**_Hi! I’m Tony’s mom, Lidia, and I’m reaching out for a very special reason: Tony's been working so hard to connect with voters, fight back against TV attacks, and win this toss-up race – he won’t even take a break to celebrate his own birthday! That’s why I hope to raise 450 donations before his birthday ends in just 7 hours to help him win his race for Congress. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. name: Jill Stein for President
subject: AOC just attacked Jill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
AOC says Jill is “predatory” and “not authentic”

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=1)
---
Peter, This is wild: just yesterday, Democratic representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez posted an Instagram video riddled with falsehoods in which she attacked Jill Stein and the Green Party as “not authentic” and “predatory”. Even with the usual paid DNC trolls jumping in to amplify AOC’s talking points, Jill’s replies on X/Twitter blew them out of the water:
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PFt0RQJG8CjCGB0W6jg0LG-pmkYeT4NN2KK09BEs9O5VaW2LhEMcICuqonVkARtbmb6pQemZ4e4rnzWYCTX87g&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=2)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PFt0RQJG8CjCGB0W6jg0LG-pmkYeT4NN2KK09BEs9O5m5zCc5Gtu6oBWph8c9aN1iTTO8S5fGQdgZiTkgd2CyQ&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=3)
---
We’ll let you in on a little secret: we have a member of Team Stein/Ware who worked on AOC's 2018 campaign and helped shape her platform (which at the time looked _a lot_ like Jill’s 2016 platform). But this person is with our movement now because they’ve seen the failed strategy of reforming the reactionary right-wing politics of the Democratic Party from within. With more and more people coming to the same realization that the Democratic Party is a dead end for progress,**it’s clear that the Democrats are mobilizing all the firepower they can to attack Jill, Butch, and the Green Party for daring to offer a real choice for voters like you who care about people, planet, and peace.** **Peter,[will you pitch in right now to help us fight back against the anti-Democratic Party’s attacks?](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=4)**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=5)
---
Let’s talk about the shameless, hypocritical, and frankly abusive behavior of Democrats who act concerned that the Green Party isn’t having enough success against the duopoly - while their own party actively suppresses Greens by suing us off ballots, hiring paid operatives to sabotage our campaigns, locking us out of debates, fighting ranked-choice voting, attacking us with all kinds of misinformation and smears, and doing everything they can to prevent voters like you from having real choice. Why isn’t AOC saying anything about _that_? **Despite this relentless repression by the anti-Democratic Party, the Green Party has persevered and Greens have won 1400 elections** , making us the most successful independent left party since Eugene Debs’ Socialist Party. We’ve won city council seats, mayoral races, school board elections, and despite the massive disadvantages for grassroots candidates who don’t take corporate money, we’ve won state legislative seats too. **Contrary to the misinformation coming from AOC and countless DNC trolls, Jill Stein has supported many down-ballot candidates, campaigned with them, fundraised for them, and even _recruited_ many of them.** She has spoken at state Green Party conventions, community meetings, college campuses, and every kind of protest you can imagine, from anti-war to climate to racial justice. Greens are active in these movements across the country and have run thousands of down-ballot candidates. But whenever and wherever we run Green candidates, guess who always comes running to try to stomp out the Green Party? You guessed it: _the Democrats_. **The Democratic Party is the biggest obstacle to progress in this country precisely because it takes up the space where we _should_ have an authentic people’s party, while actively working to prevent the growth of a genuine party for the people.** The Democrats tell you they support the things you do during elections, then after they get elected they toss all those promises in the trash and go back to working for their donors, Wall Street and war profiteers. Speaking of which, we have a few questions for AOC: **what** **happened to $15 an hour?** What happened to **Medicare for All**? What happened to the **Green New Deal**? What happened to **canceling student debt? Where’s ranked-choice voting**? These are all issues that the Green Party first brought to the national political discussion, and when Green ideas start getting too popular, the Democrats co-opt them and find people to tell you that we’ll get these things someday - if we all just stay in line and keep voting blue. These DNC narrative managers tell you to be outraged when Republicans put kids in cages, but not to worry when Democrats do it. They tell you it’s fine that the Democrats aren’t holding a primary, because they can “push Biden left”.**They tell you that Kamala Harris is “working tirelessly for a ceasefire”, when everyone knows that the Biden-Harris administration is actively arming and funding the genocide in Gaza.** So when you compare grassroots Greens working their hearts out for people, planet, and peace to the treacherous, corrupt, and genocidal Democratic Party, **who’s really authentic and who are the real predators?** Our opponents have mountains of corporate cash to push their deceitful talking points, but we have truth, justice, and incredible supporters like you on our side. [**If you can pitch in to help us fight back against their relentless attacks, we’d be extremely grateful.**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aoc_response&n=6)

clean_body: AOC says Jill is “predatory” and “not authentic” | | | Peter, This is wild: just yesterday, Democratic representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez posted an Instagram video riddled with falsehoods in which she attacked Jill Stein and the Green Party as “not authentic” and “predatory”. Even with the usual paid DNC trolls jumping in to amplify AOC’s talking points, Jill’s replies on X/Twitter blew them out of the water: We’ll let you in on a little secret: we have a member of Team Stein/Ware who worked on AOC's 2018 campaign and helped shape her platform (which at the time looked a lot like Jill’s 2016 platform). But this person is with our movement now because they’ve seen the failed strategy of reforming the reactionary right-wing politics of the Democratic Party from within. With more and more people coming to the same realization that the Democratic Party is a dead end for progress,it’s clear that the Democrats are mobilizing all the firepower they can to attack Jill, Butch, and the Green Party for daring to offer a real choice for voters like you who care about people, planet, and peace. Peter, | "DONATE" Let’s talk about the shameless, hypocritical, and frankly abusive behavior of Democrats who act concerned that the Green Party isn’t having enough success against the duopoly - while their own party actively suppresses Greens by suing us off ballots, hiring paid operatives to sabotage our campaigns, locking us out of debates, fighting ranked-choice voting, attacking us with all kinds of misinformation and smears, and doing everything they can to prevent voters like you from having real choice. Why isn’t AOC saying anything about that? Despite this relentless repression by the anti-Democratic Party, the Green Party has persevered and Greens have won 1400 elections , making us the most successful independent left party since Eugene Debs’ Socialist Party. We’ve won city council seats, mayoral races, school board elections, and despite the massive disadvantages for grassroots candidates who don’t take corporate money, we’ve won state legislative seats too. Contrary to the misinformation coming from AOC and countless DNC trolls, Jill Stein has supported many down-ballot candidates, campaigned with them, fundraised for them, and even recruited many of them. She has spoken at state Green Party conventions, community meetings, college campuses, and every kind of protest you can imagine, from anti-war to climate to racial justice. Greens are active in these movements across the country and have run thousands of down-ballot candidates. But whenever and wherever we run Green candidates, guess who always comes running to try to stomp out the Green Party? You guessed it: the Democrats. The Democratic Party is the biggest obstacle to progress in this country precisely because it takes up the space where we should have an authentic people’s party, while actively working to prevent the growth of a genuine party for the people. The Democrats tell you they support the things you do during elections, then after they get elected they toss all those promises in the trash and go back to working for their donors, Wall Street and war profiteers. Speaking of which, we have a few questions for AOC: what happened to $15 an hour? What happened to Medicare for All? What happened to the Green New Deal? What happened to canceling student debt? Where’s ranked-choice voting? These are all issues that the Green Party first brought to the national political discussion, and when Green ideas start getting too popular, the Democrats co-opt them and find people to tell you that we’ll get these things someday - if we all just stay in line and keep voting blue. These DNC narrative managers tell you to be outraged when Republicans put kids in cages, but not to worry when Democrats do it. They tell you it’s fine that the Democrats aren’t holding a primary, because they can “push Biden left”.They tell you that Kamala Harris is “working tirelessly for a ceasefire”, when everyone knows that the Biden-Harris administration is actively arming and funding the genocide in Gaza. So when you compare grassroots Greens working their hearts out for people, planet, and peace to the treacherous, corrupt, and genocidal Democratic Party, who’s really authentic and who are the real predators? Our opponents have mountains of corporate cash to push their deceitful talking points, but we have truth, justice, and incredible supporters like you on our side. | "HELP US FIGHT BACK" In solidarity and gratitude, Team Stein/Ware 2024 | "VOLUNTEER" * Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024 ©2024 Jill Stein for President 2024, all rights reserved Jill Stein for President, www.jillstein2024.com P.O. name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: This Labor Day: A Call for Change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Let’s commit to working together for the change we need.

|
---
| | | | [**This Labor Day, let’s commit to working together for the change we need.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em-ld?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_9_2_24_all_1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em-ld?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_9_2_24_all_1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em-ld?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_9_2_24_all_1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em-ld?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_9_2_24_all_1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Kamala Harris likes to boast about the success of Bidenomics and the prosperity it has supposedly brought to our country. But in criss-crossing America myself, I’m not seeing evidence of that prosperity.
Instead, I’m seeing an America I never thought I’d witness—an America where giant disparities in wealth have left most Americans living on the precipice of desperation.
Today, the average income in this country is $5,000 less than the basic cost of living, and 35% of Americans are not making enough to pay for basic human needs like transportation, food, and housing. This means they are forced to make impossible choices every day.
American parents across the country are sitting in their living rooms, listening to a baby cry in the next room, and wondering if that baby is $30 sick, $200 sick, or $500 sick before they dare bring them to a hospital. They’re choosing between medicine, food, gasoline, and rent.
To bridge the gap between their income and their needs, Americans are increasingly relying on credit cards. We now have the greatest credit card debt in American history—$300 billion more than just a few years ago—with an average interest rate of around 22%.
When the mafia charges those kinds of rates, they call it loan sharking. When banks do it, they just call it interest..
If we’re doing so well, then why is it that today 57% of Americans can’t put their hands on $1,000 in case of an emergency? For the first time in our history, two-thirds of us believe that our children will be worse off than we are today.
For most Americans, the American Dream has turned into an American nightmare. Whatever graphs, data, and statistics government officials use to try to gaslight us into believing that everything is hunky-dory, the reality is written across this country on the plywood that boards up all the closed businesses—from Main Street to Union Square in San Francisco—and it’s etched on the faces of mothers and fathers who gather weekly at their kitchen table to figure out how in the world they’re going to make ends meet.
That kitchen table math is far more reliable than the sunny economic projections we’re getting from our elected officials, including those in the White House.
**Every American family knows in their bones that these tales of a booming economy don’t add up.**
A Harris administration will continue to adopt policies that favor Wall Street, tech billionaires, and military contractors over the American middle class. These interests are strip-mining America of its equity, wealth, salaries, and ultimately, our democracy.
[With your support, I will be able to yield significant influence in a new administration that cares about YOUR economy—not the war economy, the bank economy, the finance economy, or the Wall Street economy, and not the theoretical economy on charts and graphs.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em-ld?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_9_2_24_all_1&n=5)
This Labor Day, let’s commit to working together for the change we need—a government that will finally solve the problems it created and put the American people first.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em-ld?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=labor_day_9_2_24_all_1&n=6)

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Election results are in. We won!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| Hi friend, Rebecca Cooke – daughter of dairy farmers and the newly-elected Democratic nominee in Wisconsin's 3rd District!

I JUST won the primary, and am now working to unseat Derrick Van Orden in this key battleground race for House control. To kick off our General Election push, I wanted to re-introduce myself:

A lot of folks are surprised to learn that while I’m running a full-fledged campaign by day, I’m waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/92043157/495814336/459690421?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20240902_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzAwM2Y2Ny03OTY5LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asJ7rfMZ-Hu9RXTTeSGqvOTy2y3eipmb9f5OfOd9Nt4=) I grew up in a working-class family, and we weren't strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough. I know for a fact I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- which is a big reason why I’m running.

The way I see it, the ultra-rich have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. I know what working families need, because I’m part of one.

[**We’re officially on to November, but we have to act fast to make up the special interest money Derrick Van Orden has banked. clean_body: | Hi friend, Rebecca Cooke – daughter of dairy farmers and the newly-elected Democratic nominee in Wisconsin's 3rd District! I JUST won the primary, and am now working to unseat Derrick Van Orden in this key battleground race for House control. To kick off our General Election push, I wanted to re-introduce myself: A lot of folks are surprised to learn that while I’m running a full-fledged campaign by day, I’m waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. = I grew up in a working-class family, and we weren't strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough. I know for a fact I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- which is a big reason why I’m running. The way I see it, the ultra-rich have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. I know what working families need, because I’m part of one. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Rebecca Cooke and New Dems will go through immediately: | = = = = = This is a campaign by and for the hard working people of Wisconsin. We’re not funded by family inheritances or wealthy donors. It’s grassroots contributors like you who power this movement. name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie: "I intend to do everything that I can" to elect Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1011?refcode=email-20240902_v&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Bernie
spoke to the country on ABC News to champion our progressive economic
agenda and raise the alarm that the election ahead will be “rough.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19338?t=1061&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ][IMG]

Kamala Harris could win the popular vote by a big margin, Bernie said. But
crucial states like Michigan and Pennsylvania are tight — in fact, our
field team is seeing a lot of Trump organizing in Philadelphia. Trump is
also trying to expand his voting base by bringing RFK Jr. and Tulsi
Gabbard into his campaign. We won’t win PA and other battleground states
if Trump out-organizes us in Philadelphia and other blue cities.

That’s why Bernie pledged “to do everything I can” to elect Harris and
defeat Trump. That’s exactly why we’re building our GOTV operation and
mobilizing progressive voters in battleground states right now — but we
need your help right now to keep this going during such a rough election
fight.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Stand with Bernie and Our Revolution with a donation to our Swing State
fund today. We need a strong start to our September fundraising in order
to meet our organizing goals in 7 battleground states.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

This presidential election is truly a coin toss right now because of the
antiquated, racist electoral college. And, we’ve got to win the House and
Senate if we want to see our priority policies enacted. It’s another
reason there’s so much at stake with our organizing in swing states.

When we make calls, send texts, knock on doors, and talk to our neighbors
in key states, we’re not just lifting VP Harris to victory — we’re working
to win a Democratic House and Senate.

A Democratic trifecta is the only way we can win the top progressive
policies that Bernie spoke about on ABC’s This Week: protecting and
expanding Social Security, expanding Medicare to cover hearing, dental and
vision, and taxing the rich to tackle wealth inequality.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19338?t=1060&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ][IMG]

We have 1.2 million supporters in Pennsylvania, Nevada, Arizona, Georgia,
Michigan, North Carolina, and Wisconsin. Our strategic mobilization in
these 7 states could defeat Trump come November and give Democrats the
trifecta. Then, we can work to win the progressive economic agenda that
Bernie and our movement have been pushing for.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19337?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240902nd&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Can you rush a grassroots donation to our Swing State GOTV operation? We
can reach more than a million voters in battleground states — but only
with the help of our small-dollar donors!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=6686%2E5885482%2EAh5TeY

clean_body: [] Folks, the nonpartisan news site Elections Daily just published this article, and you need to see it: [] Well... are we?? Let’s take a look at some of the latest news out of VA: In late August, Donald Trump joined GOP Senate candidate Hung Cao on the campaign trail in Northern Virginia. Earlier in the month, Glenn Youngkin and Hung Cao hosted a campaign event together. * In July, not only did JD Vance make one of his very first solo campaign appearances in Radford, Virginia, but Trump himself held a rally in Chesapeake, VA the day after the Republican National Convention wrapped up. Youngkin, Trump, Vance, and Cao are all in on flipping Virginia red — and they’re putting real money and manpower behind their efforts. But we know something they seem to be forgetting — Virginia is KAINE COUNTRY! [] Virginians know that Tim Kaine has had their back for years — from his time on the Richmond City Council, to Lieutenant Governor and Governor, and now in the Senate — and they aren’t going to send a MAGA extremist to the Capitol in his place. But the fact is that Democrats are still underdogs in the 2024 elections , and Trump’s GOP has massive resources to spend advancing himself, his hand-picked candidates like Hung Cao, and his extreme Project 2025 agenda. So if we want to keep VA blue and make sure it stays Kaine Country, we’ve got to step up our game. September is the most critical month yet for campaign fundraising because every single dollar we’re able to bring in by the end of this month will be made public in the next FEC report — so now, more than ever before , we need you to get involved.
