name: Dom Jones for Assembly 2024
subject: 🇺🇸🎥Dom Jones Gives Cheers to the Champs: Celebrating the Labor Workers! LABOR DAY2024!!!🎉🇺🇸
body:
Team Dom Jones stands #UNIONSTRONG with our prestigious American workforce! The backbone of our labor community! | 🇺🇸 Happy Labor Day 2024 to the Honorable Members of America's Workforce! 🇺🇸 To my brothers and sisters who power this great nation with your hard work, Today, we celebrate you&mdash
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://domjones.org/so/89P6quP2r/c?w=LRfZuuOte71TzJMgM1KlgOJMMUpGFUrQZcDzfe46r1s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kb21qb25lcy5vcmcvc28vODlQNnF1UDJyP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNTFiYjE3NDQtMmE5My00MzBjLThjNDctMDgwNjgwNmRkMWMyIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LABOR DAY 2024
---
| |
---
| | Team Dom Jones stands #UNIONSTRONG with our prestigious American workforce! The backbone of our labor community!
---
| |
---
| | | [**Watch Dom's Video To Union Workers!**](https://domjones.org/so/89P6quP2r/c?w=r3hWoVCvAMS3eICNHo0L32yeMvDF2RX8BxQxw9sNQ_Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9yZWVsL0NfYmo5LXZSRmlFLyIsInIiOiIwNTk1MTViMy02YmUzLTQ2OWMtOWQwYi03MWUwOGUwZTFjNDciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
| |
---
| | 🇺🇸 Happy Labor Day 2024 to the Honorable Members of America's Workforce! 🇺🇸 To my brothers and sisters who power this great nation with your hard work, Today, we celebrate you—the workers, the unions, the backbones of America. As a candidate for the California State Assembly, I am filled with immense pride and gratitude for the generations of workers who have fought tirelessly to secure the rights we enjoy today. Labor Day is not just a day off; it is a tribute to the strength, tenacity, and unwavering spirit of American workers who have stood up, organized, and demanded better. Labor unions are the reason we have an eight-hour workday, weekends, safer workplaces, and fair wages. It was through their courage and determination that we saw the emergence of a 9 to 5 workforce—an achievement that is often taken for granted today but was fought for with blood, sweat, and tears. Unions have historically been, and continue to be, the defenders of workers’ rights, ensuring that every American has a fair shot at a decent living, safe working conditions, and a dignified retirement. I know the significance of these hard-earned rights because I come from humble beginnings, just like many of you. My family has lived the struggle, the triumphs, and the setbacks of working-class America. I understand what it means to need a job not just for yourself but for your family—to put food on the table, to afford healthcare, to send your kids to school. I understand the fear of not being able to make ends meet and the frustration when your voice is not heard. I understand the importance of having a representative who not only listens but fights for you. When I say that I stand with you, I mean it with every fiber of my being. If elected to the California State Assembly, I commit to being a steadfast ally for labor unions and every worker in our state. I pledge to fight for stronger protections, fair wages, and safe working conditions because I believe that every worker deserves to be treated with dignity and respect. I will advocate for policies that empower unions to continue their critical work and expand their influence so that no worker feels abandoned or without representation. Statistics show that unionized workers earn on average 11.2% more than their non-unionized counterparts. This is not just a number; it is a reflection of the real, tangible benefits that unions bring to their members—better wages, better benefits, and better job security. Unions are the reason millions of American families have been able to achieve a middle-class lifestyle, and it is crucial that we protect and strengthen these institutions. We must continue to build a society where every worker's voice is not only heard but is a powerful force for change. I want you to know that I see you, I hear you, and I am with you. I will not rest until every worker in California—and across this great nation—is treated with the dignity and respect they deserve. You are my people, and I am your champion! Together, in solidarity and unity, we can build a better future where every labor worker’s voice is heard and protected. On this Labor Day, let us remember the history of our movement and commit ourselves to the ongoing fight for justice, fairness, and equality for all workers. You are the reason this country runs; you are the heartbeat of our economy. And I promise, when I am in office, I will never abandon you. Much love and respect to all of you on this Labor Day! In solidarity and Your Champion, Dom JonesCandidate for California State Assembly
---

clean_body: Team Dom Jones stands #UNIONSTRONG with our prestigious American workforce! The backbone of our labor community! | 🇺🇸 Happy Labor Day 2024 to the Honorable Members of America's Workforce! 🇺🇸 To my brothers and sisters who power this great nation with your hard work, Today, we celebrate you&mdash | | Can't see this message? | | | | | LABOR DAY 2024 | | | | Team Dom Jones stands #UNIONSTRONG with our prestigious American workforce! The backbone of our labor community! | | | | | | | | | 🇺🇸 Happy Labor Day 2024 to the Honorable Members of America's Workforce! 🇺🇸 To my brothers and sisters who power this great nation with your hard work, Today, we celebrate you—the workers, the unions, the backbones of America. As a candidate for the California State Assembly, I am filled with immense pride and gratitude for the generations of workers who have fought tirelessly to secure the rights we enjoy today. Labor Day is not just a day off; it is a tribute to the strength, tenacity, and unwavering spirit of American workers who have stood up, organized, and demanded better. Labor unions are the reason we have an eight-hour workday, weekends, safer workplaces, and fair wages. It was through their courage and determination that we saw the emergence of a 9 to 5 workforce—an achievement that is often taken for granted today but was fought for with blood, sweat, and tears. Unions have historically been, and continue to be, the defenders of workers’ rights, ensuring that every American has a fair shot at a decent living, safe working conditions, and a dignified retirement. I know the significance of these hard-earned rights because I come from humble beginnings, just like many of you. My family has lived the struggle, the triumphs, and the setbacks of working-class America. I understand what it means to need a job not just for yourself but for your family—to put food on the table, to afford healthcare, to send your kids to school. I understand the fear of not being able to make ends meet and the frustration when your voice is not heard. I understand the importance of having a representative who not only listens but fights for you. When I say that I stand with you, I mean it with every fiber of my being. If elected to the California State Assembly, I commit to being a steadfast ally for labor unions and every worker in our state. I pledge to fight for stronger protections, fair wages, and safe working conditions because I believe that every worker deserves to be treated with dignity and respect. I will advocate for policies that empower unions to continue their critical work and expand their influence so that no worker feels abandoned or without representation. Statistics show that unionized workers earn on average 11.2% more than their non-unionized counterparts. This is not just a number; it is a reflection of the real, tangible benefits that unions bring to their members—better wages, better benefits, and better job security. Unions are the reason millions of American families have been able to achieve a middle-class lifestyle, and it is crucial that we protect and strengthen these institutions. We must continue to build a society where every worker's voice is not only heard but is a powerful force for change. I want you to know that I see you, I hear you, and I am with you. I will not rest until every worker in California—and across this great nation—is treated with the dignity and respect they deserve. You are my people, and I am your champion! Together, in solidarity and unity, we can build a better future where every labor worker’s voice is heard and protected. On this Labor Day, let us remember the history of our movement and commit ourselves to the ongoing fight for justice, fairness, and equality for all workers. You are the reason this country runs; you are the heartbeat of our economy. And I promise, when I am in office, I will never abandon you. Much love and respect to all of you on this Labor Day! In solidarity and Your Champion, Dom JonesCandidate for California State Assembly | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent from .

body:
Here’s why:
---
We send you a good number of emails, maybe more than some of your family or friends, so we thought we'd slow down for a minute and explain why these messages are so important. First, we all know that elections cost an extraordinary amount of money -- more than ever since the Supreme Court opened the door to unlimited super PAC spending. And as the head of the Democratic Party, the Democratic National Committee has an extraordinarily important role in moving resources to states and in support of campaigns every election cycle. We also run advertising and organizing campaigns of our own to support efforts in critical races. Again, all of that costs money. What may surprise you is there is no greater single source of donations to the DNC than these emails. Just like the one you are reading right now. Now, we do not expect for a single second that anyone would contribute to every email we send. That would be ridiculous. And we actually exclude people from receiving emails for a period of time after they give (try it today!). But with early voting right around the corner in what is the most important election cycle in modern American history, we hope you'll give to this one. Because the DNC is the one organization best positioned to allocate resources where and when they are needed most. [**Can you please consider a contribution to the DNC today? You can give $5, $50, or whatever you can afford. Because the other thing about these emails is those donations add up fast when lots and lots of people respond with a contribution. Happy Labor Day, friend! I want to talk about what Labor Day means to this campaign. 138 years ago, workers rallied together to demand an eight hour work day. They knew then – as we do now – that workers deserve the same dignity and fair treatment that the American Dream promises all of us. **As a workers' rights advocate, I continue to fight to make good on that promise everyday - advocating for people who have been taken advantage of or mistreated by bad actors.** I am running for Congress to continue fighting for that same promise of the American Dream. clean_body: Happy Labor Day! | = Happy Labor Day, friend! I want to talk about what Labor Day means to this campaign. 138 years ago, workers rallied together to demand an eight hour work day. They knew then – as we do now – that workers deserve the same dignity and fair treatment that the American Dream promises all of us. As a workers' rights advocate, I continue to fight to make good on that promise everyday - advocating for people who have been taken advantage of or mistreated by bad actors. I am running for Congress to continue fighting for that same promise of the American Dream. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Derek Tran will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Let's continue this fight, Derek | | Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P.O. name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Pulling the plug
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz6_6jQXI1UhwXp_Qi4aPAjnX45TaXOA6P-mQJGXng8xOOO47QuFG6ZSFYAj02XFDSEGaAeT8aAy9Gf9sKIRmLo3HC1seZ7E8RocIDKQ4IKjSl7wIRBzDjheE9ocg1rVlI7JQDb_XV_Nwju-Lx0CfSYCAF5AHG-NbQgMncZgBfoeic%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate last June.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz68HgePVvaKvGADLjYgveVlIre5K3v5NnQ5m0rfF5QmkMq87DsI_veqwgtAg12N4jvLMKPhO1VJed64iubVgAnTFk6RM0sf9-WW0P7yeG_RKAnOllLV0rpE-0U-b_1S5HHyqIBYu_LKahtyQ-r1eltC-Z43J3pb2y_1hmnawx0P8E%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [_**many veterans like me**_] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz65lQfq6McUGVE4dkT-I0IOvf54heRx0GKzboDfAJWjjKvn7mIyRMYM4hHtSBbrggmTE45B-PuDe_72JmRr-MypyZV_YMzCthFZBNg2fKb4-jnZKEjhbu1hLjtOCkc68A7AR5Tb7-4tPV1Xsk1ECYDadae34CTGzumay7TCo9rPc8%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden and Kamala Harris could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlbhD-36etJ76sIygUFs9PmzL008MT4RLu20lCcQY4x332XX0e7AmiGfs1IsQWjuI8ZJHw6GQXXhXYgFF8rXUX-kF57yA7KCQzq-XjNnParwYEfYnb3P2n_WSMVgB2XUxm6rNCsz5_nBYnulWsHUmRM62dMpeF0-R5ITFVvOUjckwDskycb2sPiEIXkIvpdXrlBlSA4ly1JQ5oWfhMmyXh1AYqC7p8C9rtqskhh9lyLlkNEd7UJljRZXD5wRPx8ETyw9Rpz0orcLavey4_CZfzOj-t832Uz61NCD2Y0RJW6dXiocd6bVYiGuS1_XK9Goixq9i6YpW5AN0KD9zdQXNTKYD4vVJljIEq-IOFfP7McqM%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

[**JOIN OUR FIGHT
ENLIST WITH TIM TODAY->** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz6g39I0iICLMnDzCI1noshaM92enkCAXzp9es8WPcVtVDQA-tw0MaZrHsVawbtco0W1XNtFPrdCuSgVyX8aQkkxBzjyqTyuBFov2JgBGmZlF7SVuZMo9ZgoG7lQpLB2LOOixKoE3S_W3k1QBSEngE9JWIoSjzt8Lfquly9fUDUbo4%3D)

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; **but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz6RSNHbC6vX7_hKvRKABgmlNk0Ow5W8azeKCkEoDT_uPml8Mk_Xt3j6CK23vkrGc7_J2vFvYraoa8DACbw3ByPfWLCkQ1SkofKVrki9ISohzJJiCk93MmD3NTdcu5En0FQUKwol2a01gz1FFdociDHhM3RWefjfYDB01kHAoCruGo%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**ENLIST WITH TIM
CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz6GWvr4tFPNMaeDPpZyq2XXtwggRbeBRPY7WiVWFWxqGcMi0XPVIGfYcA5KPIwhR9yF6lXOHPOF1Ayi-0_vWI3k70vlN-WBn8ibdu32omsVWfjTa2QRgL3hH5M0Tm8SsKbLWg6ydZMqh_NFtIrP829RVEhId0WXZrl7qf3uwHUlE4%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz6NSJgYaZy15eC1zTCVMiVQhZ20vqcSRnN0mfMdwtWqwPcfO56zPrCApAPeULVIbZBCEcm23DpQn8IKxCW0197UjWVkYMC1enCLdXUKEl3H_9oMJYyeu3Rx7a59zyJtG---C6e2CvOeOnm5igXjIBVX1W6jW1aly-b2NrjyHW1y4s%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9c56d9f44bb246ba8e934d73ef48ac17&_e=qGJzG-0jxxLtTMPM4cQv82N5PCs7XP2_bWT5lj4dTF8A3CJhnp4X0Q4v8kele9GlItBeU3akNa6sy8Xiov7dRSzMWhpMx8RFfYfqoLPlIFZNu181N_mvtQnNNsFlGmivY3hj8QM3NkCUrW8zhKkd1BVyn-vqs2C_u99axHOxCWi-7lyG7mKH1sJSdzVQaiyLtMJBzV0QJJkLU1PkTB0ItOcmkHnlJqekeyYZDQLh-D8DWZK9KSbP33xOdq6QOTz61Uz0fbiFqU4x-QzLNBlXswRM7Hm0B4M7PbWfjb2yJ6Kie39nHGLO70fGBHjpmqO_BHBeQbDW8A8WliNU8AP-fmHVDujDw51h83Bv2tVpGUop77aH7y0BK6wpcD1KwBKa1aZ_g1hntl1WUxWbQLjtZQkgsjYznt4mavvTTl3fQwA%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

clean_body: I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden and Kamala Harris could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right. If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: we need to take Maryland seriously
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30630?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2365%2E52803%2E5EShjs ][IMG]

The 2024 Senate map is a nightmare for Democrats,
Peter, so we need to play defense
all over the country between now and November.

But mark my words: If Democrats don’t take the threat that Republican
Larry Hogan poses in Maryland seriously, we could lose our majority to
Mitch McConnell and his cronies.

Here’s some harsh proof: Recent polling shows that Angela Alsobrooks (D)
and Larry Hogan (R) are currently TIED. And whoever wins in Maryland, wins
control of the Senate.

So I’m sounding the alarm because I refuse to let Larry Hogan’s super PACs
buy this seat to further enable my uncle Donald and his MAGA sycophants —
but I need your help.

Maryland will be the tipping point for Senate control, which is why we
need a huge groundswell of grassroots support ASAP. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30630?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2365%2E52803%2E5EShjs ]Will you please
rush a grassroots donation to break the tie in Maryland and elect Angela
Alsobrooks?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30630?t=1012&amount=25&akid=2365%2E52803%2E5EShjs ]Donate $25

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30630?t=1013&amount=35&akid=2365%2E52803%2E5EShjs ]Donate Other Amount

While we shouldn’t take any poll as gospel, there are a couple of things
we can take away from recent polling in Maryland:

1) No matter what, this race is going to be close. Mitch McConnell
personally recruited Larry Hogan for this very purpose: to mislead
Maryland voters so he can flip the Senate.

2) Whoever gets their message in front of more voters will win the whole
state. Hogan is backed by MAGA super PACs and dark money donors, so Angela
needs this grassroots team to step up like never before to spread her
message far and wide.

We can’t take this race for granted. Doing so would spell certain DOOM for
our already razor-thin Senate majority.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30630?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2365%2E52803%2E5EShjs ]I’m committed to defeating Larry Hogan, Donald, and the entire MAGA
agenda, but that starts with defending Maryland’s open seat. Can you pitch
in $25 right away to elect Angela and win the race that will decide Senate
control in November?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Peter, as strong as our movement has become, we remain the underdogs in this race. We must keep growing our momentum heading into next week's debate. Please pitch in $25 -- or as much as you can afford -- to make your voice heard at this critical moment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
When people stand together, when we join our voices, we can drive extraordinary change. | | |
---
Peter, this afternoon I was in Detroit, where nearly 140 years ago, ten thousand people marched in one of our nation's first Labor Day Parades. **They understood the power of unity: that when people stand together, when we join our voices, we can drive extraordinary change.** My parents taught me that from a young age -- and it is the value at the heart of our campaign. Because the true measure of a the strength of a leader is not who you beat down, but who you lift up. From union rights to reproductive rights, we are not going back, Peter. **We are fighting to create a new way forward.** We are fighting to build what I call an _opportunity economy_ so every American can buy a home, start a business, and build wealth. We are fighting to raise wages, lower costs, and defend our most fundamental freedoms. _And I know you agree: No one should ever be made to fight alone._ So, today, I am asking you to pitch in $25 to power our fight for freedom, for opportunity, for the promise of America. _Because when we fight, we win._ [Peter, as strong as our movement has become, we remain the underdogs in this race. We must keep growing our momentum heading into next week's debate. Please pitch in $25 -- or as much as you can afford -- to make your voice heard at this critical clean_body: When people stand together, when we join our voices, we can drive extraordinary change. | | | Peter, this afternoon I was in Detroit, where nearly 140 years ago, ten thousand people marched in one of our nation's first Labor Day Parades. They understood the power of unity: that when people stand together, when we join our voices, we can drive extraordinary change. My parents taught me that from a young age -- and it is the value at the heart of our campaign. Because the true measure of a the strength of a leader is not who you beat down, but who you lift up. From union rights to reproductive rights, we are not going back, Peter. We are fighting to create a new way forward. We are fighting to build what I call an opportunity economy so every American can buy a home, start a business, and build wealth. We are fighting to raise wages, lower costs, and defend our most fundamental freedoms. And I know you agree: No one should ever be made to fight alone. So, today, I am asking you to pitch in $25 to power our fight for freedom, for opportunity, for the promise of America. Because when we fight, we win. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We have 64 days until the most important election of our lives. And in that time, I will continue to count on the strength, the determination, and the leadership of this grassroots team. Thank you and take care, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Harris for President emails, you can We sincerely thank you for your help and support. Paid for by Harris for President.

body:
Hi -- It's Christie, Executive Director of the DSCC.

I'm about to read the responses to our Democratic Strategy Interview, but Diana told me **your name is marked "absent."** Did you miss her message?

_Every_ unanswered invitation leaves a _vital_ spot unfilled -- **so I made an exception to extend your deadline until midnight tonight.** Here's the survey again to get started: **[www.dscc.org/DailyStrategyInterview24/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/18661?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240902-Christie-DianaDailyStrategyBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240902-Christie-DianaDailyStrategyBump-Pros-sl1&akid=17024%2E9716520%2E5LfnK6)**

| | [START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/18661?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240902-Christie-DianaDailyStrategyBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240902-Christie-DianaDailyStrategyBump-Pros-sl1&akid=17024%2E9716520%2E5LfnK6)

I'm excited to review your response!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Diana [[info@dscc.org]](http://go.dscc.org/go/18661?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240902-Christie-DianaDailyStrategyBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240902-Christie-DianaDailyStrategyBump-Pros-sl1&akid=17024%2E9716520%2E5LfnK6)
Date: August 30, 2024
Subject: re: your 8/30/24 invitation...
